+// ─── CNS HEATMAP RENDER ──────────────────────────────────
+function renderCNSHeatmap() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD();
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var wrap = document.getElementById('cns-heatmap');
+  if (!wrap) return;
+  var status = u.cns_status || null;
+  var statusDate = u.cns_date || '';
+  var todayStr = today();
+  if (!status || statusDate !== todayStr) { wrap.style.display = 'none'; return; }
+  wrap.style.display = 'block';
+  // Reset zones
+  ['cns-zone-titan','cns-zone-friction','cns-zone-depleted'].forEach(function(id) {
+    var el = document.getElementById(id);
+    if (el) { el.className = ''; el.style.background = '#1e1e1e'; el.style.boxShadow = 'none'; el.style.animation = 'none'; }
+  });
+  var textEl = document.getElementById('cns-status-text');
+  if (status === 'TITAN') {
+    document.getElementById('cns-zone-titan').className = 'cns-titan';
+    if (textEl) { textEl.textContent = 'TITAN MODE'; textEl.style.color = '#22c55e'; }
+  } else if (status === 'FRICTION') {
+    document.getElementById('cns-zone-friction').className = 'cns-friction';
+    if (textEl) { textEl.textContent = 'FRICTION ZONE'; textEl.style.color = '#f59e0b'; }
+  } else if (status === 'DEPLETED') {
+    document.getElementById('cns-zone-depleted').className = 'cns-depleted';
+    if (textEl) { textEl.textContent = 'DEPLETED — SHIFT ACTIVE'; textEl.style.color = '#ef4444'; }
+  }
+}
+
+// ─── SOVEREIGN INTAKE MATRIX ─────────────────────────────
+var siStep = 0;
+function siChip(btn, containerId) {
+  document.querySelectorAll('#' + containerId + ' .si-chip').forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('on'); });
+  btn.classList.add('on');
+}
+function siMulti(btn, containerId) {
+  if (btn.dataset.v === 'none') {
+    document.querySelectorAll('#' + containerId + ' .si-chip').forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('on'); });
+    btn.classList.add('on');
+  } else {
+    document.querySelector('#' + containerId + ' .si-chip[data-v="none"]').classList.remove('on');
+    btn.classList.toggle('on');
+  }
+}
+function siShowStep(n) {
+  siStep = n;
+  for (var i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
+    var s = document.getElementById('sis' + i);
+    var d = document.getElementById('sid' + i);
+    if (s) s.classList.toggle('on', i === n);
+    if (d) { d.classList.toggle('on', i === n); d.style.background = i < n ? '#D4AF37' : i === n ? '#D4AF37' : '#2a2a2a'; d.style.width = i === n ? '20px' : '8px'; }
+  }
+}
+function siNext(from) {
+  if (from === 0 && !document.getElementById('si-age').value) { TOAST('Enter your age'); return; }
+  if (from === 0 && !document.querySelector('#si-goal-chips .si-chip.on')) { TOAST('Select a goal'); return; }
+  if (from === 1 && !document.querySelector('#si-exp-chips .si-chip.on')) { TOAST('Select your experience level'); return; }
+  siShowStep(from + 1);
+}
+function siPrev(from) { siShowStep(from - 1); }
+function siSubmitIntake() {
+  var age = document.getElementById('si-age').value;
+  var goalEl = document.querySelector('#si-goal-chips .si-chip.on');
+  var expEl = document.querySelector('#si-exp-chips .si-chip.on');
+  var frictionEls = document.querySelectorAll('#si-friction-chips .si-chip.multi.on');
+  var friction = [];
+  frictionEls.forEach(function(f) { friction.push(f.dataset.v); });
+  var intakeData = {
+    age: parseInt(age) || 0,
+    goal: goalEl ? goalEl.dataset.v : '',
+    experience: expEl ? expEl.dataset.v : '',
+    friction: friction,
+    completed: new Date().toISOString()
+  };
+  // Save to user profile
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD();
+  if (d.u[uid]) { d.u[uid].intake = intakeData; d.u[uid].intake_complete = true; SD(d); }
+  // Close overlay
+  document.getElementById('sovereign-intake').classList.remove('on');
+  TOAST('\uD83C\uDFAF Sovereign Blueprint generated. Welcome to the Laboratory.');
+  // Sync to cloud
+  if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined') BBF_SYNC.syncUser(uid, d.u[uid]);
+}
+function checkIntakeNeeded() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  if (!uid || uid === 'akeem') return;
+  var d = GD();
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  if (!u.intake_complete) {
+    setTimeout(function() { document.getElementById('sovereign-intake').classList.add('on'); }, 800);
+  }
+}
+
+// ─── GOLD SEEKER ─────────────────────────────────────────
+function goldSeekSubmit(e) {
+  if (e.key !== 'Enter') return;
+  var query = document.getElementById('gs-input').value.trim();
+  if (!query || query.length < 3) return;
+  if (typeof BBF_SYNC === 'undefined' || !BBF_SYNC.seekSovereignGold) return;
+  var match = BBF_SYNC.seekSovereignGold(query);
+  if (!match) { TOAST('\u26A0 No protocol matched. Try: knee, shoulder, back, hip, ankle, wrist, neck'); return; }
+  showGoldDiagnostic(match);
+}
+
+function showGoldDiagnostic(match) {
+  var L = LANG || 'en';
+  var focus = match.focus ? (match.focus[L] || match.focus.en) : '';
+  var movesHtml = (match.movements || []).map(function(m, i) {
+    var txt = m[L] || m.en;
+    return '<div style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:.6rem">' +
+      '<span style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:1.4rem;color:#D4AF37;min-width:28px">' + (i + 1) + '</span>' +
+      '<span style="font-size:.95rem;color:#ddd;line-height:1.5">' + txt + '</span></div>';
+  }).join('');
+  var modal = document.createElement('div');
+  modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.94);z-index:999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px;animation:fadeIn .3s ease';
+  modal.innerHTML = '<div style="background:#111;border:2px solid #D4AF37;border-radius:16px;padding:2.5rem;max-width:480px;width:100%;position:relative;overflow:hidden">' +
+    '<div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#6a0dad,#D4AF37)"></div>' +
+    '<div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem">' +
+    '<div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:.8rem">&#x1F3AF;</div>' +
+    '<div style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:4px;color:#D4AF37;margin-bottom:.4rem">MASTERMIND DIAGNOSTIC COMPLETE</div>' +
+    '<div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#888">Recommended Pre-Hab Protocol:</div>' +
+    '</div>' +
+    '<div style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:1.5rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#fff;text-align:center;margin-bottom:.5rem">' + match.protocol + '</div>' +
+    '<div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#888;text-align:center;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:1.5rem">' + focus + '</div>' +
+    '<div style="background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #1e1e1e;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem">' +
+    '<div style="font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:#D4AF37;margin-bottom:.8rem">CORRECTIVE SEQUENCE</div>' +
+    movesHtml +
+    '</div>' +
+    '<!-- TODO: Wire to Biomechanical Hologram drawKineticHologram() for visual overlay -->' +
+    '<button onclick="this.closest(\'div[style*=fixed]\').remove()" style="width:100%;background:#D4AF37;color:#0a0a0a;font-family:var(--hb);font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:3px;padding:.85rem;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s">ACKNOWLEDGE &amp; IMPLEMENT</button>' +
+    '<div style="font-size:.58rem;color:#555;text-align:center;margin-top:.8rem;font-style:italic">' + _ts('sovereign-gold') + ' \u2022 Est. 2021 \u2022 BBF LLC</div>' +
+    '</div>';
+  modal.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); };
+  document.body.appendChild(modal);
+  // Clear search
+  document.getElementById('gs-input').value = '';
+  document.getElementById('gs-result').classList.remove('on');
+}
+
+function goldSeek(query) {
+  var result = document.getElementById('gs-result');
+  if (!result) return;
+  if (!query || query.length < 3) { result.classList.remove('on'); return; }
+  if (typeof BBF_SYNC === 'undefined' || !BBF_SYNC.seekSovereignGold) { result.classList.remove('on'); return; }
+  var match = BBF_SYNC.seekSovereignGold(query);
+  if (!match) {
+    result.classList.remove('on');
+    return;
+  }
+  var L = LANG || 'en';
+  var focus = match.focus ? (match.focus[L] || match.focus.en) : '';
+  var movesHtml = (match.movements || []).map(function(m, i) {
+    var txt = m[L] || m.en;
+    return '<div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:.4rem"><span style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:1rem;color:#D4AF37;min-width:20px">' + (i + 1) + '</span><span style="font-size:.82rem;color:#ddd;line-height:1.4">' + txt + '</span></div>';
+  }).join('');
+  result.innerHTML =
+    '<div style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:#D4AF37;margin-bottom:.5rem">SOVEREIGN PROTOCOL MATCHED</div>' +
+    '<div style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#fff;margin-bottom:.6rem">' + match.protocol + '</div>' +
+    '<div style="font-size:.75rem;color:#888;margin-bottom:.8rem;line-height:1.5">' + focus + '</div>' +
+    movesHtml +
+    '<div style="font-size:.58rem;color:#555;margin-top:.6rem;font-style:italic;text-align:center">' + _ts('sovereign-gold') + ' \u2022 Est. 2021</div>';
+  result.classList.add('on');
+}
+
+// ─── SOVEREIGN LINGUISTICS ────────────────────────────────
+function setSovereignLang(lang) {
+  LANG = lang;
+  if (typeof BBF_LANG !== 'undefined') BBF_LANG.set(lang);
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.updateUserLanguage) {
+    BBF_SYNC.updateUserLanguage(uid, lang);
+  }
+  updateLangButtons(lang);
+  renderPrehab();
+  var activeTab = document.querySelector('.tp.on');
+  if (activeTab) {
+    var tabId = activeTab.id.replace('tp-', '');
+    if (tabId === 'home') RH();
+    if (tabId === 'workout') RW();
+    if (tabId === 'nutrition') RN();
+  }
+  TOAST('\uD83C\uDF10 Language: ' + {en:'English',es:'Espa\u00f1ol',pt:'Portugu\u00eas'}[lang]);
+}
+
+function updateLangButtons(lang) {
+  ['en','es','pt'].forEach(function(l) {
+    var btn = document.getElementById('sl-' + l);
+    if (!btn) return;
+    if (l === lang) {
+      btn.style.background = '#D4AF37';
+      btn.style.color = '#0a0a0a';
+      btn.style.borderColor = '#D4AF37';
+    } else {
+      btn.style.background = 'transparent';
+      btn.style.color = '#888';
+      btn.style.borderColor = '#2a2a2a';
+    }
+  });
+}
+
+// ─── SWEAT EQUITY CONTRACT ────────────────────────────────
+function renderSweatContract() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD();
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var wrap = document.getElementById('sweat-contract');
+  if (!wrap || !u.household_id) return;
+  wrap.style.display = 'block';
+
+  var contract = u.sweat_contract || null;
+  var editBtn = document.getElementById('sc-edit-btn');
+  var shatter = document.getElementById('sc-shatter');
+
+  if (!contract) {
+    // No contract set — show setup prompt for parent
+    if (u.household_role === 'parent' || CU === 'akeem') {
+      document.getElementById('sc-target').textContent = 'Tap EDIT to set a family target';
+      if (editBtn) editBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
+    } else {
+      document.getElementById('sc-target').textContent = 'Waiting for parent to set a target...';
+    }
+    document.getElementById('sc-progress').textContent = '';
+    document.getElementById('sc-reward').textContent = '';
+    document.getElementById('sc-bar').style.width = '0%';
+    if (shatter) shatter.style.display = 'none';
+    return;
+  }
+
+  var target = contract.target_weeks || 4;
+  var reward = contract.reward || '';
+  var logs = (d.l[uid] || []).filter(function(l) { return l.type !== 'note'; });
+  var currentStreak = STREAK(logs);
+  var weeksComplete = Math.floor(currentStreak / 7);
+  var pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((weeksComplete / target) * 100));
+
+  document.getElementById('sc-target').textContent = 'Target: ' + target + '-Week Streak';
+  document.getElementById('sc-reward').textContent = reward ? '\uD83C\uDFC6 ' + reward : '';
+  document.getElementById('sc-progress').textContent = weeksComplete + ' / ' + target + ' weeks';
+  document.getElementById('sc-bar').style.width = pct + '%';
+  if (editBtn && (u.household_role === 'parent' || CU === 'akeem')) editBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';
+
+  // Check for shatter (streak broken while contract active)
+  if (contract.last_known_streak && currentStreak < contract.last_known_streak && currentStreak === 0) {
+    if (shatter) shatter.style.display = 'block';
+    document.getElementById('sc-bar').style.width = '0%';
+    document.getElementById('sc-bar').style.background = '#ef4444';
+    setTimeout(function() { document.getElementById('sc-bar').style.background = 'linear-gradient(90deg,#D4AF37,#6a0dad)'; }, 2000);
+  } else {
+    if (shatter) shatter.style.display = 'none';
+  }
+  // Update last known streak
+  d.u[uid].sweat_contract.last_known_streak = currentStreak;
+  SD(d);
+
+  // Check completion
+  if (weeksComplete >= target) {
+    document.getElementById('sc-bar').style.background = '#22c55e';
+    document.getElementById('sc-target').textContent = '\uD83C\uDFC6 CONTRACT COMPLETE!';
+    TOAST('\uD83C\uDFC6 Legacy Reward Earned: ' + reward);
+  }
+}
+
+function editSweatContract() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD();
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var weeks = prompt('How many weeks for the family streak target?', '4');
+  if (!weeks) return;
+  var reward = prompt('What is the reward? (e.g. New Cleats, Movie Night)', '');
+  weeks = parseInt(weeks) || 4;
+  d.u[uid].sweat_contract = { target_weeks: weeks, reward: reward || '', last_known_streak: 0, created: new Date().toISOString() };
+  SD(d);
+  // Also set on household partner
+  for (var k in (d.u || {})) {
+    if (k !== uid && d.u[k].household_id === u.household_id) {
+      d.u[k].sweat_contract = d.u[uid].sweat_contract;
+    }
+  }
+  SD(d);
+  if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined') BBF_SYNC.syncUser(uid, d.u[uid]);
+  renderSweatContract();
+  TOAST('\uD83D\uDCDD Contract set: ' + weeks + '-week streak for ' + (reward || 'the legacy'));
+}
+
+// ─── PLAYER CARD RENDER ──────────────────────────────────
+function renderPlayerCard() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD();
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var card = document.getElementById('player-card');
+  if (!card) return;
+  // Only show for youth athletes with household_role or attributes
+  if (!u.attributes && u.household_role !== 'youth') { card.style.display = 'none'; return; }
+  if (!u.attributes) { if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined') BBF_SYNC.initYouthAttributes(uid); u.attributes = { power: 70, agility: 70, discipline: 70 }; }
+  card.style.display = 'block';
+  var a = u.attributes;
+  var overall = Math.round((a.power + a.agility + a.discipline) / 3);
+  document.getElementById('pc-avatar').textContent = (u.name || '?')[0].toUpperCase();
+  document.getElementById('pc-name').textContent = (u.name || uid).toUpperCase();
+  var pcLabel = document.getElementById('pc-label');
+  if (pcLabel) pcLabel.textContent = _ts('player-card');
+  document.getElementById('pc-overall').textContent = overall;
+  document.getElementById('pc-power').textContent = a.power;
+  document.getElementById('pc-agility').textContent = a.agility;
+  document.getElementById('pc-discipline').textContent = a.discipline;
+  document.getElementById('pc-power-bar').style.width = a.power + '%';
+  document.getElementById('pc-agility-bar').style.width = a.agility + '%';
+  document.getElementById('pc-discipline-bar').style.width = a.discipline + '%';
+}
+
+// ─── HOUSEHOLD REACTIONS ─────────────────────────────────
+function sendReaction(receiverId, reactionType) {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  if (!uid || !receiverId) return;
+  var emojis = { FIRE: '\uD83D\uDD25', FLEX: '\uD83D\uDCAA', SILVERBACK: '\uD83E\uDD8D' };
+  var emoji = emojis[reactionType] || '\uD83D\uDD25';
+  if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.sendHouseholdReaction) {
+    BBF_SYNC.sendHouseholdReaction(uid, receiverId, reactionType);
+  }
+  TOAST(emoji + ' Reaction sent!');
+}
+
+function checkIncomingReactions() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  try {
+    var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+    var reactions = (d.reactions || []).filter(function(r) { return r.to === uid && !r.seen; });
+    if (!reactions.length) return;
+    var emojis = { FIRE: '\uD83D\uDD25', FLEX: '\uD83D\uDCAA', SILVERBACK: '\uD83E\uDD8D' };
+    reactions.forEach(function(r) { r.seen = true; });
+    localStorage.setItem('bbf_v7', JSON.stringify(d));
+    var last = reactions[reactions.length - 1];
+    var emoji = emojis[last.type] || '\uD83D\uDD25';
+    var senderName = (d.u[last.from] && d.u[last.from].name) || last.from;
+    TOAST(emoji + ' ' + senderName + ' acknowledges the Sovereign Standard: ' + emoji);
+  } catch(e) {}
+}
+
+// ─── HOUSEHOLD FEED ──────────────────────────────────────
+function renderHouseholdFeed() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD();
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var feedWrap = document.getElementById('household-feed');
+  var alertsWrap = document.getElementById('household-alerts');
+  if (!feedWrap || !alertsWrap || !u.household_id) return;
+
+  feedWrap.style.display = 'block';
+  var myRole = u.household_role || 'parent';
+
+  // Find household partner from localStorage
+  var partnerLogs = [];
+  var partnerName = '';
+  var partnerId = '';
+  for (var k in (d.u || {})) {
+    if (k !== uid && d.u[k].household_id === u.household_id) {
+      partnerId = k;
+      partnerName = d.u[k].name || k;
+      partnerLogs = (d.l[k] || []).filter(function(l) {
+        if (l.type === 'note') return false;
+        var logTime = new Date(l.loggedAt || l.date + 'T12:00:00');
+        return (Date.now() - logTime.getTime()) < 48 * 3600000;
+      }).slice(-3).reverse();
+      break;
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (!partnerLogs.length) {
+    alertsWrap.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#555;padding:.5rem">No recent activity from your household partner.</div>';
+    return;
+  }
+
+  var isParent = myRole === 'parent';
+  alertsWrap.innerHTML = partnerLogs.map(function(log) {
+    var icon = isParent ? '\uD83C\uDFC6' : '\uD83D\uDCAA';
+    var prefix = isParent ? 'Legacy Built' : 'Role Model Action';
+    var msg = isParent
+      ? 'Your athlete just completed: ' + (log.notes || log.type)
+      : 'Your parent just completed their Sovereign Target: ' + (log.notes || log.type);
+    return '<div style="background:rgba(212,175,55,.06);border:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,.2);border-left:3px solid #D4AF37;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;padding:.7rem 1rem;margin-bottom:.4rem">' +
+      '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.2rem"><span style="font-size:1rem">' + icon + '</span><span style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#D4AF37">' + prefix + '</span></div>' +
+      '<div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#ccc;line-height:1.5">' + msg + '</div>' +
+      '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:.4rem">' +
+      '<div style="font-size:.6rem;color:#555">' + partnerName + ' \u2022 ' + (log.date || '') + '</div>' +
+      '<div style="display:flex;gap:.3rem">' +
+      '<button onclick="sendReaction(\'' + partnerId + '\',\'FIRE\')" style="background:none;border:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,.3);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.9rem;transition:all .15s" onmouseover="this.style.background=\'rgba(212,175,55,.15)\'" onmouseout="this.style.background=\'none\'">\uD83D\uDD25</button>' +
+      '<button onclick="sendReaction(\'' + partnerId + '\',\'FLEX\')" style="background:none;border:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,.3);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.9rem;transition:all .15s" onmouseover="this.style.background=\'rgba(212,175,55,.15)\'" onmouseout="this.style.background=\'none\'">\uD83D\uDCAA</button>' +
+      '<button onclick="sendReaction(\'' + partnerId + '\',\'SILVERBACK\')" style="background:none;border:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,.3);border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.9rem;transition:all .15s" onmouseover="this.style.background=\'rgba(212,175,55,.15)\'" onmouseout="this.style.background=\'none\'">\uD83E\uDD8D</button>' +
+      '</div></div></div>';
+  }).join('');
+
+  // Also try cloud fetch for fresher data
+  if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.fetchHouseholdActivity) {
+    BBF_SYNC.fetchHouseholdActivity(u.household_id).catch(function() {});
+  }
+}
+
+// ─── READINESS ENGINE ─────────────────────────────────────
+function hasReadinessToday(uid) {
+  var d = GD(); var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  return u.readiness_last_check === today();
+}
+
+function showReadinessModal() {
+  document.getElementById('ready-sleep').value = 5;
+  document.getElementById('ready-stress').value = 5;
+  document.getElementById('ready-energy').value = 5;
+  document.getElementById('rv-sleep').textContent = '5';
+  document.getElementById('rv-stress').textContent = '5';
+  document.getElementById('rv-energy').textContent = '5';
+  updateReadinessPreview();
+  document.getElementById('readiness-modal').classList.add('on');
+}
+
+function closeReadinessModal() {
+  document.getElementById('readiness-modal').classList.remove('on');
+}
+
+function skipReadiness() {
+  var d = GD(); var uid = VC || CU;
+  if (d.u[uid]) { d.u[uid].readiness_last_check = today(); SD(d); }
+  closeReadinessModal();
+}
+
+function updateReadinessPreview() {
+  var s = parseInt(document.getElementById('ready-sleep').value) || 5;
+  var st = parseInt(document.getElementById('ready-stress').value) || 5;
+  var e = parseInt(document.getElementById('ready-energy').value) || 5;
+  var score = Math.round(((s + (10 - st) + e) / 30) * 100);
+  var el = document.getElementById('ready-preview-n');
+  var wrap = document.getElementById('ready-preview');
+  if (el) el.textContent = score + '%';
+  if (wrap) { wrap.className = 'ready-score ' + (score >= 90 ? 'god' : score >= 70 ? 'std' : 'rec'); }
+}
+
+function saveReadiness() {
+  var sleep = parseInt(document.getElementById('ready-sleep').value) || 5;
+  var stress = parseInt(document.getElementById('ready-stress').value) || 5;
+  var energy = parseInt(document.getElementById('ready-energy').value) || 5;
+  var score = Math.round(((sleep + (10 - stress) + energy) / 30) * 100);
+  var d = GD(); var uid = VC || CU;
+  if (!d.u[uid]) return;
+  if (!d.u[uid].daily_readiness) d.u[uid].daily_readiness = {};
+  d.u[uid].daily_readiness[today()] = { sleep: sleep, stress: stress, energy: energy, score: score };
+  d.u[uid].readiness_last_check = today();
+  SD(d);
+  if(typeof BBF_SYNC!=='undefined'){BBF_SYNC.syncReadiness(uid,today(),{sleep:sleep,stress:stress,energy:energy,score:score});BBF_SYNC.syncUser(uid,d.u[uid]);}
+  closeReadinessModal();
+  var tier = score >= 90 ? 'god-mode' : score >= 70 ? 'standard' : 'recovery';
+  var msg = tier === 'god-mode' ? _t('app-ready-god', 'CNS Peak Detected. Go for the PR.') :
+            tier === 'standard' ? _t('app-ready-standard', 'Protocol Active. Execute as written.') :
+            _t('app-ready-recovery', 'Fatigue Detected. Cap intensity at 70%.');
+  TOAST('&#x1F9EA; ' + score + '% \u2014 ' + msg);
+  RH(); RW();
+}
+
+function getTodayReadiness(uid) {
+  var d = GD(); var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var r = u.daily_readiness && u.daily_readiness[today()];
+  return r ? r.score : null;
+}
+
+function getReadinessBannerHTML(score) {
+  if (score === null) return '';
+  var tier = score >= 90 ? 'god' : score >= 70 ? 'std' : 'rec';
+  var icon = tier === 'god' ? '&#x26A1;' : tier === 'std' ? '&#x1F9EA;' : '&#x26A0;';
+  var msg = tier === 'god' ? _t('app-ready-god', 'CNS Peak Detected. Add 5% to your primary lifts today. Go for the PR.') :
+            tier === 'std' ? _t('app-ready-standard', 'Laboratory Protocol Active. Execute the session as written.') :
+            _t('app-ready-recovery', 'Fatigue Detected. Cap intensity at 70%. Prioritize longevity.');
+  var seal = _t('app-ready-seal', 'Architecture by Akeem. Sovereign Gold Standard Met. This system protects your gains.');
+  return '<div class="ready-banner ' + tier + '"><span class="rb-icon">' + icon + '</span><div><div>' + score + '% \u2014 ' + msg + '</div><div class="ready-seal">' + seal + '</div></div></div>';
+}
+
+// ─── WORKOUT ──────────────────────────────────────────────
+function RW() {
+  var nav = document.getElementById('dnav');
+  var con = document.getElementById('wcon');
+  if (!PLAN) {
+    nav.innerHTML = '';
+    con.innerHTML = '<div class="rdc"><div class="rdi">&#x1F4CB;</div><div class="rdt">' + _t('app-wo-noprogram','No Program') + '</div><div class="rds">' + _t('app-wo-noprogram-sub','Akeem will assign your workout plan.') + '</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  nav.innerHTML = PLAN.map(function(day, i) {
+    return '<button class="dbn' + (i === SDAY ? ' on' : '') + '" onclick="SELDAY(' + i + ')">' + day.day + '</button>';
+  }).join('');
+  RDW();
+}
+
+function SELDAY(i) {
+  SDAY = i;
+  document.querySelectorAll('.dbn').forEach(function(b, idx) { b.classList.toggle('on', idx === i); });
+  RDW();
+}
+
+function RDW() {
+  var con = document.getElementById('wcon');
+  if (!PLAN) return;
+  var day = PLAN[SDAY];
+  var d = GD();
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var wl = d.w[uid] || {};
+  var dk = today() + '_d' + SDAY;
+  var saved = wl[dk] || {};
+  var partner = d.u[uid] && d.u[uid].partner ? d.u[uid].partner : null;
+  // Sovereign Paywall — trial users see Days 1-2 only
+  var userObj = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var isTrial = userObj.trial_status === 'active';
+  var isTrainer = (CU === 'akeem');
+  if (isTrial && !isTrainer && SDAY >= 2) {
+    con.innerHTML = '<div class="dh"><div class="dl">' + day.day + '</div><div class="dn2">' + day.focus + '</div></div>' +
+      '<div style="position:relative;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:.5rem">' +
+      '<div style="padding:1.5rem" class="sovereign-blur-lock">' +
+      '<div class="eb" style="margin-bottom:.8rem"><div class="eh"><div><div class="en">Exercise Preview</div><div class="em">' + day.exercises.length + ' exercises locked</div></div></div></div>' +
+      '<div class="eb"><div class="eh"><div><div class="en">Progressive Overload Data</div><div class="em">Sets, reps, and weight tracking</div></div></div></div>' +
+      '</div>' +
+      '<div class="paywall-overlay">' +
+      '<div class="pw-icon">&#x1F512;</div>' +
+      '<div class="pw-title">SOVEREIGN ACCESS REQUIRED</div>' +
+      '<div class="pw-sub">Your Central Nervous System requires adaptation. Upgrade to the Sovereign Tier to access dynamic programming beyond Day 2.</div>' +
+      '<button class="sovereign-upgrade-btn" onclick="executeSovereignUpgrade()">UPGRADE TO UNLOCK INTELLIGENCE</button>' +
+      '</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  if (day.isRest) {
+    con.innerHTML = '<div class="dh"><div class="dl">' + day.day + '</div><div class="dn2">' + _t('app-wo-restday','Rest Day') + '</div></div>' +
+      '<div class="rdc"><div class="rdi">&#x1F634;</div><div class="rdt">' + _t('app-wo-restrecover','Rest & Recover') + '</div><div class="rds">' + (day.restNote || _t('app-wo-restdefault','Active recovery, stretch, hydrate.')) + '</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  var readyScore = getTodayReadiness(uid);
+  var readyTier = readyScore !== null ? (readyScore >= 90 ? 'god' : readyScore >= 70 ? 'std' : 'rec') : null;
+  var dhClass = readyTier === 'god' ? ' god-glow' : '';
+  var h = ['<div class="dh' + dhClass + '"><div class="dl">' + day.day + '</div><div class="dn2">' + day.focus + '</div>' +
+    '<div class="df2">' + day.exercises.length + ' ' + _t('app-wo-exercises','exercises') + (day.focus_cue ? ' &nbsp;&#x2022;&nbsp; &#x1F3AF; ' + day.focus_cue : '') + '</div></div>'];
+  h.push(getReadinessBannerHTML(readyScore));
+  // Sovereign Shift Protocol — intercept exercises if CNS depleted
+  var userCNS = (d.u[uid] || {}).cns_status;
+  var cnsToday = (d.u[uid] || {}).cns_date === today();
+  var shiftActive = false;
+  var renderExercises = day.exercises;
+  if (cnsToday && userCNS === 'DEPLETED' && typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.evaluateBlueprint) {
+    var shifted = BBF_SYNC.evaluateBlueprint(day.exercises, 'DEPLETED');
+    var hasShifts = shifted.some(function(e) { return e.is_shifted; });
+    if (hasShifts) {
+      shiftActive = true;
+      renderExercises = shifted;
+      h.push('<div style="background:rgba(239,68,68,.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2);border-left:3px solid #ef4444;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;padding:.8rem 1rem;margin-bottom:.8rem">' +
+        '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.3rem"><span style="font-size:1rem">\u26A0</span><span style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#ef4444">' + _ts('mastermind-override') + '</span></div>' +
+        '<div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#ccc;line-height:1.5">' + _ts('sovereign-shift') + '. ' + _ts('axial-loading') + ' ' + _t('app-ready-recovery','removed to protect lumbar and joint integrity while maintaining 85% efficiency.') + '</div>' +
+        '</div>');
+    }
+  }
+  renderExercises.forEach(function(ex, ei) {
+    var ek = 'ex_' + ei;
+    var sv = saved[ek] || [];
+    var exName = ex.name || '';
+    var exEquip = ex.equipment || '';
+    var exSets = ex.sets || 0;
+    var exReps = ex.reps || '';
+    var exNotes = ex.notes || '';
+    var ns = (exReps.indexOf('min') > -1 || exReps.indexOf('sec') > -1) ? 1 : exSets;
+    var shiftBadge = ex.is_shifted ? ' <span style="font-size:.55rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;background:rgba(239,68,68,.15);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);color:#ef4444;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:3px;vertical-align:middle">SHIFTED</span>' : '';
+    h.push('<div class="eb"><div class="eh" onclick="TEX(this)"><div><div class="en">' + exName + shiftBadge + '</div>' +
+      '<div class="em">' + exEquip + ' &middot; ' + exSets + ' sets &times; ' + exReps + '</div></div>' +
+      '<div class="ec">&#9662;</div></div><div class="ebody">');
+    h.push('<button class="aud-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();if(typeof BBF_AUDITOR!==\'undefined\')BBF_AUDITOR.trigger(\'' + ex.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'") + '\',function(r){TOAST(\'&#x1F9EA; Audit logged: \'+r.areaLabel)})">&#x1F9EA; AUDIT FORM</button>');
+    h.push(' <button class="aud-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();if(typeof BBF_HOLOGRAM!==\'undefined\')BBF_HOLOGRAM.toggle(\'holo-' + ei + '\',\'' + ex.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'") + '\')">&#x1F4D0; KINETIC HOLOGRAM</button>');
+    h.push('<div id="holo-' + ei + '" style="position:relative;width:100%;height:180px;background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #1e1e1e;border-radius:8px;margin-top:.5rem;overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><span style="font-size:.7rem;color:#333;letter-spacing:2px">HOLOGRAM VIEWPORT</span></div>');
+    // RPE Commander — Sovereign Target Banner
+    if (typeof BBF_RPE !== 'undefined' && sv.length > 0 && sv[0].w) {
+      var lastW = parseFloat(sv[0].w) || 0;
+      var lastRPE = 7; // default if no RPE data
+      var est1RM = Math.round(lastW / 0.85); // rough estimate
+      var rpeResult = BBF_RPE.calculate(lastW, lastRPE, est1RM);
+      h.push(BBF_RPE.render(rpeResult));
+    }
+    if (ex.is_shifted && ex.original_name) h.push('<div class="enote" style="border-color:rgba(239,68,68,.3);background:rgba(239,68,68,.05)">&#x26A0; ' + _ts('sovereign-shift') + ': <strong>' + ex.original_name + '</strong> \u2192 <strong>' + exName + '</strong></div>');
+    else if (exNotes) h.push('<div class="enote">&#x1F4A1; ' + exNotes + '</div>');
+    if (partner) {
+      var pd = d.w[partner] || {};
+      var pdk2 = pd[dk] || {};
+      var psv = pdk2[ek] || [];
+      var mn = (d.u[uid] && d.u[uid].name || uid).split(' ')[0];
+      var pn = (d.u[partner] && d.u[partner].name || partner).split(' ')[0];
+      h.push('<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px 1fr 1fr .3fr 1fr 1fr;gap:.4rem;margin-top:.8rem">' +
+        '<div></div><div style="grid-column:2/4;text-align:center;font-weight:900;font-size:.85rem;color:var(--yel);border-bottom:2px solid var(--yel);padding-bottom:.2rem">' + mn + '</div>' +
+        '<div></div><div style="grid-column:5/7;text-align:center;font-weight:900;font-size:.85rem;color:#8b1abf;border-bottom:2px solid #8b1abf;padding-bottom:.2rem">' + pn + '</div></div>');
+      h.push('<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px 1fr 1fr .3fr 1fr 1fr;gap:.4rem;margin-top:.3rem">' +
+        '<div class="slb">Set</div><div class="slb">Reps</div><div class="slb">Wt</div><div></div><div class="slb">Reps</div><div class="slb">Wt</div></div>');
+      for (var s = 0; s < ns; s++) {
+        var sv1 = sv[s] || {};
+        var psv1 = psv[s] || {};
+        h.push('<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px 1fr 1fr .3fr 1fr 1fr;gap:.4rem;margin-top:.4rem;align-items:center">' +
+          '<div class="snum">' + (s+1) + '</div>' +
+          '<input class="sinp' + (sv1.r ? ' done' : '') + '" type="number" placeholder="reps" inputmode="numeric" value="' + (sv1.r||'') + '" data-uid="' + uid + '" data-dk="' + dk + '" data-ek="' + ek + '" data-s="' + s + '" data-f="r"/>' +
+          '<input class="sinp' + (sv1.w ? ' done' : '') + '" type="number" placeholder="lbs" inputmode="decimal" value="' + (sv1.w||'') + '" data-uid="' + uid + '" data-dk="' + dk + '" data-ek="' + ek + '" data-s="' + s + '" data-f="w"/>' +
+          '<div style="text-align:center;color:#333">|</div>' +
+          '<input class="sinp' + (psv1.r ? ' done' : '') + '" type="number" placeholder="reps" inputmode="numeric" value="' + (psv1.r||'') + '" data-uid="' + partner + '" data-dk="' + dk + '" data-ek="' + ek + '" data-s="' + s + '" data-f="r" style="border-color:' + (psv1.r ? '#8b1abf' : '') + '"/>' +
+          '<input class="sinp' + (psv1.w ? ' done' : '') + '" type="number" placeholder="lbs" inputmode="decimal" value="' + (psv1.w||'') + '" data-uid="' + partner + '" data-dk="' + dk + '" data-ek="' + ek + '" data-s="' + s + '" data-f="w" style="border-color:' + (psv1.w ? '#8b1abf' : '') + '"/>' +
+          '</div>');
+      }
+    } else {
+      h.push('<div class="slbs"><div class="slb">' + _t('app-wo-set','Set') + '</div><div class="slb">' + _t('app-wo-target','Target') + '</div><div class="slb">' + _t('app-wo-repsdone','Reps Done') + '</div><div class="slb">' + _t('app-wo-weightlbs','Weight (lbs)') + '</div></div>');
+      for (var s = 0; s < ns; s++) {
+        var sv1 = sv[s] || {};
+        h.push('<div class="srow2"><div class="snum">' + (s+1) + '</div><div class="stgt">' + ex.reps + '</div>' +
+          '<input class="sinp' + (sv1.r ? ' done' : '') + '" type="number" placeholder="reps" inputmode="numeric" value="' + (sv1.r||'') + '" data-uid="' + uid + '" data-dk="' + dk + '" data-ek="' + ek + '" data-s="' + s + '" data-f="r"/>' +
+          '<input class="sinp' + (sv1.w ? ' done' : '') + '" type="number" placeholder="lbs" inputmode="decimal" value="' + (sv1.w||'') + '" data-uid="' + uid + '" data-dk="' + dk + '" data-ek="' + ek + '" data-s="' + s + '" data-f="w"/></div>');
+      }
+    }
+    h.push('</div></div>');
+  });
+  h.push('<button class="dbtn" data-dk="' + dk + '">&#x2713; ' + _t('app-wo-complete','Mark Session Complete') + '</button>');
+  con.innerHTML = h.join('');
+  con.querySelectorAll('.eh').forEach(function(hdr) {
+    hdr.onclick = function() { TEX(hdr); };
+  });
+  con.querySelectorAll('.sinp').forEach(function(inp) {
+    inp.onchange = function() { SVS(inp); };
+    inp.onblur   = function() { SVS(inp); };
+  });
+  var dbtn = con.querySelector('.dbtn');
+  if (dbtn) dbtn.onclick = function() { CWO(day, dk); };
+}
+
+function TEX(hdr) {
+  var b = hdr.nextElementSibling;
+  var c = hdr.querySelector('.ec');
+  b.classList.toggle('on');
+  c.classList.toggle('on');
+}
+
+function SVS(inp) {
+  var v = inp.value; if (!v) return;
+  var d = GD();
+  var uid = inp.dataset.uid;
+  var dk  = inp.dataset.dk;
+  var ek  = inp.dataset.ek;
+  var s   = parseInt(inp.dataset.s);
+  var f   = inp.dataset.f;
+  if (!d.w[uid]) d.w[uid] = {};
+  if (!d.w[uid][dk]) d.w[uid][dk] = {};
+  if (!d.w[uid][dk][ek]) d.w[uid][dk][ek] = [];
+  while (d.w[uid][dk][ek].length <= s) d.w[uid][dk][ek].push({});
+  d.w[uid][dk][ek][s][f] = v;
+  SD(d);
+  if(typeof BBF_SYNC!=='undefined')BBF_SYNC.syncSet(uid,dk,ek,s,f,v);
+  inp.classList.add('done');
+  saveSetToSession(inp.dataset.dk, inp.dataset.ek, parseInt(inp.dataset.s), inp.dataset.f, v);
+  queueSync({uid:uid, dk:inp.dataset.dk, ek:inp.dataset.ek, s:parseInt(inp.dataset.s), f:inp.dataset.f, v:v});
+}
+
+function CWO(day, dk) {
+  var uid = VC || CU; var d = GD();
+  if (!d.l[uid]) d.l[uid] = [];
+  d.l[uid].push({date:today(), type:'strength', notes:'Completed: ' + day.focus, loggedAt:new Date().toISOString(), loggedBy:CU});
+  SD(d);
+  if(typeof BBF_SYNC!=='undefined')BBF_SYNC.syncLog(uid,d.l[uid][d.l[uid].length-1]);
+  try { if(dk) sessionStorage.removeItem('bbf_wo_' + dk); } catch(e) {}
+  var stk = STREAK((d.l[uid]||[]).filter(function(l){return l.type!=='note';}));
+  showVictory(_t('app-victory-title','CRUSHED IT!'), day.focus + ' ' + _t('app-victory-complete','Complete'), day.exercises.length + ' ' + _t('app-wo-exercises','exercises') + ' \u2022 ' + _t('app-victory-great','Great work!'));
+  setTimeout(function(){ checkStreakMilestone(stk); checkProgressiveOverload(); }, 600);
+  // Athlete Evolution — update attributes based on workout type
+  if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.processAthleteEvolution) {
+    BBF_SYNC.processAthleteEvolution(uid, day.focus || '');
+    if (stk > 0 && stk % 7 === 0) BBF_SYNC.incrementDiscipline(uid);
+  }
+  RH();
+}
+
+// ─── NUTRITION ────────────────────────────────────────────
+function RN() {
+  var con = document.getElementById('ncon');
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var plan = MP[uid];
+  if (!plan) {
+    con.innerHTML = '<div class="emp"><div class="ei">&#x1F957;</div><div class="et">' + _t('app-nutr-noplan','No meal plan assigned yet') + '</div>' +
+      '<div style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--mut);margin-top:.5rem">' + _t('app-nutr-contact','Contact Akeem to get your plan set up.') + '</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  var todayIdx = new Date().getDay();
+  todayIdx = todayIdx === 0 ? 6 : todayIdx - 1;
+  if (todayIdx >= plan.days.length) todayIdx = 0;
+  var h = ['<div class="dh"><div class="dl">' + plan.name + "'s Plan</div>" +
+    '<div class="dn2" style="font-size:1.3rem">' + plan.cal + '</div>' +
+    '<div class="df2">&#x1F3AF; ' + plan.goal + '</div></div>'];
+  h.push('<div class="dnav" id="nnav">' + plan.days.map(function(day, i) {
+    return '<button class="dbn' + (i === todayIdx ? ' on' : '') + '" onclick="SNDAY(' + i + ')">' + day.day + '</button>';
+  }).join('') + '</div>');
+  h.push('<div id="ndaycon">' + RNDAY(plan, todayIdx) + '</div>');
+  con.innerHTML = h.join('');
+}
+
+function RNDAY(plan, idx) {
+  var day = plan.days[idx];
+  var h = [];
+  day.meals.forEach(function(m) {
+    var isSnack = m.m.toLowerCase().indexOf('snack') > -1 || m.m.toLowerCase().indexOf('merienda') > -1;
+    h.push('<div class="nutr-card' + (isSnack ? ' nutr-snack' : '') + '">' +
+      '<div class="nutr-ml">' + m.m + '</div>' +
+      '<div class="nutr-mi">' + m.i + '</div></div>');
+  });
+  return h.join('');
+}
+
+function SNDAY(i) {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var plan = MP[uid];
+  if (!plan) return;
+  document.querySelectorAll('#nnav .dbn').forEach(function(b, idx) { b.classList.toggle('on', idx === i); });
+  var dc = document.getElementById('ndaycon');
+  if (dc) dc.innerHTML = RNDAY(plan, i);
+}
+
+// ─── LOG ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
+function SAVELOG() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var date = document.getElementById('ld').value;
+  if (!date) { TOAST('Please select a date'); return; }
+  var d = GD();
+  if (!d.l[uid]) d.l[uid] = [];
+  d.l[uid].push({
+    date:date, type:TYPE,
+    dur:document.getElementById('ldur').value || '',
+    intensity:document.getElementById('lint').value || '',
+    wt:document.getElementById('lwt').value || '',
+    bf:document.getElementById('lbf').value || '',
+    notes:document.getElementById('lnotes').value.trim(),
+    mood:MOOD, exercises:EX.slice(),
+    loggedAt:new Date().toISOString(), loggedBy:CU
+  });
+  SD(d);
+  if(typeof BBF_SYNC!=='undefined')BBF_SYNC.syncLog(uid,d.l[uid][d.l[uid].length-1]);
+  EX = []; MOOD = '';
+  ['lnotes','ldur','lint','lwt','lbf'].forEach(function(id) { document.getElementById(id).value = ''; });
+  document.getElementById('exl').innerHTML = '';
+  TOAST('Session logged! &#x1F4AA;');
+  RH();
+  TAB('home');
+}
+
+function ADDEX() {
+  var inp = document.getElementById('exi');
+  var v = inp.value.trim();
+  if (!v) return;
+  EX.push(v); inp.value = ''; REL();
+}
+
+function REL() {
+  document.getElementById('exl').innerHTML = EX.map(function(e, i) {
+    return '<div class="exi"><span>' + e + '</span><button class="exd" data-i="' + i + '">&#x2715;</button></div>';
+  }).join('');
+  document.querySelectorAll('.exd').forEach(function(b) {
+    b.onclick = function() { EX.splice(parseInt(b.dataset.i), 1); REL(); };
+  });
+}
+
+function SAVENOTE() {
+  var uid = VC;
+  if (!uid) { TOAST('Select a client first'); return; }
+  var text = document.getElementById('tnote').value.trim();
+  if (!text) { TOAST('Enter a note first'); return; }
+  var d = GD();
+  if (!d.l[uid]) d.l[uid] = [];
+  d.l[uid].push({date:today(), type:'note', notes:text, loggedBy:'akeem', loggedAt:new Date().toISOString()});
+  SD(d);
+  if(typeof BBF_SYNC!=='undefined')BBF_SYNC.syncLog(uid,d.l[uid][d.l[uid].length-1]);
+  document.getElementById('tnote').value = '';
+  TOAST('Coach note saved &#x2713;');
+  RH();
+}
+
+// ─── PROFILE ──────────────────────────────────────────────
+function RP() {
+  var d = GD();
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var logs = d.l[uid] || [];
+  document.getElementById('pav').textContent = ((u.name || uid || '?')[0]).toUpperCase();
+  document.getElementById('pname').textContent = u.name || uid;
+  document.getElementById('pmeta').textContent = (u.type || '') + (u.role === 'trainer' ? ' · Head Coach' : '');
+  document.getElementById('pgoal').innerHTML = '<strong>Goal:</strong> ' + (u.goal || 'Not set') + (u.gw ? ' · Target: ' + u.gw + ' lbs' : '');
+  document.getElementById('gsub').textContent = u.goal || 'Tap to set';
+  var wl = logs.filter(function(l) { return l.wt; }).map(function(l) { return {d:l.date, v:parseFloat(l.wt)}; }).sort(function(a,b) { return a.d.localeCompare(b.d); });
+  if (wl.length) {
+    var f = wl[0].v, la = wl[wl.length-1].v, diff = (la - f).toFixed(1);
+    document.getElementById('wsc').textContent = la + ' lbs';
+    document.getElementById('wss').textContent = f + ' lbs';
+    var cel = document.getElementById('wsch');
+    cel.textContent = (diff > 0 ? '+' : '') + diff + ' lbs';
+    cel.style.color = diff < 0 ? 'var(--grn)' : diff > 0 ? 'var(--red)' : 'var(--yel)';
+  } else {
+    ['wsc','wss','wsch'].forEach(function(id) { document.getElementById(id).textContent = '—'; });
+  }
+  RCHART(wl);
+}
+
+function RCHART(wl) {
+  var canvas = document.getElementById('wChart');
+  if (WC) { WC.destroy(); WC = null; }
+  if (wl.length < 2) { canvas.style.display = 'none'; return; }
+  canvas.style.display = 'block';
+  if (typeof Chart === 'undefined') return;
+  WC = new Chart(canvas, {
+    type:'line',
+    data:{
+      labels:wl.map(function(l) { return FMT(l.d); }),
+      datasets:[{data:wl.map(function(l) { return l.v; }), borderColor:'#6a0dad', backgroundColor:'rgba(106,13,173,.1)', pointBackgroundColor:'#f5c800', pointRadius:4, tension:.35, fill:true, borderWidth:2}]
+    },
+    options:{responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, plugins:{legend:{display:false}}, scales:{x:{ticks:{color:'#444',font:{size:9}},grid:{color:'#111'}},y:{ticks:{color:'#444',font:{size:9}},grid:{color:'#111'}}}}
+  });
+}
+
+function OPENGOAL() {
+  var d = GD(); var uid = VC || CU; var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  document.getElementById('gg').value = u.goal || '';
+  document.getElementById('ggw').value = u.gw || '';
+  document.getElementById('gmodal').classList.add('on');
+}
+
+function CLOSEGOAL() { document.getElementById('gmodal').classList.remove('on'); }
+
+function SAVEGOAL() {
+  var uid = VC || CU; var d = GD();
+  d.u[uid].goal = document.getElementById('gg').value.trim();
+  d.u[uid].gw   = document.getElementById('ggw').value.trim();
+  SD(d); CLOSEGOAL(); TOAST('Goal updated &#x2713;'); RA();
+}
+
+function LOGOUT() {
+  CU = null; VC = null; EX = []; MOOD = ''; TYPE = 'strength'; PLAN = null; SDAY = 0;
+  if (WC) { WC.destroy(); WC = null; }
+  document.getElementById('trswitch').style.display = 'none';
+  document.getElementById('tnfwrap').style.display = 'none';
+  document.getElementById('u').value = '';
+  document.getElementById('p').value = '';
+  document.getElementById('lmsg').textContent = '';
+  TAB('home');
+  SS('auth');
+}

+// ─── WIRE UP ALL BUTTONS (after DOM is ready) ─────────────

+// ─── PERSONA PROTOCOL BADGE ───────────────────────────────────────
+var PROTOCOLS = {
+  '9to5':            { icon:'&#x1F4BC;', label:"WORKING MAN'S PROTOCOL ACTIVE", color:'#22c55e' },
+  'standard':        { icon:'&#x1F4CB;', label:'STANDARD PROTOCOL ACTIVE',   color:'#f5c800' },
+  'shifts':          { icon:'&#x26A1;',  label:'HIGH-DEMAND ATHLETE ACTIVE',  color:'#f5c800' },
+  '12hr':            { icon:'&#x26A1;',  label:'HIGH-DEMAND ATHLETE ACTIVE',  color:'#f5c800' },
+  'overnight':       { icon:'&#x1F319;', label:'SHIFT SPECIALIST ACTIVE',     color:'#8b1abf' },
+  'executive':       { icon:'&#x1F454;', label:'EXECUTIVE PROTOCOL ACTIVE',   color:'#f5c800' },
+  'medical':         { icon:'&#x1FA7A;', label:'HEALTHCARE PROTOCOL ACTIVE',  color:'#3b82f6' },
+  'first-responder': { icon:'&#x1F6A8;', label:'TACTICAL ATHLETE ACTIVE',     color:'#ef4444' },
+  'parent':          { icon:'&#x1F46A;', label:'FAMILY WARRIOR PROTOCOL',     color:'#22c55e' }
+};
+
+function renderProtocolBadge(uid) {
+  var d = GD(); var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var sch = u.schedule || (CLIENT_META[uid] && CLIENT_META[uid].schedule) || 'standard';
+  var proto = PROTOCOLS[sch] || PROTOCOLS['standard'];
+  var badge = document.getElementById('protocol-badge');
+  var icon  = document.getElementById('protocol-icon');
+  var lbl   = document.getElementById('protocol-label');
+  if (!badge) return;
+  badge.style.display   = 'flex';
+  badge.style.borderColor = proto.color + '44';
+  badge.style.background  = proto.color + '11';
+  if (icon) icon.innerHTML = proto.icon;
+  if (lbl)  { lbl.textContent = proto.label; lbl.style.color = proto.color; }
+}
+
+// ─── VIDEO VAULT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
+var VAULT_MODULES = [
+  {
+    id: 1,
+    title: 'The Human Performance Foundation',
+    desc: 'Who this program is built for and why standard fitness advice fails high-demand professionals.',
+    duration: '18 min',
+    locked: false,
+    tag: 'Mindset',
+    tag_icon: '&#x1F9E0;',
+    bg: 'linear-gradient(135deg,#1e0338,#4a0880)',
+    src: ''  // Drop your DJI Osmo MP4 URL here
+  },
+  {
+    id: 2,

+var vaultProgress = 0;
+
+function switchVaultTab(tab) {
+  var progPane   = document.getElementById('vault-program-pane');
+  var vaultPane  = document.getElementById('vault-masterclass-pane');
+  var vtabProg   = document.getElementById('vtab-prog');
+  var vtabVault  = document.getElementById('vtab-vault');
+  var dnav       = document.getElementById('dnav');
+  var overload   = document.getElementById('overload-banner');
+  if (tab === 'vault') {
+    if (progPane)  progPane.style.display  = 'none';
+    if (vaultPane) vaultPane.style.display = 'block';
+    if (vtabProg)  vtabProg.classList.remove('on');
+    if (vtabVault) vtabVault.classList.add('on');
+    renderVaultGrid();
+  } else {
+    if (progPane)  progPane.style.display  = 'block';
+    if (vaultPane) vaultPane.style.display = 'none';
+    if (vtabProg)  vtabProg.classList.add('on');
+    if (vtabVault) vtabVault.classList.remove('on');
+  }
+}
+
+function renderVaultGrid() {
+  var grid = document.getElementById('vault-grid');
+  if (!grid) return;
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD(); var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var watched = u.vault_watched || [];
+  var completed = watched.length;
+  vaultProgress = VAULT_MODULES.length > 0 ? Math.round((completed / VAULT_MODULES.length) * 100) : 0;
+  var fill = document.getElementById('vault-fill');
+  var pct  = document.getElementById('vault-pct');
+  if (fill) fill.style.width = vaultProgress + '%';
+  if (pct)  pct.textContent = vaultProgress + '% Complete';
+
+  grid.innerHTML = VAULT_MODULES.map(function(m) {
+    var isWatched  = watched.indexOf(m.id) > -1;
+    var stateClass = m.locked ? 'locked' : 'unlocked';
+    var playHtml   = m.locked
+      ? '<div class="module-lock">&#x1F512;</div>'
+      : '<div class="module-play"><div class="module-play-icon"></div></div>';
+    var watchedBadge = isWatched
+      ? '<div style="position:absolute;top:.5rem;right:.6rem;z-index:3;background:rgba(34,197,94,.85);border-radius:50%;width:22px;height:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.7rem">&#x2713;</div>'
+      : '';
+    return '<div class="module-card ' + stateClass + '" onclick="openModule(' + m.id + ')">' +
+      '<div class="module-thumb" style="background:' + m.bg + '">' +
+        '<div class="module-num">MODULE ' + m.id + '</div>' +
+        playHtml +
+        watchedBadge +
+        '<div class="module-dur">' + m.duration + '</div>' +
+      '</div>' +
+      '<div class="module-info">' +
+        '<div class="module-title">' + m.title + '</div>' +
+        '<div class="module-desc">' + m.desc + '</div>' +
+        '<div class="module-tag">' + m.tag_icon + ' ' + m.tag + '</div>' +
+      '</div>' +
+    '</div>';
+  }).join('');
+  // Render Busy Parent guide card based on tier
+  var statusEl = document.getElementById('parent-guide-status');
+  var actionEl = document.getElementById('parent-guide-action');
+  if (statusEl && actionEl) {
+    var tier = (d.u[uid] && d.u[uid].type) || 'Essentials';
+    var isUnlocked = (tier === 'Platinum' || tier === 'Trainer' || uid === 'akeem');
+    if (isUnlocked) {
+      statusEl.textContent = 'Included with your ' + tier + ' tier';
+      actionEl.innerHTML = '<a href="busy-parent-transformation.html" style="font-family:var(--hb);font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:2px;background:var(--yel);color:var(--blk);padding:.45rem 1rem;border-radius:8px;text-decoration:none">OPEN</a>';
+    } else {
+      statusEl.textContent = 'Upgrade to Elite or Legacy to unlock';
+      actionEl.innerHTML = '<span style="font-size:1.2rem">&#x1F512;</span>';
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+function openModule(id) {
+  var m = VAULT_MODULES.find(function(x){ return x.id === id; });
+  if (!m) return;
+  if (m.locked) {
+    TOAST('&#x1F512; Unlock with the 8-Week Elite Challenge');
+    return;
+  }
+  var wrap  = document.getElementById('video-player-wrap');
+  var video = document.getElementById('vault-video');
+  var ph    = document.getElementById('video-ph-txt');
+  var phContainer = document.querySelector('.video-player-ph');
+  if (!wrap) return;
+  wrap.classList.add('on');
+  wrap.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
+  if (m.src) {
+    if (video) { video.src = m.src; video.style.display = 'block'; }
+    if (phContainer) phContainer.style.display = 'none';
+  } else {
+    // Placeholder state
+    if (video) video.style.display = 'none';
+    if (phContainer) phContainer.style.display = 'block';
+    if (ph) ph.textContent = m.title + ' — Upload your DJI footage to activate';
+  }
+  // Mark as watched
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD(); var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  if (!u.vault_watched) u.vault_watched = [];
+  if (u.vault_watched.indexOf(id) === -1) {
+    u.vault_watched.push(id);
+    d.u[uid] = u; SD(d);
+    renderVaultGrid();
+  }
+}
+
+function closeVideoPlayer() {
+  var wrap  = document.getElementById('video-player-wrap');
+  var video = document.getElementById('vault-video');
+  if (wrap)  wrap.classList.remove('on');
+  if (video) { video.pause(); video.src = ''; }
+}
+
+// ─── LANGUAGE STATE ───────────────────────────────────────────────
+var LANG = 'en';
+function setLang(l) {
+  LANG = l;
+  // Sync with global BBF lang engine — translate all data-lang-key elements
+  if (window.BBF_LANG && window.BBF_LANG.get() !== l) window.BBF_LANG.set(l);
+  else if (window.BBF_LANG) window.BBF_LANG.apply();
+  // Re-render prehab and active tab to refresh dynamic trilingual content
+  renderPrehab();
+  var activeTab = document.querySelector('.tp.on');
+  if (activeTab) {
+    var tabId = activeTab.id.replace('tp-', '');
+    if (tabId === 'home') RH();
+    if (tabId === 'workout') RW();
+    if (tabId === 'nutrition') RN();
+    if (tabId === 'profile') { PTAB('overview'); }
+  }
+}
+
+// ─── PERSONA DISPLAY & STRESS MODE ───────────────────────────────
+var STRESS_MODE = 'auto'; // auto | desk | standing | mixed
+
+function renderPersonaBadge(uid) {
+  var p = getPersona(uid);
+  var badge = document.getElementById('persona-badge');
+  var psub  = document.getElementById('persona-sub');
+  if (badge) badge.innerHTML = p.icon + ' ' + p.tag;
+  if (psub)  psub.textContent = p.label;
+}
+
+function updateStressToggleUI(type) {
+  var map = {desk:'st-desk', standing:'st-stand', mixed:'st-mixed'};
+  ['st-desk','st-stand','st-mixed'].forEach(function(id) {
+    var el = document.getElementById(id);
+    if (!el) return;
+    var isOn = map[type] === id;
+    el.style.background = isOn ? 'var(--pur)' : 'transparent';
+    el.style.color = isOn ? 'var(--yel)' : 'var(--mut2)';
+  });
+  var lbl = document.getElementById('stress-mode-lbl');
+  if (lbl) {
+    var labels = {desk:'Desk / Sitting Protocol active',
+                  standing:'Standing / Shift Protocol active',
+                  mixed:'Mixed Load Protocol active'};
+    lbl.textContent = labels[type] || 'Tap to set your recovery protocol';
+  }
+}
+
+function toggleStressMode() {
+  // Cycle through modes or let user pick — cycles on tap
+  var order = ['desk','standing','mixed'];
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD(); var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var current = u.stress_mode || getPersona(uid).type;
+  var next = order[(order.indexOf(current) + 1) % order.length];
+  d.u[uid].stress_mode = next;
+  SD(d);
+  STRESS_MODE = next;
+  updateStressToggleUI(next);
+  // Update prehab tab if visible
+  var prehabPane = document.getElementById('tp-prehab');
+  if (prehabPane && prehabPane.classList.contains('on')) renderPrehab();
+  TOAST(({desk:'Desk protocol',standing:'Shift protocol',mixed:'Mixed protocol'}[next]||'Protocol') + ' activated');
+}
+
+function openPersonaModal() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD(); var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var current = u.schedule || 'standard';
+  document.querySelectorAll('#persona-chips .chip').forEach(function(b) {
+    b.classList.toggle('on', b.dataset.v === current);
+  });
+  document.getElementById('persona-modal').classList.add('on');
+}
+
+function closePersonaModal() {
+  document.getElementById('persona-modal').classList.remove('on');
+}
+
+function savePersona() {
+  var selected = document.querySelector('#persona-chips .chip.on');
+  if (!selected) { closePersonaModal(); return; }
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD();
+  d.u[uid].schedule = selected.dataset.v;
+  // Auto-set stress mode from persona type
+  var p = PERSONAS[selected.dataset.v] || PERSONAS['standard'];
+  d.u[uid].stress_mode = p.type;
+  SD(d);
+  STRESS_MODE = p.type;
+  closePersonaModal();
+  renderPersonaBadge(uid);
+  updateStressToggleUI(p.type);
+  TOAST('Profile updated — ' + p.tag + ' &#x2713;');
+  RA();
+}
+
+// Override renderPrehab to use stress mode
+var _originalRenderPrehab = renderPrehab;
+renderPrehab = function() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var d = GD(); var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var stressType = u.stress_mode || getPersona(uid).type;
+  STRESS_MODE = stressType;
+  updateStressToggleUI(stressType);
+  _originalRenderPrehab();
+  // Append stress-specific cues below OT prehab
+  var con = document.getElementById('prehab-cues');
+  if (!con) return;
+  var rc = RECOVERY_CUES[stressType] || RECOVERY_CUES['desk'];
+  var L = LANG || 'en';
+  var rcLabel = (typeof rc.label === 'object') ? (rc.label[L] || rc.label.en) : rc.label;
+  var html = '<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--purp),var(--purd));border-radius:16px;padding:1.3rem;margin-top:1rem">' +
+    '<div style="font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-bottom:.5rem">&#x1F9E0; ' + rcLabel.toUpperCase() + '</div>';
+  rc.cues.forEach(function(c) {
+    var cTitle = (typeof c.title === 'object') ? (c.title[L] || c.title.en) : c.title;
+    var cDesc = (typeof c.desc === 'object') ? (c.desc[L] || c.desc.en) : c.desc;
+    html += '<div style="background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:10px;padding:.8rem 1rem;margin-bottom:.6rem">' +
+      '<div style="font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--yel);margin-bottom:.3rem">' + cTitle + '</div>' +
+      '<div style="font-size:.83rem;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);line-height:1.6">' + cDesc + '</div></div>';
+  });
+  html += '</div>';
+  con.innerHTML += html;
+};

+var DAILY_EN = '&#x1F305; Morning (3 min): Cat-cow x10, glute bridge x15, ankle circles x10 each.<br>&#x1F3CB; Pre-Workout (2 min): Wall slides x10, 90/90 hip x30s each side.<br>&#x1F634; Post-Shift (5 min): Childs pose 60s, prayer stretch 30s, single-leg balance 30s each.<br>&#x26A1; Weekly: Add band external rotation on upper-body days. +var DAILY_ES = '&#x1F305; Mañana (3 min): Gato-vaca x10, puente de glúteos x15, círculos de tobillo x10 cada uno.<br>&#x1F3CB; Pre-Entrenamiento (2 min): Deslizamientos en pared x10, 90/90 cadera x30s cada lado.<br>&#x1F634; Post-Turno (5 min): Postura del niño 60s, estiramiento de rezo 30s, equilibrio en una pierna 30s cada uno.<br>&#x26A1; Semanal: Rotación externa con banda en días de tren superior. Obligatorio.';

+function renderPrehab() {
+  var con = document.getElementById('prehab-cues');
+  var dp  = document.getElementById('daily-protocol');
+  if (!con || !dp) return;
+  dp.innerHTML = LANG === 'pt' ? (typeof DAILY_PT!=='undefined'?DAILY_PT:DAILY_EN) : LANG === 'es' ? DAILY_ES : DAILY_EN;
+  con.innerHTML = PREHAB.map(function(p, pi) {
+    var title = LANG === 'pt' ? (p.pt_title||p.en_title) : LANG === 'es' ? p.es_title : p.en_title;
+    var focus = LANG === 'pt' ? (p.pt_focus||p.en_focus) : LANG === 'es' ? p.es_focus : p.en_focus;
+    var cuesHtml = p.cues.map(function(c) {
+      var lbl = LANG === 'pt' ? (c.pt_lbl||c.en_lbl) : LANG === 'es' ? c.es_lbl : c.en_lbl;
+      var txt = LANG === 'pt' ? (c.pt_txt||c.en_txt) : LANG === 'es' ? c.es_txt : c.en_txt;
+      return '<div class="prehab-cue"><div class="prehab-cue-lbl">' + lbl + '</div><div class="prehab-cue-txt">' + txt + '</div></div>';
+    }).join('');
+    var setsHtml = p.sets.map(function(s) { return '<div class="pset">' + s + '</div>'; }).join('');
+    return '<div class="prehab-card">' +
+      '<div class="prehab-hdr" onclick="togglePrehab(' + pi + ')">' +
+      '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.7rem;flex:1">' +
+      '<div class="prehab-icon">' + p.icon + '</div>' +
+      '<div><div class="prehab-title">' + title + '</div><div class="prehab-focus">' + focus + '</div></div>' +
+      '</div><div class="ec" id="prehab-ec-' + pi + '">▾</div></div>' +
+      '<div class="prehab-body" id="prehab-body-' + pi + '">' +
+      cuesHtml +
+      '<div class="prehab-sets" style="margin-top:.8rem">' + setsHtml + '</div>' +
+      '</div></div>';
+  }).join('');
+}
+function togglePrehab(i) {
+  var body = document.getElementById('prehab-body-' + i);
+  var ec   = document.getElementById('prehab-ec-' + i);
+  if (!body) return;
+  body.classList.toggle('on');
+  ec.classList.toggle('on');
+}

+
+function getPersona(uid) {
+  var d = GD();
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var sch = u.schedule || (CLIENT_META[uid] && CLIENT_META[uid].schedule) || 'standard';
+  return PERSONAS[sch] || PERSONAS['standard'];
+}
+
+function getRecoveryCues(uid) {
+  var p = getPersona(uid);
+  return RECOVERY_CUES[p.type] || RECOVERY_CUES['desk'];
+}
+
+
+document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
+
+  // Splash
+  document.getElementById('ebtn').onclick = function() { SS('auth'); };
+
+  // Sign In button — wire LOGIN
+  var sbtn = document.getElementById('signin-btn');
+  if (sbtn) sbtn.onclick = LOGIN;
+
+  // PIN field — Enter key triggers login
+  var pField = document.getElementById('p');
+  if (pField) pField.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter') LOGIN(); });
+
+  // Username field — Enter key moves to PIN
+  var uField = document.getElementById('u');
+  if (uField) uField.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key==='Enter'){ var p=document.getElementById('p'); if(p) p.focus(); } });
+
+  // Auth tabs
+  document.getElementById('tab-si').onclick = function() {
+    document.getElementById('tab-si').classList.add('on');
+    document.getElementById('tab-nc').classList.remove('on');
+    document.getElementById('pane-si').style.display = '';
+    document.getElementById('pane-nc').style.display = 'none';
+  };
+  document.getElementById('tab-nc').onclick = function() {
+    document.getElementById('tab-nc').classList.add('on');
+    document.getElementById('tab-si').classList.remove('on');
+    document.getElementById('pane-nc').style.display = '';
+    document.getElementById('pane-si').style.display = 'none';
+  };
+
+  // Sign In
+  document.getElementById('signin-btn').onclick = LOGIN;
+  document.getElementById('p').onkeydown = function(e) { if (e.key === 'Enter') LOGIN(); };
+  document.getElementById('u').onkeydown = function(e) { if (e.key === 'Enter') document.getElementById('p').focus(); };
+
+  // Register
+  document.getElementById('register-btn').onclick = REGISTER;
+
+  // Nav buttons
+  document.querySelectorAll('.nv').forEach(function(b) {
+    b.onclick = function() { TAB(b.dataset.tab); };
+  });
+
+  // Topbar avatar
+  document.getElementById('tbav').onclick = function() { TAB('profile'); };
+
+  // Quick actions
+  document.getElementById('qa-w').onclick = function() { TAB('workout'); };
+  document.getElementById('qa-l').onclick = function() { TAB('log'); };
+  document.getElementById('qa-n').onclick = function() { TAB('nutrition'); };
+  document.getElementById('qa-p').onclick = function() { TAB('profile'); };
+
+  // Log
+  document.getElementById('savelog-btn').onclick = SAVELOG;
+  document.getElementById('addex-btn').onclick = ADDEX;
+  document.getElementById('exi').onkeydown = function(e) { if (e.key === 'Enter') ADDEX(); };
+
+  document.querySelectorAll('.tc3').forEach(function(c) {
+    c.onclick = function() {
+      document.querySelectorAll('.tc3').forEach(function(x) { x.classList.remove('on'); });
+      c.classList.add('on'); TYPE = c.dataset.t;
+    };
+  });
+
+  document.querySelectorAll('.mc2').forEach(function(c) {
+    c.onclick = function() {
+      document.querySelectorAll('.mc2').forEach(function(x) { x.classList.remove('on'); });
+      c.classList.add('on'); MOOD = c.dataset.m;
+    };
+  });
+
+  // Trainer note
+  document.getElementById('note-btn').onclick = SAVENOTE;
+
+  // Profile
+  document.getElementById('goal-btn').onclick = OPENGOAL;
+  var pbtn = document.getElementById('persona-btn');
+  if (pbtn) pbtn.onclick = openPersonaModal;
+  document.getElementById('persona-modal').onclick = function(e) {
+    if (e.target === this) closePersonaModal();
+  };
+  document.querySelectorAll('#persona-chips .chip').forEach(function(b) {
+    b.onclick = function() {
+      document.querySelectorAll('#persona-chips .chip').forEach(function(x) { x.classList.remove('on'); });
+      b.classList.add('on');
+    };
+  });
+  // Stress toggle buttons
+  ['desk','standing','mixed'].forEach(function(type, i) {
+    var el = document.getElementById(['st-desk','st-stand','st-mixed'][i]);
+    if (el) el.onclick = function() {
+      var uid = VC || CU; var d = GD();
+      d.u[uid].stress_mode = type; SD(d);
+      STRESS_MODE = type;
+      updateStressToggleUI(type);
+      var prehabPane = document.getElementById('tp-prehab');
+      if (prehabPane && prehabPane.classList.contains('on')) renderPrehab();
+      TOAST(({desk:'Desk protocol',standing:'Shift protocol',mixed:'Mixed protocol'}[type]) + ' activated');
+    };
+  });
+  document.getElementById('logout-btn').onclick = LOGOUT;
+  document.getElementById('goal-save').onclick = SAVEGOAL;
+  document.getElementById('goal-cancel').onclick = CLOSEGOAL;
+  document.getElementById('v-close').onclick = closeVictory;
+  document.getElementById('victory-modal').onclick = function(e){if(e.target===this)closeVictory();};
+  document.getElementById('gmodal').onclick = function(e) {
+    if (e.target === this) CLOSEGOAL();
+  };
+
+  // Date default
+  document.getElementById('ld').value = today();
+});
+
+
+// ─── PROGRESS ANALYTICS ─────────────────────────────────────────────
+var BFC = null; // body fat chart
+
+function PTAB(name) {
+  ['overview','sessions','strength','body'].forEach(function(n) {
+    var el = document.getElementById('pt-' + n);
+    if (el) el.style.display = n === name ? '' : 'none';
+  });
+  document.querySelectorAll('.ptb').forEach(function(b, i) {
+    b.classList.toggle('on', ['overview','sessions','strength','body'][i] === name);
+  });
+  if (name === 'overview')  renderOverview();
+  if (name === 'sessions')  renderSessions();
+  if (name === 'strength')  renderStrength();
+  if (name === 'body')      renderBody();
+}
+
+function renderOverview() {
+  var d = GD();
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var logs = (d.l[uid] || []).filter(function(l) { return l.type !== 'note'; });
+
+  // All-time stats
+  var total = logs.length;
+  var now = new Date();
+  var weekStart = new Date(now); weekStart.setDate(now.getDate() - now.getDay());
+  var monthStart = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1);
+
+  var weekCount = logs.filter(function(l) { return new Date(l.date + 'T12:00:00') >= weekStart; }).length;
+  var monthCount = logs.filter(function(l) { return new Date(l.date + 'T12:00:00') >= monthStart; }).length;
+
+  // Streak calculation
+  var dates = [];
+  var seen = {};
+  logs.forEach(function(l) { if (!seen[l.date]) { seen[l.date] = 1; dates.push(l.date); } });
+  dates.sort().reverse();
+
+  var streak = 0, cur = new Date();
+  for (var i = 0; i < dates.length; i++) {
+    var dd = new Date(dates[i] + 'T12:00:00');
+    if (Math.round((cur - dd) / 86400000) <= 1) { streak++; cur = dd; } else break;
+  }
+
+  // Best streak
+  var allDates = dates.slice().reverse();
+  var bestStreak = 0, tmpStreak = 0, prevDate = null;
+  allDates.forEach(function(dt) {
+    var dd = new Date(dt + 'T12:00:00');
+    if (prevDate) {
+      var diff = Math.round((dd - prevDate) / 86400000);
+      if (diff <= 1) tmpStreak++;
+      else { bestStreak = Math.max(bestStreak, tmpStreak); tmpStreak = 1; }
+    } else { tmpStreak = 1; }
+    prevDate = dd;
+  });
+  bestStreak = Math.max(bestStreak, tmpStreak);
+
+  // Avg per week
+  var avgWeek = 0;
+  if (total > 0 && allDates.length > 0) {
+    var firstDate = new Date(allDates[0] + 'T12:00:00');
+    var weeks = Math.max(1, Math.ceil((now - firstDate) / (7 * 86400000)));
+    avgWeek = (total / weeks).toFixed(1);
+  }
+
+  document.getElementById('an-total').textContent = total;
+  document.getElementById('an-streak').textContent = streak;
+  document.getElementById('an-week').textContent = weekCount;
+  document.getElementById('an-month').textContent = monthCount;
+  document.getElementById('an-best').textContent = bestStreak;
+  document.getElementById('an-avg').textContent = avgWeek;
+
+  // Bar chart - last 10 sessions
+  renderBarChart(logs);
+
+  // Heatmap - last 30 days
+  renderHeatmap(seen);
+
+  // Muscle groups
+  renderMuscles(d, uid);
+}
+
+function renderBarChart(logs) {
+  var last10 = logs.slice(-10);
+  var bc = document.getElementById('an-barchart');
+  if (!last10.length) {
+    bc.innerHTML = '<div class="emp" style="padding:1rem"><div class="et">Log sessions to see your chart</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  var maxDur = Math.max.apply(null, last10.map(function(l) { return parseInt(l.dur) || 30; }));
+  var bars = last10.map(function(l) {
+    var dur = parseInt(l.dur) || 30;
+    var h = Math.max(8, Math.round((dur / maxDur) * 46));
+    var typeColors = {strength:'var(--pur)', cardio:'var(--grn)', hiit:'var(--red)', mobility:'var(--blu)', rest:'var(--mut)'};
+    var col = typeColors[l.type] || 'var(--pur)';
+    return '<div class="rbar" style="height:' + h + 'px;background:' + col + '">' +
+      '<div class="rbar-tip">' + (l.dur ? l.dur + ' min' : l.type) + '</div></div>';
+  }).join('');
+  var labels = last10.map(function(l) {
+    return '<div class="rbar-lbl">' + FMT(l.date).split(' ')[0].slice(0,3) + '</div>';
+  }).join('');
+  bc.innerHTML = '<div class="recent-bar">' + bars + '</div><div class="rbar-labels">' + labels + '</div>';
+}
+
+function renderHeatmap(seen) {
+  var hm = document.getElementById('an-heatmap');
+  var dots = '';
+  var t = today();
+  for (var i = 29; i >= 0; i--) {
+    var d2 = new Date(); d2.setDate(d2.getDate() - i);
+    var ds = d2.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
+    var cls = ds === t ? 'streak-dot today' : (seen[ds] ? 'streak-dot done' : 'streak-dot');
+    dots += '<div class="' + cls + '" title="' + FMT(ds) + '"></div>';
+  }
+  hm.innerHTML = dots;
+}
+
+function renderMuscles(d, uid) {
+  var ml = document.getElementById('an-muscles');
+  var wl = d.w[uid] || {};
+  var plan = PLAN;
+  if (!plan || !Object.keys(wl).length) {
+    ml.innerHTML = '<div class="emp" style="padding:.5rem;grid-column:span 2"><div class="et" style="font-size:.72rem">Log workouts to see breakdown</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  var groups = {};
+  Object.keys(wl).forEach(function(dk) {
+    var dayIdx = parseInt(dk.split('_d')[1]);
+    if (plan[dayIdx] && !plan[dayIdx].isRest) {
+      var focus = plan[dayIdx].focus;
+      groups[focus] = (groups[focus] || 0) + 1;
+    }
+  });
+  var sorted = Object.entries(groups).sort(function(a, b) { return b[1] - a[1]; }).slice(0, 6);
+  if (!sorted.length) {
+    ml.innerHTML = '<div class="emp" style="padding:.5rem;grid-column:span 2"><div class="et" style="font-size:.72rem">Log workouts to see breakdown</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  ml.innerHTML = sorted.map(function(e) {
+    return '<div class="muscle-item"><span class="muscle-name">' + e[0] + '</span><span class="muscle-count">' + e[1] + 'x</span></div>';
+  }).join('');
+}
+
+function renderSessions() {
+  var d = GD();
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var logs = (d.l[uid] || []).filter(function(l) { return l.type !== 'note'; }).slice().reverse();
+  var el = document.getElementById('an-session-list');
+  if (!logs.length) {
+    el.innerHTML = '<div class="emp"><div class="ei">&#x1F3CB;</div><div class="et">No sessions logged yet</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  el.innerHTML = logs.map(function(l) {
+    return '<div class="ri" style="flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:.3rem;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:.5rem">' +
+      '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;width:100%;align-items:center">' +
+      '<div><div class="rd">' + FMT(l.date) + '</div><div class="rt2">' + TL(l.type) + '</div></div>' +
+      '<div class="rv">' + (l.dur ? l.dur + 'm' : '') + '</div></div>' +
+      (l.notes ? '<div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#888;line-height:1.4">' + l.notes + '</div>' : '') +
+      (l.mood ? '<div style="font-size:.68rem;color:var(--yel);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px">' + l.mood + '</div>' : '') +
+      '</div>';
+  }).join('');
+}
+
+function renderStrength() {
+  var d = GD();
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var wl = d.w[uid] || {};
+  var el = document.getElementById('an-strength-content');
+  if (!Object.keys(wl).length) {
+    el.innerHTML = '<div class="emp"><div class="ei">&#x1F4AA;</div><div class="et">Log workouts with weights to track strength</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  // Find best sets across all exercises
+  var exBests = {};
+  Object.keys(wl).forEach(function(dk) {
+    var dayData = wl[dk];
+    Object.keys(dayData).forEach(function(ek) {
+      var sets = dayData[ek];
+      sets.forEach(function(s) {
+        if (s.w) {
+          var dayIdx = parseInt(dk.split('_d')[1]);
+          var exIdx = parseInt(ek.split('_')[1]);
+          var exName = (PLAN && PLAN[dayIdx] && PLAN[dayIdx].exercises && PLAN[dayIdx].exercises[exIdx])
+            ? PLAN[dayIdx].exercises[exIdx].name : 'Exercise ' + exIdx;
+          var wt = parseFloat(s.w);
+          if (!exBests[exName] || wt > exBests[exName]) exBests[exName] = wt;
+        }
+      });
+    });
+  });
+  var entries = Object.entries(exBests).sort(function(a, b) { return b[1] - a[1]; });
+  if (!entries.length) {
+    el.innerHTML = '<div class="emp"><div class="ei">&#x1F4AA;</div><div class="et">No weight data logged yet</div></div>';
+    return;
+  }
+  el.innerHTML = '<div style="margin-bottom:.5rem;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mut)">Personal Bests</div>' +
+    entries.map(function(e) {
+      return '<div class="muscle-item" style="margin-bottom:.4rem"><span class="muscle-name" style="font-size:.8rem">' + e[0] + '</span>' +
+        '<span class="muscle-count">' + e[1] + ' lbs</span></div>';
+    }).join('');
+}
+
+function renderBody() {
+  var d = GD();
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+  var logs = d.l[uid] || [];
+
+  // Weight
+  var wl = logs.filter(function(l) { return l.wt; }).map(function(l) { return {d:l.date, v:parseFloat(l.wt)}; }).sort(function(a,b) { return a.d.localeCompare(b.d); });
+  if (wl.length) {
+    var f = wl[0].v, la = wl[wl.length-1].v, diff = (la - f).toFixed(1);
+    document.getElementById('wsc').textContent = la + ' lbs';
+    document.getElementById('wss').textContent = f + ' lbs';
+    var cel = document.getElementById('wsch');
+    cel.textContent = (diff > 0 ? '+' : '') + diff + ' lbs';
+    cel.style.color = diff < 0 ? 'var(--grn)' : diff > 0 ? 'var(--red)' : 'var(--yel)';
+  } else {
+    ['wsc','wss','wsch'].forEach(function(id) { document.getElementById(id).textContent = '—'; });
+  }
+  RCHART(wl);
+
+  // Body fat chart
+  var bfl = logs.filter(function(l) { return l.bf; }).map(function(l) { return {d:l.date, v:parseFloat(l.bf)}; }).sort(function(a,b) { return a.d.localeCompare(b.d); });
+  renderBFChart(bfl);
+}
+
+function renderBFChart(bfl) {
+  var canvas = document.getElementById('bfChart');
+  var empty = document.getElementById('bf-empty');
+  if (BFC) { BFC.destroy(); BFC = null; }
+  if (bfl.length < 2) {
+    canvas.style.display = 'none';
+    if (empty) empty.style.display = '';
+    return;
+  }
+  if (empty) empty.style.display = 'none';
+  canvas.style.display = 'block';
+  if (typeof Chart === 'undefined') return;
+  BFC = new Chart(canvas, {
+    type:'line',
+    data:{
+      labels:bfl.map(function(l) { return FMT(l.d); }),
+      datasets:[{data:bfl.map(function(l) { return l.v; }), borderColor:'#3b82f6', backgroundColor:'rgba(59,130,246,.1)', pointBackgroundColor:'#f5c800', pointRadius:4, tension:.35, fill:true, borderWidth:2}]
+    },
+    options:{responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, plugins:{legend:{display:false}}, scales:{x:{ticks:{color:'#444',font:{size:9}},grid:{color:'#111'}},y:{ticks:{color:'#444',font:{size:9},callback:function(v){return v+'%'}},grid:{color:'#111'}}}}
+  });
+}
+
+function SAVEMETRICS() {
+  var uid = VC || CU;
+  var wt = document.getElementById('metric-wt').value;
+  var bf = document.getElementById('metric-bf').value;
+  if (!wt && !bf) { TOAST('Enter weight or body fat % to save'); return; }
+  var d = GD();
+  if (!d.l[uid]) d.l[uid] = [];
+  d.l[uid].push({date:today(), type:'metrics', wt:wt||'', bf:bf||'', notes:'Body metrics logged', loggedAt:new Date().toISOString(), loggedBy:uid});
+  SD(d);
+  if(typeof BBF_SYNC!=='undefined')BBF_SYNC.syncLog(uid,d.l[uid][d.l[uid].length-1]);
+  document.getElementById('metric-wt').value = '';
+  document.getElementById('metric-bf').value = '';
+  TOAST('Metrics saved! \u2713');
+  renderBody();
+}

+// ─── VICTORY & CONFETTI ─────────────────────────────────────────
+function launchConfetti(){
+  var colors=['#f5c800','#6a0dad','#8b1abf','#ffffff','#ffe033','#4a0880'];
+  var wrap=document.getElementById('cf-wrap'); wrap.innerHTML='';
+  for(var i=0;i<55;i++){(function(idx){setTimeout(function(){
+    var p=document.createElement('div'); p.className='cfp';
+    p.style.cssText='left:'+Math.random()*100+'vw;background:'+colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)]+';width:'+(6+Math.random()*7)+'px;height:'+(6+Math.random()*7)+'px;animation-duration:'+(1.4+Math.random()*2)+'s;animation-delay:'+(Math.random()*.4)+'s;border-radius:'+(Math.random()>.5?'50%':'2px');
+    wrap.appendChild(p); setTimeout(function(){p.remove();},3500);
+  },idx*25);})(i);}
+}

+  document.getElementById('v-sub').textContent=sub;
+  document.getElementById('v-dets').textContent=dets||'';
+  document.getElementById('victory-modal').classList.add('on');
+  launchConfetti();
