+<div class="section-tag" data-lang-key="bpt-guide-tag">Inside the Guide</div>
+<h2 class="section-title" data-lang-key="bpt-guide-h">Everything Built<br><span class="yellow">Around Your Life,</span><br>Not Despite It</h2>
+<p style="color:var(--muted);max-width:620px;margin-bottom:40px;" data-lang-key="bpt-guide-sub">No 5am wake-up mandates. No 2-hour sessions. No meal-prep Sundays that require a second kitchen. Just an intelligent system that fits inside the life you already have.</p>
+<div class="guide-block"><div class="guide-block-header"><div class="guide-num">01</div><div><h3>The Caregiver Mindset</h3><p>Reframing the psychology of fitness when everyone else comes first</p></div></div><div class="guide-block-body"><p>The biggest lie sold to parents is that taking care of yourself is selfish. We dismantle that. When you are physically strong, mentally resilient, and energized &mdash; everyone around you wins.</p></div></div>
+<div class="guide-block"><div class="guide-block-header"><div class="guide-num">02</div><div><h3>The 4-Week Progressive Program</h3><p>Foundation &rarr; Build &rarr; Intensify &rarr; Peak &mdash; designed for unpredictable schedules</p></div></div><div class="guide-block-body"><p>Every week has a specific goal, specific loading protocol, and built-in flexibility for the week that does not go as planned &mdash; because it never does.</p></div></div>
+<div class="guide-block"><div class="guide-block-header"><div class="guide-num">03</div><div><h3>The 3-Day MED Split</h3><p>Minimum Effective Dose training &mdash; elite results in 3 sessions per week</p></div></div><div class="guide-block-body"><p>Three sessions per week, each under 60 minutes, with every exercise chosen for maximum compound return. Quality beats volume every time when time is your scarcest resource.</p></div></div>
+<div class="guide-block"><div class="guide-block-header"><div class="guide-num">04</div><div><h3>The 16/8 Parent-Optimized IF Protocol</h3><p>Intermittent fasting windows mapped to a parent's real daily rhythm</p></div></div><div class="guide-block-body"><p>Morning routines, school drop-offs, work hours, after-school activities, dinner time &mdash; your eating window anchors to your actual day. Includes chaos week emergency plan.</p></div></div>
+<div class="guide-block"><div class="guide-block-header"><div class="guide-num">05</div><div><h3>Bonus: Youth Athlete Performance Guide</h3><p>Training protocols for youth, high school, and collegiate athletes &mdash; by sport and position</p></div></div><div class="guide-block-body"><p>A full breakdown of position-specific training principles: lineman speed and power development, skill position agility, and sport-specific strength for football, basketball, soccer, and track &amp; field. Built with the authority of NASM-certified exercise science.</p></div></div>
+</div>
+</section>
+<section class="program">
+<div class="container">
+<div class="section-tag" data-lang-key="bpt-prog-tag">The 4-Week Blueprint</div>
+<h2 class="section-title" data-lang-key="bpt-prog-h">One Month.<br><span class="yellow">Four Phases.</span><br>Zero Fluff.</h2>
+<div class="week-grid">
+<div class="week-card"><h4>Week 01</h4><h3>Foundation</h3><ul><li>Focus <span>Movement Habits</span></li><li>Intensity <span>RPE 6-7</span></li><li>Sessions <span>3x/week</span></li><li>Length <span>45 min</span></li><li>IF Window <span>10am-6pm</span></li><li>Deficit <span>250 kcal</span></li></ul></div>
+<div class="week-card"><h4>Week 02</h4><h3>Build</h3><ul><li>Focus <span>Volume Load</span></li><li>Intensity <span>RPE 7-8</span></li><li>Sessions <span>3x/week</span></li><li>Length <span>50 min</span></li><li>IF Window <span>11am-7pm</span></li><li>Deficit <span>350 kcal</span></li></ul></div>
+<div class="week-card"><h4>Week 03</h4><h3>Intensify</h3><ul><li>Focus <span>Prog. Overload</span></li><li>Intensity <span>RPE 8-9</span></li><li>Sessions <span>3x/week</span></li><li>Length <span>55 min</span></li><li>IF Window <span>12pm-8pm</span></li><li>Deficit <span>400 kcal</span></li></ul></div>
+<div class="week-card"><h4>Week 04</h4><h3>Peak</h3><ul><li>Focus <span>Strength + Cut</span></li><li>Intensity <span>RPE 9</span></li><li>Sessions <span>3x/week</span></li><li>Length <span>60 min</span></li><li>IF Window <span>12pm-8pm</span></li><li>Deficit <span>500 kcal</span></li></ul></div>
+</div>
+</div>
+</section>
+
+<section class="split">
+<div class="container">
+<div class="section-tag" data-lang-key="bpt-split-tag">3-Day Minimum Effective Dose Split</div>
+<h2 class="section-title" data-lang-key="bpt-split-h">Three Sessions.<br><span class="yellow">Every Muscle.</span><br>Under 60 Minutes.</h2>
+<p style="color:var(--muted);max-width:560px;margin-bottom:8px;">Three intentional, compound-focused sessions per week. No wasted sets. No filler exercises. Every movement earns its spot.</p>
+<div class="split-days">
+<div class="day-card"><div class="day-label">Session A</div><h3>Full Body<br>Power</h3><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Barbell Squat</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x5 @ 80%</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Bench Press</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x5 @ 80%</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Barbell Row</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x6</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Overhead Press</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x8</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Romanian Deadlift</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x10</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Face Pulls</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x15</span></div><div class="session-note">~50 min &middot; Rest 2-3 min</div></div>
+<div class="day-card"><div class="day-label">Session B</div><h3>Push / Pull<br>Hypertrophy</h3><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Incline DB Press</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x10</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Cable Row</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x10</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Lateral Raises</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x15</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Lat Pulldown</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x10</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Tricep Pushdown</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x12</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Hammer Curls</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x12</span></div><div class="session-note">~48 min &middot; Rest 60-90 sec</div></div>
+<div class="day-card"><div class="day-label">Session C</div><h3>Legs +<br>Core Strength</h3><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Leg Press</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x12</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Walking Lunges</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x12/leg</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Leg Curl</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x12</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Hip Thrust</span><span class="exercise-sets">4x12</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Ab Wheel Rollout</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x10</span></div><div class="exercise"><span class="exercise-name">Dead Bug</span><span class="exercise-sets">3x10/side</span></div><div class="session-note">~50 min &middot; Rest 90 sec</div></div>
+</div>
+<div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:24px 28px;margin-top:2px;display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
+<div style="font-size:28px;">&#128203;</div>
+<div><div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--yellow);margin-bottom:4px;">The Parent Scheduling Rule</div><p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);">Sessions A and B separated by at least 48 hours. Session C can follow Session B with 24 hours rest. Schedule sessions during school hours, after drop-off, or after kids' bedtime. 45 minutes is enough. Show up.</p></div>
+</div>
+</div>
+</section>
+
+<section class="fasting">
+<div class="container">
+<div class="section-tag" data-lang-key="bpt-if-tag">Nutrition Protocol</div>
+<h2 class="section-title" data-lang-key="bpt-if-h">16/8 Designed for<br><span class="yellow">Real Mornings,</span><br>Not Instagram Ones</h2>
+<p style="color:var(--muted);max-width:600px;margin-bottom:8px;">You are making breakfast for three people before you have had one sip of coffee. The standard 6am feeding schedule does not work for you. This one does.</p>
+<div class="if-timeline">
+<div class="if-block if-fast"><h4>Fast Window</h4><div class="time">8PM to 12PM</div><p>16 hours. Sleep handles most of it. Coffee, tea, and water during morning chaos.</p></div>
+<div class="if-block if-eat"><h4>Eating Window</h4><div class="time">12PM to 8PM</div><p>8 hours. Lunch, afternoon snack, and dinner with the family. All macros hit here.</p></div>
+</div>
+<div class="variant-list"><div class="variant-label">Schedule-Based Window Variants</div>
+<div class="variant-item"><div class="variant-name">Early Riser</div><div class="variant-desc">Fast 7PM-11AM &middot; Eat 11AM-7PM &middot; Up at 5am with kids and eat dinner early.</div></div>
+<div class="variant-item"><div class="variant-name" style="color:var(--purple-light);">Standard</div><div class="variant-desc">Fast 8PM-12PM &middot; Eat 12PM-8PM &middot; Aligns with lunch break and family dinner.</div></div>
+<div class="variant-item"><div class="variant-name" style="color:var(--muted);">Late Schedule</div><div class="variant-desc">Fast 9PM-1PM &middot; Eat 1PM-9PM &middot; For parents with later workdays or evening routines.</div></div>
+</div>
+<p style="color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:16px;font-size:15px;">Daily macro targets optimized for an active, energy-demanding parent lifestyle:</p>
+<div class="macro-grid">
+<div class="macro-card"><div class="macro-label">Protein</div><div class="macro-val">150<span style="font-size:22px;">g</span></div><div class="macro-unit">Muscle preservation &middot; energy stabilizer</div></div>
+<div class="macro-card"><div class="macro-label">Carbs</div><div class="macro-val">175<span style="font-size:22px;">g</span></div><div class="macro-unit">Brain fuel &middot; sustained energy for long days</div></div>
+<div class="macro-card"><div class="macro-label">Fats</div><div class="macro-val">55<span style="font-size:22px;">g</span></div><div class="macro-unit">Hormonal health &middot; joint support</div></div>
+</div>
+</div>
+</section>
+<section class="mindset">
+<div class="container">
+<div class="section-tag" data-lang-key="bpt-mind-tag">The Psychology</div>
+<h2 class="section-title" data-lang-key="bpt-mind-h">The Caregiver<br>Mindset</h2>
+<div class="mindset-quote" data-lang-key="bpt-mind-quote">"You cannot pour from an empty cup. But nobody told you that rebuilding the cup is part of the job description."</div>
+<div class="mindset-body">
+<p>The fitness industry talks to you like you are the problem. Like if you just wanted it badly enough, you would find the hours. What they are missing is this: <strong>you already have the hardest mental skill required to build an elite physique.</strong> You manage a household, careers, emotions, schedules, and a whole human being's development &mdash; simultaneously.</p>
+<p>This program is not about finding time. <strong>It is about claiming it.</strong> Three sessions a week is your non-negotiable &mdash; because a parent who is physically strong, mentally grounded, and energized is a fundamentally better parent.</p>
+</div>
+<ul class="principle-list">
+<li><div class="principle-num">01</div><div class="principle-text"><h4>Schedule It Like a Practice</h4><p>You would never pull your kid from soccer practice because dinner ran late. Your training session gets the same respect on the calendar.</p></div></li>
+<li><div class="principle-num">02</div><div class="principle-text"><h4>Progress Over Perfection</h4><p>The parent who trains 3 imperfect days per week for 12 months beats the parent who runs a perfect 5-day program and quits in week 3.</p></div></li>
+<li><div class="principle-num">03</div><div class="principle-text"><h4>Recovery Is Part of the Job</h4><p>Sleep, hydration, and rest days are not laziness &mdash; they are the mechanism of change. You get stronger during recovery.</p></div></li>
+<li><div class="principle-num">04</div><div class="principle-text"><h4>You Are the Role Model</h4><p>Your kids watch everything. When they see you choosing health, choosing discipline &mdash; they are learning one of the most important lessons of their lives.</p></div></li>
+<li><div class="principle-num">05</div><div class="principle-text"><h4>The Long Game Is the Real Game</h4><p>Your goal is not a six-week transformation. It is to be strong, energetic, and present for decades.</p></div></li>
+</ul>
+</div>
+</section>

+<div class="section-tag" data-lang-key="bpt-faq-tag">FAQ</div>
+<h2 class="section-title" data-lang-key="bpt-faq-h">Questions<br><span class="yellow">Parents Ask</span></h2>
+<div class="faq-item"><div class="faq-q">What if I only have 30-40 minutes instead of 60?</div><div class="faq-a">The guide includes a 35-minute compressed version of each session. Shorter sessions done consistently beat longer sessions done sporadically every single time.</div></div>
+<div class="faq-item"><div class="faq-q">Do I need a gym membership or can I do this at home?</div><div class="faq-a">The full program is written for a commercial gym (Planet Fitness level). Every exercise has a dumbbell or bodyweight modification for home training.</div></div>
+<div class="faq-item"><div class="faq-q">Is intermittent fasting safe while breastfeeding or postpartum?</div><div class="faq-a">The guide includes a modified nutrition section for postpartum parents. Always consult your physician before starting any nutrition protocol postpartum.</div></div>
+<div class="faq-item"><div class="faq-q">My kids are in multiple sports with crazy schedules. Does this still work?</div><div class="faq-a">That is exactly who this was built for. The chaos week protocol handles the weeks when the schedule goes completely sideways.</div></div>
+<div class="faq-item"><div class="faq-q">What is in the Youth Athlete Performance Guide bonus?</div><div class="faq-a">It covers training principles for youth (ages 8-14), high school, and collegiate athletes by sport &mdash; football (including lineman-specific power and speed development), basketball, soccer, and track and field.</div></div>

+// ─── COPY UTILITY ──────────────────────────────────
+function cpb(txt,btn){navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(function(){btn.textContent='✓ COPIED';btn.classList.add('ok');setTimeout(function(){btn.textContent='COPY';btn.classList.remove('ok');},2000);});}

+}

+    return '<div class="sb"><div class="sb-l">'+s.title+'</div>'+lines+'<button class="cpb" onclick="cpb(\''+copyTxt.replace(/'/g,"\\'")+'\',this)">COPY</button></div>';
+  }).join('');
+}

+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+// FILTER-ENGINE.JS — BBF Smart Kitchen & Position Router
+// Built on the Sovereign Gold Standard. Data-driven, Athlete-tested.
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+
+// ─── FAMILY INTAKE PROCESSOR ───────────────────────────────
+function processIntake(formData) {
+  // formData = { members: [ { name, sport, position, dislikes:[], allergies:[] } ] }
+  var results = { workouts: {}, meals: [] };
+  var allDislikes = [];
+  var allAllergens = [];
+
+  formData.members.forEach(function(m) {
+    // Collect household-wide exclusions
+    if (m.dislikes) allDislikes = allDislikes.concat(m.dislikes);
+    if (m.allergies) allAllergens = allAllergens.concat(m.allergies);
+
+    // Route to position-specific workouts
+    if (m.sport && m.position && WORKOUT_CATALOG[m.sport]) {
+      var drills = WORKOUT_CATALOG[m.sport][m.position] || [];
+      results.workouts[m.name] = {
+        sport: m.sport,
+        position: m.position,
+        drills: drills
+      };
+    }
+  });
+
+  // Deduplicate exclusions
+  allDislikes = arrayUnique(allDislikes.map(function(d) { return d.toLowerCase(); }));
+  allAllergens = arrayUnique(allAllergens.map(function(a) { return a.toLowerCase(); }));
+
+  // Filter meals
+  results.meals = filterMeals(allDislikes, allAllergens);
+  results.exclusions = { dislikes: allDislikes, allergens: allAllergens };
+  return results;
+}
+
+// ─── MEAL FILTER ───────────────────────────────────────────
+function filterMeals(dislikes, allergens) {
+  if (typeof MEAL_VAULT === 'undefined') return [];
+  return MEAL_VAULT.filter(function(meal) {
+    // Exclude meals with disliked ingredients
+    for (var i = 0; i < meal.tags.length; i++) {
+      if (dislikes.indexOf(meal.tags[i].toLowerCase()) > -1) return false;
+    }
+    // Exclude meals with allergens
+    for (var j = 0; j < meal.allergens.length; j++) {
+      if (allergens.indexOf(meal.allergens[j].toLowerCase()) > -1) return false;
+    }
+    return true;
+  });
+}
+
+// ─── DAILY BLUEPRINT GENERATOR ─────────────────────────────
+function generateDailyBlueprint(intake, protocol, lang) {
+  // protocol: 'parent' (16/8 maintenance/loss) or 'athlete' (performance)
+  // lang: 'en', 'es', 'pt'
+  var L = lang || 'en';
+  var data = processIntake(intake);
+  var blueprint = {
+    seal: 'Sovereign Gold Standard Verified. Data-driven, Athlete-tested.',
+    status: 'Laboratory Generated — Pending Founder Audit',
+    members: {}
+  };
+
+  // Build per-member workout plans
+  for (var name in data.workouts) {
+    var w = data.workouts[name];
+    blueprint.members[name] = {
+      sport: w.sport,
+      position: w.position,
+      drills: w.drills.map(function(d) {
+        return {
+          name: d.name[L] || d.name.en,
+          sets: d.sets,
+          focus: d.focus[L] || d.focus.en,
+          equipment: d.equipment
+        };
+      })
+    };
+  }
+
+  // Build household meal plan
+  blueprint.meals = data.meals.map(function(m) {
+    return {
+      name: m.name[L] || m.name.en,
+      type: m.type,
+      protocol: m.protocol,
+      tags: m.tags,
+      allergens: m.allergens
+    };
+  });
+
+  blueprint.exclusions = data.exclusions;
+  return blueprint;
+}
+
+// ─── TOURNAMENT MODE ──────────────────────────────────────
+function toggleTournamentMode(state) {
+  // state: true (road only) or false (all meals)
+  if (state === undefined) {
+    // Toggle current state
+    state = localStorage.getItem('bbf_tournament_mode') !== 'on';
+  }
+  localStorage.setItem('bbf_tournament_mode', state ? 'on' : 'off');
+  return state;
+}
+
+function isTournamentMode() {
+  return localStorage.getItem('bbf_tournament_mode') === 'on';
+}
+
+function getTournamentMeals() {
+  if (typeof MEAL_VAULT === 'undefined') return [];
+  return MEAL_VAULT.filter(function(m) { return m.type === 'road'; });
+}
+
+function getFilteredMeals(dislikes, allergens) {
+  var meals = isTournamentMode() ? getTournamentMeals() : MEAL_VAULT;
+  if (!meals) return [];
+  return meals.filter(function(meal) {
+    for (var i = 0; i < (meal.tags || []).length; i++) {
+      if (dislikes.indexOf(meal.tags[i].toLowerCase()) > -1) return false;
+    }
+    for (var j = 0; j < (meal.allergens || []).length; j++) {
+      if (allergens.indexOf(meal.allergens[j].toLowerCase()) > -1) return false;
+    }
+    return true;
+  });
+}
+
+if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
+  module.exports = {
+    toggleTournamentMode: toggleTournamentMode,
+    isTournamentMode: isTournamentMode,
+    getTournamentMeals: getTournamentMeals,
+    getFilteredMeals: getFilteredMeals,
+    processIntake: processIntake,
+    generateDailyBlueprint: generateDailyBlueprint
+  };
+}
+
+// ─── UTILITY ───────────────────────────────────────────────
+function arrayUnique(arr) {
+  var seen = {};
+  return arr.filter(function(item) {
+    if (seen[item]) return false;
+    seen[item] = true;
+    return true;
+  });
+}
diff --git a/filter-engine.test.js b/filter-engine.test.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0527dcb
--- /dev/null
+++ b/filter-engine.test.js
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+const assert = require('assert');
+
+// Mock localStorage
+global.localStorage = {
+  data: {},
+  getItem(key) {
+    return this.data[key] || null;
+  },
+  setItem(key, value) {
+    this.data[key] = String(value);
+  },
+  removeItem(key) {
+    delete this.data[key];
+  },
+  clear() {
+    this.data = {};
+  }
+};
+
+const { toggleTournamentMode, isTournamentMode } = require('./filter-engine.js');
+
+function runTests() {
+  console.log('Running tests for toggleTournamentMode...');
+
+  // Reset localStorage before each test
+  localStorage.clear();
+
+  // Test 1: Initial state (should be false/off)
+  console.log('Test 1: Initial state');
+  assert.strictEqual(isTournamentMode(), false, 'isTournamentMode should be false initially');
+
+  // Test 2: toggleTournamentMode(true) - Explicitly set to true
+  console.log('Test 2: Explicitly set to true');
+  let result = toggleTournamentMode(true);
+  assert.strictEqual(result, true, 'toggleTournamentMode(true) should return true');
+  assert.strictEqual(localStorage.getItem('bbf_tournament_mode'), 'on', 'localStorage should be "on"');
+  assert.strictEqual(isTournamentMode(), true, 'isTournamentMode should be true');
+
+  // Test 3: toggleTournamentMode(false) - Explicitly set to false
+  console.log('Test 3: Explicitly set to false');
+  result = toggleTournamentMode(false);
+  assert.strictEqual(result, false, 'toggleTournamentMode(false) should return false');
+  assert.strictEqual(localStorage.getItem('bbf_tournament_mode'), 'off', 'localStorage should be "off"');
+  assert.strictEqual(isTournamentMode(), false, 'isTournamentMode should be false');
+
+  // Test 4: toggleTournamentMode() - Toggle from false to true
+  console.log('Test 4: Toggle from false to true');
+  localStorage.setItem('bbf_tournament_mode', 'off');
+  result = toggleTournamentMode();
+  assert.strictEqual(result, true, 'Toggling from "off" should return true');
+  assert.strictEqual(localStorage.getItem('bbf_tournament_mode'), 'on', 'localStorage should be "on"');
+  assert.strictEqual(isTournamentMode(), true, 'isTournamentMode should be true');
+
+  // Test 5: toggleTournamentMode() - Toggle from true to false
+  console.log('Test 5: Toggle from true to false');
+  localStorage.setItem('bbf_tournament_mode', 'on');
+  result = toggleTournamentMode();
+  assert.strictEqual(result, false, 'Toggling from "on" should return false');
+  assert.strictEqual(localStorage.getItem('bbf_tournament_mode'), 'off', 'localStorage should be "off"');
+  assert.strictEqual(isTournamentMode(), false, 'isTournamentMode should be false');
+
+  // Test 6: toggleTournamentMode() - Toggle when localStorage is empty
+  console.log('Test 6: Toggle when localStorage is empty');
+  localStorage.clear();
+  result = toggleTournamentMode();
+  assert.strictEqual(result, true, 'Toggling when empty should return true (default behavior)');
+  assert.strictEqual(localStorage.getItem('bbf_tournament_mode'), 'on', 'localStorage should be "on"');
+  assert.strictEqual(isTournamentMode(), true, 'isTournamentMode should be true');
+
+  console.log('All tests passed!');
+}
+
+try {
+  runTests();
+} catch (error) {
+  console.error('Test failed!');
+  console.error(error);
+  process.exit(1);
+}

diff --git a/hologram-renderer.js b/hologram-renderer.js

@@ -0,0 +1,173 @@
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+// HOLOGRAM-RENDERER.JS — BBF Biomechanical Hologram Overlay
+// Sovereign Gold Standard — HTML5 Canvas Kinetic Visualization
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+
+var BBF_HOLOGRAM = (function() {
+  'use strict';
+
+  var GOLD = '#D4AF37';
+  var GOLD_GLOW = 'rgba(212,175,55,0.4)';
+  var PURPLE = '#6a0dad';
+  var WHITE = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.85)';
+
+  function getLang() {
+    return (typeof BBF_LANG !== 'undefined' && BBF_LANG.get) ? BBF_LANG.get() : 'en';
+  }
+
+  function findMapping(exerciseName) {
+    if (typeof KINETIC_MAPPINGS === 'undefined') return null;
+    if (KINETIC_MAPPINGS[exerciseName]) return KINETIC_MAPPINGS[exerciseName];
+    // Fuzzy match
+    for (var key in KINETIC_MAPPINGS) {
+      if (exerciseName.toLowerCase().indexOf(key.toLowerCase()) > -1) {
+        return KINETIC_MAPPINGS[key];
+      }
+    }
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  function drawKineticHologram(canvas, exerciseName, lang) {
+    var mapping = findMapping(exerciseName);
+    if (!mapping || !canvas) return false;
+
+    var L = lang || getLang();
+    var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
+    var W = canvas.width;
+    var H = canvas.height;
+
+    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
+
+    // ─── PRIMARY VECTOR (dashed gold line) ─────────────────
+    var v = mapping.primaryVector;
+    ctx.save();
+    ctx.strokeStyle = GOLD;
+    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
+    ctx.setLineDash([8, 6]);
+    ctx.shadowColor = GOLD_GLOW;
+    ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
+    ctx.beginPath();
+    ctx.moveTo(v.x1 * W, v.y1 * H);
+    ctx.lineTo(v.x2 * W, v.y2 * H);
+    ctx.stroke();
+    ctx.restore();
+
+    // Vector label
+    ctx.save();
+    ctx.font = '600 11px "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif';
+    ctx.fillStyle = GOLD;
+    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
+    var midX = ((v.x1 + v.x2) / 2) * W;
+    var midY = ((v.y1 + v.y2) / 2) * H;
+    ctx.fillText(v.label, midX + 40, midY);
+    ctx.restore();
+
+    // ─── JOINT ANGLES ──────────────────────────────────────
+    if (mapping.jointAngles) {
+      mapping.jointAngles.forEach(function(ja) {
+        ctx.save();
+        ctx.strokeStyle = PURPLE;
+        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
+        ctx.setLineDash([4, 4]);
+        // Draw angle arc
+        ctx.beginPath();
+        ctx.arc(ja.x * W, ja.y * H, 20, 0, Math.PI * 0.35);
+        ctx.stroke();
+        // Label
+        ctx.font = '700 10px "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif';
+        ctx.fillStyle = WHITE;
+        ctx.fillText(ja.optimal, ja.x * W + 24, ja.y * H - 4);
+        ctx.restore();
+      });
+    }
+
+    // ─── FOCAL POINT (glowing circle) ──────────────────────
+    var fp = mapping._overrideFocal || mapping.focalPoint;
+    if (fp) {
+      ctx.save();
+      // Outer glow
+      var grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(fp.x * W, fp.y * H, 0, fp.x * W, fp.y * H, fp.radius * W);
+      grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(212,175,55,0.3)');
+      grad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(212,175,55,0.08)');
+      grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(212,175,55,0)');
+      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
+      ctx.beginPath();
+      ctx.arc(fp.x * W, fp.y * H, fp.radius * W, 0, Math.PI * 2);
+      ctx.fill();
+      // Inner ring
+      ctx.strokeStyle = GOLD;
+      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
+      ctx.beginPath();
+      ctx.arc(fp.x * W, fp.y * H, fp.radius * W * 0.6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
+      ctx.stroke();
+      // Label
+      ctx.font = '700 10px "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif';
+      ctx.fillStyle = GOLD;
+      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
+      var fpLabel = (fp.label && fp.label[L]) ? fp.label[L] : (fp.label.en || '');
+      ctx.fillText(fpLabel, fp.x * W, fp.y * H + fp.radius * W + 14);
+      ctx.restore();
+    }
+
+    // ─── CLINICAL CUE TEXT ─────────────────────────────────
+    var cue = mapping.clinicalCues ? (mapping.clinicalCues[L] || mapping.clinicalCues.en) : '';
+    if (cue) {
+      ctx.save();
+      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';
+      ctx.fillRect(8, H - 52, W - 16, 44);
+      ctx.strokeStyle = GOLD;
+      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
+      ctx.strokeRect(8, H - 52, W - 16, 44);
+      ctx.font = '600 11px "Barlow Condensed", sans-serif';
+      ctx.fillStyle = WHITE;
+      // Word wrap
+      var words = cue.split(' ');
+      var line = '';
+      var y = H - 38;
+      var maxW = W - 32;
+      for (var i = 0; i < words.length; i++) {
+        var test = line + words[i] + ' ';
+        if (ctx.measureText(test).width > maxW && line) {
+          ctx.fillText(line.trim(), 16, y);
+          line = words[i] + ' ';
+          y += 14;
+          if (y > H - 10) break;
+        } else { line = test; }
+      }
+      if (line && y <= H - 10) ctx.fillText(line.trim(), 16, y);
+      ctx.restore();
+    }
+
+    return true;
+  }
+
+  function toggle(containerId, exerciseName) {
+    var container = document.getElementById(containerId);
+    if (!container) return;
+    var canvas = container.querySelector('.holo-canvas');
+    if (canvas && canvas.style.display !== 'none') {
+      canvas.style.display = 'none';
+      return;
+    }
+    if (!canvas) {
+      canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
+      canvas.className = 'holo-canvas';
+      canvas.width = container.offsetWidth || 300;
+      canvas.height = container.offsetHeight || 200;
+      canvas.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:10';
+      container.style.position = 'relative';
+      container.appendChild(canvas);
+    }
+    canvas.style.display = 'block';
+    canvas.width = container.offsetWidth || 300;
+    canvas.height = container.offsetHeight || 200;
+    drawKineticHologram(canvas, exerciseName);
+  }
+
+  return {
+    draw: drawKineticHologram,
+    toggle: toggle,
+    findMapping: findMapping
+  };
+
+})();

+<!-- PROTOCOL / THE METHOD -->
+<section id="protocol">
+  <div class="pt-in">
+    <div class="sec-head reveal">
+      <div class="sec-num">/ 02</div>
+      <h2 class="sec-title">The <span class="volt">Protocol</span></h2>
+      <div class="sec-meta">Four-phase<br>Adaptation cycle</div>
+    </div>
+    <div class="spec-strip reveal">
+      <span>PROTO-BBF/04</span>
+      <span class="cy">Clinically progressive</span>
+      <span>12wk minimum</span>
+      <span class="cy">Trenches-tested &amp; founder-authored</span>
+    </div>
+    <div class="pt-timeline">
+      <div class="pt-step reveal d1">
+        <div class="phase">Phase / 01</div>
+        <div class="wk">WK 1<small>Baseline capture</small></div>
+        <div class="ttl">Assessment &amp; calibration</div>
+        <div class="desc">Eleven markers captured — movement screen, HRV pattern, sleep architecture, TDEE, lift ratios, joint history. We map what's actually happening before we prescribe anything.</div>
+        <div class="metrics"><span>Markers <em>11</em></span><span>Coach call <em>60min</em></span></div>
+      </div>
+      <div class="pt-step reveal d2">
+        <div class="phase">Phase / 02</div>
+        <div class="wk">WK 2–4<small>Program on-ramp</small></div>
+        <div class="ttl">Prescription &amp; adaptation</div>
+        <div class="desc">Your first block deploys. Load, volume, and tempo are set to where your system will respond — not where ego wants. Form video review on every new lift.</div>
+        <div class="metrics"><span>Sessions <em>3–4/wk</em></span><span>Review cadence <em>72hr</em></span></div>
+      </div>
+      <div class="pt-step reveal d3">
+        <div class="phase">Phase / 03</div>
+        <div class="wk">WK 5–8<small>Measured load</small></div>
+        <div class="ttl">Progressive overload</div>
+        <div class="desc">Autoregulated loading. The program reads your recovery signals and adjusts the next session before you show up. This is where most templates quietly fail — and where we start.</div>
+        <div class="metrics"><span>RPE targeting <em>±0.5</em></span><span>Deload <em>auto</em></span></div>
+      </div>
+      <div class="pt-step reveal d4">
+        <div class="phase">Phase / 04</div>
+        <div class="wk">WK 9→<small>Owned practice</small></div>
+        <div class="ttl">Consolidation &amp; autonomy</div>
+        <div class="desc">By month three you're reading your own signals. We refine, we step back, you drive. Most clients stay — but you could run the framework yourself now. That's the point.</div>
+        <div class="metrics"><span>Retention <em>92%</em></span><span>Coach touch <em>on demand</em></span></div>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+</section>

+<section id="mandate">
+  <div class="md-in">
+    <div class="md-eye reveal" data-lang-key="p-md-eye">Codex · Article I</div>
+    <h2 class="md-h reveal d1">We do not sell <span class="strike">transformation</span>.<br>We underwrite <b>adaptation</b> —<br><em>measured, repeatable, yours.</em></h2>
+    <p class="md-sub reveal d2" data-lang-key="p-md-sub">BBF-Lab exists for people who plan to be operational in thirty years. No aesthetics-first marketing. No platitudes. A clinical practice with an appetite for proof and a refusal to confuse motion with progress.</p>
+    <div class="md-rule reveal d3"></div>
+    <div class="md-seals reveal d3">
+      <span>Peer-reviewed</span>
+      <span>Clinician-led</span>
+      <span>Outcome-bound</span>
+      <span>Refund on non-response</span>
+    </div>

+        <div class="coach-meta">
+          <div class="cm-cell"><div class="cm-k" data-lang-key="p-coach-cm-1k">Architect</div><div class="cm-v">Akeem<small data-lang-key="p-coach-cm-1v">founder · BBF</small></div></div>
+          <div class="cm-cell"><div class="cm-k" data-lang-key="p-coach-cm-2k">Credentials</div><div class="cm-v">Clinical<small data-lang-key="p-coach-cm-2v">Biomechanics · OT-informed</small></div></div>
+          <div class="cm-cell"><div class="cm-k" data-lang-key="p-coach-cm-3k">Established</div><div class="cm-v">2021<small data-lang-key="p-coach-cm-3v">sovereign standard</small></div></div>
+          <div class="cm-cell"><div class="cm-k" data-lang-key="p-coach-cm-4k">Background</div><div class="cm-v">Medical Mfg.<small data-lang-key="p-coach-cm-4v">12hr shifts · trenches</small></div></div>
+        </div>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+    <div class="coach-right reveal d2">
+      <div class="eyebrow" data-lang-key="p-coach-eye">The architect</div>
+      <h2 class="coach-head" data-lang-key="p-coach-head">I built BBF because <span class="outline-ink">nothing</span> fit the <span class="violet">trenches.</span></h2>
+      <p class="big-quote" data-lang-key="p-coach-quote">I'm Akeem — architect of Build Believe Fit. I worked 12-hour shifts in medical manufacturing, then tried to train on everyone else's standard programs. None of them fit.</p>
+      <p class="coach-body" data-lang-key="p-coach-body-1">For seven years I ran the same failed experiment: clock out of a shift with wrecked legs and depleted CNS, then try to follow a program written for someone with eight hours of sleep and zero back fatigue. The templates assumed I was fresh. The gurus assumed I was lying. <strong>Neither was true. I was just working.</strong></p>
+      <p class="coach-body" data-lang-key="p-coach-body-2">So I stopped waiting for someone else's protocol and started architecting my own — built for shift recovery, joint longevity, and the reality of a working professional's week. That system became BBF-Lab. <strong>Everything I teach, I stress-tested in the trenches first.</strong></p>
+      <!-- VALIDATION PAYLOAD — Before / After transformation -->
+      <div class="transform-grid reveal d3">
+        <figure class="xform-frame">
+          <div class="xform-label" data-lang-key="p-coach-xform-1">Before · 2020</div>

+        </figure>
+      </div>
+      <div class="sig-row">
+        <div>

+<script>
+const TWEAKS = /*EDITMODE-BEGIN*/{

+// NAV scroll
+var navEl=document.getElementById('nav');
+window.addEventListener('scroll',function(){navEl.classList.toggle('scrolled',window.scrollY>30);});
+
+// REVEAL
+(function(){
+  document.body.classList.add('js-ready');
+  var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
+    entries.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('vis');obs.unobserve(e.target);}});
+  },{threshold:0.08,rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'});
+  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function(el){
+    if(el.getBoundingClientRect().top<window.innerHeight){el.classList.add('vis');}
+    else{obs.observe(el);}
+  });
+})();
+
+// TIERS select
+function selTier(card,id){
+  document.querySelectorAll('.tier').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('sel');});
+  card.classList.add('sel');
+  var s=document.getElementById('f-prog');
+  if(s){for(var i=0;i<s.options.length;i++){if(s.options[i].value===id){s.selectedIndex=i;break;}}}
+  document.querySelector('#intake').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
+}
+
+// CHIPS
+function setupChips(id){
+  var c=document.getElementById(id);if(!c)return;
+  c.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(function(b){
+    b.onclick=function(){c.querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('on');});b.classList.add('on');};
+  });
+}
+setupChips('gc');setupChips('ec');setupChips('sc');
+document.querySelectorAll('#grow .goal-b').forEach(function(b){
+  b.onclick=function(){document.querySelectorAll('#grow .goal-b').forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove('on');});b.classList.add('on');};
+});
+
+// TDEE
+function calcTDEE(age,sex,wt,ft,ins,act){
+  var kg=wt*0.453592;var cm=((ft*12)+ins)*2.54;
+  var bmr=sex==='male'?(10*kg)+(6.25*cm)-(5*age)+5:(10*kg)+(6.25*cm)-(5*age)-161;
+  return Math.round(bmr*act);
+}
+function calcMacros(cal,wt,adj){
+  var p=Math.round(wt*(adj>0?1.05:0.95));
+  var f=Math.round(cal*0.27/9);
+  var c=Math.max(0,Math.round((cal-(p*4)-(f*9))/4));
+  return{p:p,c:c,f:f};
+}
+function calcWidget(){
+  var age=parseInt(document.getElementById('t-age').value)||0;
+  var sex=document.getElementById('t-sex').value;
+  var wt=parseFloat(document.getElementById('t-wt').value)||0;
+  var ft=parseInt(document.getElementById('t-ft').value)||0;
+  var ins=parseInt(document.getElementById('t-in').value)||0;
+  var act=parseFloat(document.getElementById('t-act').value)||1.55;
+  var gb=document.querySelector('#grow .goal-b.on');
+  var adj=gb?parseInt(gb.dataset.adj):-450;
+  if(!age||!wt||!ft){alert('Fill in age, weight, and height.');return;}
+  var base=calcTDEE(age,sex,wt,ft,ins,act);
+  var tgt=base+adj;
+  var mac=calcMacros(tgt,wt,adj);
+  document.getElementById('tw-cal').textContent=tgt.toLocaleString();
+  document.getElementById('tw-p').textContent=mac.p;
+  document.getElementById('tw-c').textContent=mac.c;
+  document.getElementById('tw-f').textContent=mac.f;
+  var gl=adj<0?'lean-down':adj>0?'build':'maintenance';
+  document.getElementById('tw-note').textContent='Maintenance TDEE estimate: '+base.toLocaleString()+' cal/day. Adjusted for '+gl+'. These are starting targets — we fine-tune inside the program.';
+  var res=document.getElementById('tres');res.classList.add('on');
+}
+
+// FORM steps
+function showStep(n){
+  document.querySelectorAll('.fs').forEach(function(s){s.classList.remove('on');});
+  document.querySelectorAll('.si').forEach(function(s,i){s.classList.remove('act','don');if(i<n)s.classList.add('don');if(i===n)s.classList.add('act');});
+  document.getElementById('fs'+n).classList.add('on');
+  document.getElementById('intake').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
+}
+function nxt(from){
+  if(from===0){
+    var fn=document.getElementById('f-fn').value.trim();
+    var em=document.getElementById('f-em').value.trim();
+    if(!fn||!em){flash('Add your name and email.','err');return;}
+    if(!/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(em)){flash('Need a valid email.','err');return;}
+  }
+  if(from===1){
+    if(!document.getElementById('f-age').value||!document.getElementById('f-wt').value||!document.getElementById('f-ft').value){flash('Fill in your stats.','err');return;}
+  }
+  showStep(from+1);
+}
+function prv(from){showStep(from-1);}
+function flash(msg,type){
+  var el=document.getElementById('fmsg');if(!el)return;
+  el.textContent=msg;el.className='fmsg '+(type||'');
+  setTimeout(function(){el.textContent='';el.className='fmsg';},3500);
+}
+
+// Persona-driven next steps
+var NEXT_STEPS={
+  'shift':{head:'shift-ready',steps:['TDEE locked · {CAL} cal / day starting target','Macro split calibrated for shift recovery','Jordan pre-loads your Shift Protocol','Onboarding call within 48 hours','Program ships day 1 of next cohort']},
+  'night':{head:'circadian-aware',steps:['TDEE locked · {CAL} cal / day','Circadian-timed nutrition window drafted','Night-shift sleep protocol attached','Jordan reviews your intake personally','First async check-in on day 7']},
+  'firstresp':{head:'tactical longevity',steps:['TDEE locked · {CAL} cal / day','Tactical macros ({PROT}g protein floor)','Joint longevity block pre-selected','Priority review · 24–48 hr','Program scales with on-call weeks']},
+  'parent':{head:'fits-the-chaos',steps:['TDEE locked · {CAL} cal / day','Protein floor at {PROT}g · realistic','45-min session template pre-loaded','Jordan reaches out within 48 hours','Flexible scheduling baked in']},
+  'travel':{head:'road-ready',steps:['TDEE locked · {CAL} cal / day','Travel macro playbook attached','Hotel-gym variant of every session','Jordan reviews within 48 hours','Program adjusts around trip weeks']},
+  'standard':{head:'calibrated and ready',steps:['TDEE locked · {CAL} cal / day','Macros calibrated · {PROT}g protein','Starting block drafted · awaits your call','Jordan reviews within 48 hours','Program begins on next Monday']}
+};
+function persona(g,s){return NEXT_STEPS[s]||NEXT_STEPS['standard'];}
+
+// SUBMIT — Pathfinder CRM (Zapier + Formspree)
+function doSubmit(){
+  var btn=document.getElementById('sbtn');
+  var fn=document.getElementById('f-fn').value.trim();
+  var ln=document.getElementById('f-ln').value.trim();
+  var em=document.getElementById('f-em').value.trim();
+  var ph=(document.getElementById('f-ph')||{}).value||'';
+  var age=parseInt(document.getElementById('f-age').value)||0;
+  var sex=document.getElementById('f-sex').value;
+  var wt=parseFloat(document.getElementById('f-wt').value)||0;
+  var ft=parseInt(document.getElementById('f-ft').value)||0;
+  var ins=parseInt(document.getElementById('f-in').value)||0;
+  var act=parseFloat(document.getElementById('f-act').value)||1.55;
+  var gc=document.querySelector('#gc .chip.on');var ec=document.querySelector('#ec .chip.on');var sc=document.querySelector('#sc .chip.on');
+  var goal=gc?gc.dataset.v:'lean';var exp=ec?ec.dataset.v:'not specified';var sch=sc?sc.dataset.v:'standard';
+  var prog=(document.getElementById('f-prog')||{}).value||'';
+  var hlth=(document.getElementById('f-health')||{}).value||'';
+  var ref=(document.getElementById('f-ref')||{}).value||'';
+  var base=(age&&wt&&ft)?calcTDEE(age,sex,wt,ft,ins,act):0;
+  var adjMap={'lean':-450,'recomp':-180,'build':280,'strength':0,'endurance':0,'return':-150};
+  var adj=adjMap[goal]!==undefined?adjMap[goal]:-300;
+  var tgt=base+adj;
+  var mac=tgt>0?calcMacros(tgt,wt,adj):{p:0,c:0,f:0};
+  btn.textContent='Calculating & sending…';btn.disabled=true;
+  try{localStorage.setItem('bbf_pathfinder',JSON.stringify({email:em,name:fn+' '+ln,goal:goal,weight:wt,schedule:sch,tdee_target:tgt,macro_p:mac.p,macro_c:mac.c,macro_f:mac.f,program:prog,ts:Date.now()}));}catch(e){}
+  try {
+    fetch('https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/27190846/u7l7ixc/', {
+      method:'POST',
+      body:JSON.stringify({
+        first_name:fn, last_name:ln, full_name:fn+' '+ln, email:em, phone:ph,
+        fitness_goal:goal, schedule:sch, program:prog,
+        tdee_target:tgt, macro_p:mac.p, macro_c:mac.c, macro_f:mac.f,
+        weight:wt, language_preference:(localStorage.getItem('bbf_lang')||'en'),
+        source:'BBF Pathfinder Form', timestamp:new Date().toISOString()
+      })
+    }).catch(function(){});
+  } catch(e) {}
+  fetch('https://formspree.io/f/mwvwjokw',{
+    method:'POST',
+    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Accept':'application/json'},
+    body:JSON.stringify({_subject:'New BBF Pathfinder Lead',first_name:fn,last_name:ln,full_name:fn+' '+ln,email:em,phone:ph,age:age,sex:sex,weight:wt,height:ft+"'"+ins+'"',activity_level:act,fitness_goal:goal,experience:exp,schedule:sch,program:prog,health_notes:hlth,referral:ref,tdee_target:tgt,macro_p:mac.p,macro_c:mac.c,macro_f:mac.f,language_preference:(localStorage.getItem('bbf_lang')||'en'),source:'BBF Pathfinder Form',timestamp:new Date().toISOString()})
+  }).finally(function(){
+    btn.textContent='Calibrate & submit →';btn.disabled=false;
+    openMod(fn,tgt,mac,sch);
+  });
+}
+function openMod(fn,tgt,mac,sch){
+  document.getElementById('m-name').textContent=fn?fn+'.':'starting line.';
+  document.getElementById('m-cal').textContent=tgt>0?tgt.toLocaleString():'—';
+  document.getElementById('m-p').textContent=mac.p||'—';
+  document.getElementById('m-c').textContent=mac.c||'—';
+  document.getElementById('m-f').textContent=mac.f||'—';
+  var p=persona('',sch);
+  var html='';
+  p.steps.forEach(function(s,i){
+    var cls=i<2?'done':i===2?'next':'soon';
+    var gl=cls==='done'?'✓':cls==='next'?'→':'○';
+    var txt=s.replace('{CAL}',tgt>0?tgt.toLocaleString():'—').replace('{PROT}',mac.p||'—');
+    html+='<div class="sm-step '+cls+'"><div class="sm-glyph">'+gl+'</div><span>'+txt+'</span></div>';
+  });
+  document.getElementById('m-steps').innerHTML=html;
+  document.getElementById('smodal').classList.add('on');
+  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
+}
+function closeMod(){document.getElementById('smodal').classList.remove('on');document.body.style.overflow='auto';}
+
+/* ═══ PARENT PLAYBOOK — Youth Athlete Selector + Modal ═══════ */
+var PP_SPORTS = [
+  {id:'football', ico:'🏈', name:'Football', positions:[

+// KPIs now live per-position on PP_SPORTS[i].positions[j].kpis — no lookup table required.
+var ppActiveSport = 'football';
+
+// Helpers — always resolve via window, safe text setter, safe HTML setter.
+function _pbSet(id, txt){ var el = document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.textContent = (txt == null ? '' : txt); }
+function _pbSetHTML(id, html){ var el = document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.innerHTML = (html == null ? '' : html); }
+function _pbEscape(s){ return String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, function(c){ return ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'})[c]; }); }
+
+function ppRenderSportBar(){
+  var bar = document.getElementById('pp-sport-bar');
+  if(!bar) return;
+  bar.innerHTML = PP_SPORTS.map(function(s){
+    var on = s.id === ppActiveSport ? ' on' : '';
+    return '<button type="button" role="tab" aria-selected="'+(on?'true':'false')+'" class="pp-sport-btn'+on+'" data-sport="'+s.id+'">'+
+      '<span class="pp-sport-ico" aria-hidden="true">'+s.ico+'</span>'+s.name+
+    '</button>';
+  }).join('');
+  Array.prototype.forEach.call(bar.querySelectorAll('.pp-sport-btn'), function(btn){
+    btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ ppActiveSport = btn.dataset.sport; ppRenderSportBar(); ppRenderPositions(); });
+  });
+}
+
+function ppRenderPositions(){
+  var grid = document.getElementById('pp-position-grid');
+  if(!grid) return;
+  var sport = PP_SPORTS.find(function(s){ return s.id === ppActiveSport; });
+  if(!sport){ grid.innerHTML = ''; return; }
+  grid.innerHTML = sport.positions.map(function(p){
+    var kpis = (p.kpis || []).slice(0,3);
+    return '<button type="button" class="pp-pos" data-sport="'+sport.id+'" data-pos="'+p.code+'" aria-label="View '+_pbEscape(p.full)+' blueprint">'+
+      '<div class="pp-pos-code">'+p.code+'<span class="pp-pos-arrow">→</span></div>'+
+      '<div class="pp-pos-name">'+_pbEscape(p.full)+'</div>'+
+      '<div class="pp-pos-kpis">'+kpis.map(function(k){ return '<span class="pp-pos-kpi">'+_pbEscape(k)+'</span>'; }).join('')+'</div>'+
+    '</button>';
+  }).join('');
+  Array.prototype.forEach.call(grid.querySelectorAll('.pp-pos'), function(btn){
+    btn.addEventListener('click', function(){ openPlaybookModal(btn.dataset.sport, btn.dataset.pos); });
+  });
+}
+
+/* Hardened modal opener — every slot write wrapped in a try/catch so a
+   single failing lookup can NEVER leave the page body.style.overflow
+   locked at 'hidden'. Functions are explicitly bound to window so
+   inline onclick handlers resolve even if the script runs in a
+   non-global scope. */
+function openPlaybookModal(sportId, posCode){
+  var modal = document.getElementById('playbook-modal');
+  if(!modal) return;
+  try {
+    if(sportId === 'parent'){
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-tag', 'Laboratory · Parent Transformation');
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-ico', '👨‍👩‍👧‍👦');
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-sport', 'Family Performance Series');
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-pos-code', 'Busy Parent');
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-pos-name', 'Adaptive metabolic tiers · 12:12 / 14:10 / 16:8');
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-lede', 'The Sovereign protocol for parents. A four-week on-ramp that meets you at your worst week, not your best — metabolic recalibration, prehab layering, and a session template built for a schedule that changes without notice.');
+      _pbSetHTML('pb-modal-kpis', ['Sleep-Debt Aware','Joint Longevity','Adaptive Tiers','Youth Athlete Bonus'].map(function(k){ return '<span class="pb-modal-kpi">'+_pbEscape(k)+'</span>'; }).join(''));
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-drill-n', 'Sovereign Cadence Anchor');
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-drill-f', 'Adaptive session template that shifts between 12:12, 14:10, and 16:8 metabolic tiers as the week dictates. Prehab and recovery are non-negotiable across all three.');
+      _pbSetHTML('pb-modal-metrics', [
+        {k:'Weeks',v:'4 + roll'},
+        {k:'Cadence',v:'Adaptive'},
+        {k:'Tier switch',v:'Weekly OK'}
+      ].map(function(m){ return '<div class="pb-modal-metric"><div class="pb-modal-metric-k">'+_pbEscape(m.k)+'</div><div class="pb-modal-metric-v">'+_pbEscape(m.v)+'</div></div>'; }).join(''));
+    } else {
+      var sport = PP_SPORTS.find(function(s){ return s.id === sportId; });
+      if(!sport) throw new Error('unknown sport: '+sportId);
+      var position = sport.positions.find(function(p){ return p.code === posCode; });
+      if(!position) throw new Error('unknown position: '+posCode+' in '+sportId);
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-tag', 'Laboratory · Positional Blueprint');
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-ico', sport.ico);
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-sport', sport.name + ' · Position Analysis');
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-pos-code', position.code);
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-pos-name', position.full);
+      _pbSet('pb-modal-lede', position.head ? position.head+' '+(position.focus||'') : (position.focus || ''));
+      var kpiArr = position.kpis || [];
+      _pbSetHTML('pb-modal-kpis', kpiArr.map(function(k){ return '<span class="pb-modal-kpi">'+_pbEscape(k)+'</span>'; }).join(''));
+      if(position.drill){
+        _pbSet('pb-modal-drill-n', position.drill.n);
+        _pbSet('pb-modal-drill-f', position.drill.f);
+      }
+      var metricsArr = position.metrics || [];
+      _pbSetHTML('pb-modal-metrics', metricsArr.map(function(m){ return '<div class="pb-modal-metric"><div class="pb-modal-metric-k">'+_pbEscape(m.k)+'</div><div class="pb-modal-metric-v">'+_pbEscape(m.v)+'</div></div>'; }).join(''));
+    }
+    modal.classList.add('on');
+    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
+  } catch(err){
+    // Never leave the body locked if population threw mid-write.
+    try { document.body.style.overflow = 'auto'; } catch(e){}
+    if(window.console && console.error) console.error('[playbook-modal] open failed:', err);
+  }
+}
+
+function closePlaybookModal(){
+  var modal = document.getElementById('playbook-modal');
+  if(modal) modal.classList.remove('on');
+  try { document.body.style.overflow = 'auto'; } catch(e){}
+}
+
+// Expose on window so inline onclick handlers resolve even if this script
+// is ever hoisted into a module/IIFE scope by a downstream tool.
+window.openPlaybookModal  = openPlaybookModal;
+window.closePlaybookModal = closePlaybookModal;
+
+(function ppInit(){
+  try { ppRenderSportBar(); } catch(e){}
+  try { ppRenderPositions(); } catch(e){}
+  var modal = document.getElementById('playbook-modal');
+  if(modal){
+    modal.addEventListener('click', function(e){ if(e.target === modal) closePlaybookModal(); });
+  }
+  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
+    if(e.key === 'Escape' && modal && modal.classList.contains('on')) closePlaybookModal();
+  });
+  // Absolute safety net: if anything else nukes body overflow, never let
+  // the page soft-lock for more than a frame after the modal is hidden.
+  if(modal){
+    modal.addEventListener('transitionend', function(){
+      if(!modal.classList.contains('on')) document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
+    });
+  }
+})();
+
+/* ═══ TRILINGUAL TOGGLE — EN | ES | PT ═══════════════════════
+   Persists selection to localStorage('bbf_lang') and emits a
+   'bbflang:change' CustomEvent so bbf-lang.js (loaded below)
+   can sync. Works standalone if bbf-lang.js is unavailable. */
+(function langInit(){
+  var tog = document.getElementById('bbf-lang-placeholder');
+  if(!tog) return;
+  var btns = tog.querySelectorAll('.lang-btn');
+  function setActive(lang, skipEngine){
+    Array.prototype.forEach.call(btns, function(b){
+      var on = b.dataset.lang === lang;
+      b.classList.toggle('on', on);
+      b.classList.toggle('lang-active', on);
+      b.setAttribute('aria-pressed', on ? 'true' : 'false');
+    });
+    try{ localStorage.setItem('bbf_lang', lang); }catch(e){}
+    try{ document.documentElement.setAttribute('lang', lang); }catch(e){}
+    try{ document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('bbflang:change', {detail:{lang:lang}})); }catch(e){}
+    // Drive the bbf-lang.js translator — source of truth for DOM rewrites.
+    if(!skipEngine && window.BBF_LANG && typeof window.BBF_LANG.set === 'function'){
+      try { window.BBF_LANG.set(lang); } catch(e){}
+    }
+  }
+  Array.prototype.forEach.call(btns, function(b){
+    b.addEventListener('click', function(){ setActive(b.dataset.lang); });
+  });
+  // If bbf-lang.js has not loaded yet when we init, wait for it and re-apply.
+  var saved = null;
+  try{ saved = localStorage.getItem('bbf_lang'); }catch(e){}
+  if(saved && /^(en|es|pt)$/.test(saved)) setActive(saved, true);
+  function engineApplyWhenReady(){
+    if(window.BBF_LANG && typeof window.BBF_LANG.apply === 'function'){
+      try { window.BBF_LANG.apply(); } catch(e){}
+      return true;
+    }
+    return false;
+  }
+  if(!engineApplyWhenReady()){
+    var tries = 0, iv = setInterval(function(){
+      tries++;
+      if(engineApplyWhenReady() || tries > 40) clearInterval(iv);
+    }, 150);
+  }
+})();
+
+// === TWEAKS HOST INTEGRATION ===
+(function(){
+  function applyTweaks(t){
+    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--volt',t.accent);
+    // derive secondary
+    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--volt2',t.accent);
+    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--violet',t.violet);
+    // derive violet2 (lighter)
+    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--violet2',t.violet);
+    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--hd',t.headline+",'Arial Black',sans-serif");
+    // reflect selection in panel
+    document.querySelectorAll('#tw-accents .tw-sw').forEach(function(b){b.classList.toggle('on',b.dataset.accent===t.accent);});
+    document.querySelectorAll('#tw-violets .tw-sw').forEach(function(b){b.classList.toggle('on',b.dataset.violet===t.violet);});
+    document.querySelectorAll('#tw-heads button').forEach(function(b){b.classList.toggle('on',b.dataset.head===t.headline);});
+  }
+  applyTweaks(TWEAKS);
+
+  function push(edits){
+    Object.assign(TWEAKS,edits);applyTweaks(TWEAKS);
+    try{window.parent.postMessage({type:'__edit_mode_set_keys',edits:edits},'*');}catch(e){}
+  }
+  document.querySelectorAll('#tw-accents .tw-sw').forEach(function(b){b.onclick=function(){push({accent:b.dataset.accent});};});
+  document.querySelectorAll('#tw-violets .tw-sw').forEach(function(b){b.onclick=function(){push({violet:b.dataset.violet});};});
+  document.querySelectorAll('#tw-heads button').forEach(function(b){b.onclick=function(){push({headline:b.dataset.head});};});
+
+  window.addEventListener('message',function(e){
+    var d=e.data||{};
+    if(d.type==='__activate_edit_mode'){document.getElementById('tw-panel').classList.add('on');}
+    if(d.type==='__deactivate_edit_mode'){document.getElementById('tw-panel').classList.remove('on');}
+  });
+  try{window.parent.postMessage({type:'__edit_mode_available'},'*');}catch(e){}
+})();
+
+/* ============ GOD MODE RUNTIME ============ */
+(function(){
+  // Scroll rail
+  var bar = document.getElementById('scroll-bar');
+  function updateRail(){
+    var h = document.documentElement;
+    var pct = (h.scrollTop || document.body.scrollTop) / Math.max(1, (h.scrollHeight - h.clientHeight)) * 100;
+    bar.style.setProperty('--p', pct.toFixed(2)+'%');
+  }
+  window.addEventListener('scroll', updateRail, {passive:true});
+  updateRail();
+
+  // HUD clock (UTC)
+  var timeEl = document.getElementById('hud-time');
+  var idEl = document.getElementById('hud-id');
+  var cycleEl = document.getElementById('seal-cycle');
+  function pad(n){return String(n).padStart(2,'0');}
+  function tick(){
+    var d = new Date();
+    timeEl.textContent = pad(d.getUTCHours())+':'+pad(d.getUTCMinutes())+':'+pad(d.getUTCSeconds());
+  }
+  tick(); setInterval(tick, 1000);
+  // Rotating session ID (just visual)
+  var sid = Math.floor(800 + Math.random()*199);
+  idEl.textContent = String(sid).padStart(4,'0');
+  var cycle = Math.floor(10 + Math.random()*40);
+  if(cycleEl) cycleEl.textContent = 'C-'+cycle;
+
+  // Kinetic headline char-split (hover lift) — wrap each word, then each char
+  var mega = document.querySelector('h1.megah');
+  if(mega && !mega.dataset.split){
+    mega.dataset.split = '1';
+    function splitText(el){
+      var kids = Array.from(el.childNodes); // snapshot
+      kids.forEach(function(node){
+        if(node.nodeType === 3){ // text node
+          var frag = document.createDocumentFragment();
+          var text = node.textContent;
+          // split on whitespace preserving spaces
+          var tokens = text.split(/(\s+)/);
+          tokens.forEach(function(tok){
+            if(tok===''){return;}
+            if(/^\s+$/.test(tok)){
+              frag.appendChild(document.createTextNode(tok));
+              return;
+            }
+            var wspan = document.createElement('span');
+            wspan.className = 'word';
+            tok.split('').forEach(function(ch){
+              var s = document.createElement('span');
+              s.className='char'; s.textContent=ch;
+              wspan.appendChild(s);
+            });
+            frag.appendChild(wspan);
+          });
+          node.parentNode.replaceChild(frag, node);
+        } else if(node.nodeType===1 && node.tagName!=='BR' && !node.classList.contains('char') && !node.classList.contains('word')){
+          splitText(node); // recurse into spans (outline, volt, slash)
+        }
+      });
+    }
+    splitText(mega);
+  }
+
+  // Rupture section: trigger the break + glitch + shader pulse on entry; variable-font axes follow cursor
+  var rupEl = document.getElementById('rupture');
+  if(rupEl){
+    var rupObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
+      entries.forEach(function(e){
+        if(e.isIntersecting){
+          rupEl.classList.add('ruptured');
+          rupEl.classList.add('burst');
+          if(window.fireRupture) window.fireRupture();
+          setTimeout(function(){ rupEl.classList.remove('burst'); }, 600);
+          rupObs.unobserve(rupEl);
+        }
+      });
+    },{threshold:0.35});
+    rupObs.observe(rupEl);
+
+    // Cursor-driven variable-font deformation on headline lines
+    var rupLines = rupEl.querySelectorAll('.rup-line');
+    rupEl.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e){
+      var rr = rupEl.getBoundingClientRect();
+      var mx = e.clientX, my = e.clientY;
+      rupLines.forEach(function(line){
+        var lr = line.getBoundingClientRect();
+        var cx = lr.left + lr.width/2;
+        var cy = lr.top + lr.height/2;
+        var dx = (mx-cx)/lr.width;
+        var dy = (my-cy)/(lr.height*3);
+        var d = Math.min(1, Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy));
+        // Closer cursor → heavier wght, softer SOFT, larger opsz
+        var wght = 500 + (1-d)*500;          // 500→1000
+        var soft = 30 + (1-d)*70;            // 30→100
+        var opsz = 60 + (1-d)*84;            // 60→144
+        line.style.fontVariationSettings =
+          '"opsz" '+opsz.toFixed(0)+', "wght" '+wght.toFixed(0)+', "SOFT" '+soft.toFixed(0);
+      });
+    });
+    rupEl.addEventListener('pointerleave', function(){
+      rupLines.forEach(function(line){
+        line.style.fontVariationSettings = '"opsz" 144, "wght" 500, "SOFT" 30';
+      });
+    });
+  }
+
+  // Protocol step reveal
+  var ptObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
+    entries.forEach(function(e){ if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('vis'); ptObs.unobserve(e.target);}});
+  },{threshold:0.2});
+  document.querySelectorAll('.pt-step').forEach(function(el){ ptObs.observe(el);});
+
+  // Magnetic CTA
+  document.querySelectorAll('.btn-primary, .cta-nav').forEach(function(btn){
+    btn.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e){
+      var r = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
+      var x = (e.clientX - r.left - r.width/2) / (r.width/2);
+      var y = (e.clientY - r.top - r.height/2) / (r.height/2);
+      btn.style.transform = 'translate('+(x*4).toFixed(1)+'px,'+(y*3).toFixed(1)+'px)';
+    });
+    btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(){ btn.style.transform=''; });
+  });
+
+  // Cursor spotlight
+  var sp = document.getElementById('spotlight');
+  window.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e){
+    sp.style.setProperty('--mx', e.clientX+'px');
+    sp.style.setProperty('--my', e.clientY+'px');
+  }, {passive:true});
+
+  // 3D tilt on hero-art + tier.flag
+  function bindTilt(el, maxDeg){
+    maxDeg = maxDeg||7;
+    el.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e){
+      var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
+      var x = (e.clientX - r.left)/r.width - .5;
+      var y = (e.clientY - r.top)/r.height - .5;
+      el.style.transform = 'perspective(1200px) rotateY('+(x*maxDeg).toFixed(2)+'deg) rotateX('+(-y*maxDeg).toFixed(2)+'deg) translateZ(0)';
+    });
+    el.addEventListener('pointerleave', function(){ el.style.transform=''; });
+  }
+  document.querySelectorAll('.hero-art, .tier.flag, .pt-step').forEach(function(el){ bindTilt(el, 5); });
+
+  // Live-pulse metrics (subtle drift)
+  var liveEls = {
+    hrv: {el:document.querySelector('[data-live=hrv]'), base:68, jitter:4, dec:0},
+    adh: {el:document.querySelector('[data-live=adh]'), base:94.2, jitter:.6, dec:1},
+    q:   {el:document.querySelector('[data-live=q]'), base:7, jitter:0, dec:0}
+  };
+  function jitterOne(k){
+    var o = liveEls[k]; if(!o||!o.el) return;
+    var v = o.base + (Math.random()-.5)*2*o.jitter;
+    o.el.textContent = v.toFixed(o.dec);
+  }
+  setInterval(function(){ jitterOne('hrv'); }, 2200);
+  setInterval(function(){ jitterOne('adh'); }, 3400);
+
+  // Animate headline glow on scroll into view once
+  var heroH1 = document.querySelector('h1.megah');
+  // (drop-shadow removed — was inflating perceived size)
+
+  // Section-header curtain wipe + pillar drop on sec-titles
+  document.querySelectorAll('.sec-head .sec-title').forEach(function(t){
+    if(t.dataset.dropped) return;
+    t.dataset.dropped = '1';
+    // Wrap each text-node word (and each inline child) in .drop > span so overflow:hidden clips
+    var out = document.createDocumentFragment();
+    Array.from(t.childNodes).forEach(function(node){
+      if(node.nodeType === 3){
+        var words = node.textContent.split(/(\s+)/);
+        words.forEach(function(w){
+          if(w === '') return;
+          if(/^\s+$/.test(w)){ out.appendChild(document.createTextNode(w)); return; }
+          var drop = document.createElement('span');
+          drop.className = 'drop';
+          var inner = document.createElement('span');
+          inner.textContent = w;
+          drop.appendChild(inner);
+          out.appendChild(drop);
+        });
+      } else if(node.nodeType === 1){
+        // Already a span (e.g. .volt/.outline) — wrap its content in .drop > span, keeping class on outer
+        var drop = document.createElement('span');
+        drop.className = 'drop';
+        var inner = document.createElement('span');
+        // transfer className and innerHTML so color/outline styles still apply
+        inner.className = node.className;
+        inner.innerHTML = node.innerHTML;
+        drop.appendChild(inner);
+        out.appendChild(drop);
+      }
+    });
+    t.innerHTML = '';
+    t.appendChild(out);
+  });
+  var shObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){
+    entries.forEach(function(e){
+      if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('curtain-in'); shObs.unobserve(e.target); }
+    });
+  }, {threshold:0.25, rootMargin:'0px 0px -60px 0px'});
+  document.querySelectorAll('.sec-head').forEach(function(el){ shObs.observe(el); });
+})();
+</script>
