+<!-- ============ PROMETHEAN TIER JS ============ -->
+<script>
+(function(){
+  'use strict';
+  var prefersReduced = matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
+
+  /* ========== 1. TERMINAL BOOT SEQUENCE ========== */
+  var boot = document.getElementById('prom-boot');
+  var bootStart = performance.now();
+
+  var HEX = '0123456789ABCDEF';
+  function randHex(n){var s='';for(var i=0;i<n;i++)s+=HEX[Math.random()*16|0];return s;}
+  function randFloat(lo,hi,dec){return (lo+Math.random()*(hi-lo)).toFixed(dec==null?2:dec);}
+  function pick(arr){return arr[arr.length*Math.random()|0];}
+
+  var MARKERS = ['HRV','VO2','SPO2','LOAD','REST','NREM','REM','PWR','ADH','VEL','FTP','RHR','HR','SBP','DBP','CRP','TRN'];
+  var STATES = ['NOMINAL','STABLE','LOCKED','OK','GREEN','ADAPT','WARM','READY'];
+  var CHANNELS = ['VO-001','NX-042','HB-117','TL-009','CX-331','AX-214','OR-661'];
+
+  function bootLine(colClass){
+    var type = Math.random();
+    var txt;
+    if(type < 0.4){
+      // marker row
+      txt = '<em>'+pick(MARKERS).padEnd(4,' ')+'</em>  <b>'+randFloat(30,180,1)+'</b> · '+pick(STATES);
+    } else if(type < 0.7){
+      // hex packet
+      txt = '0x'+randHex(6)+' <b>'+randHex(8)+'</b> '+randHex(4);
+    } else if(type < 0.85){
+      // channel
+      txt = '◆ '+pick(CHANNELS)+' ← <b>'+randHex(10)+'</b>';
+    } else {
+      // biometric
+      txt = '['+randHex(2)+'] '+pick(MARKERS)+'='+randFloat(0.1,99.9,2)+'<b>'+pick(['ms','bpm','%','mV','u','W'])+'</b>';
+    }
+    return txt;
+  }
+
+  function updateBootTs(){
+    var d = new Date();
+    var pad = function(n,w){n=''+n;while(n.length<(w||2))n='0'+n;return n;};
+    var ts = d.getFullYear()+'.'+pad(d.getMonth()+1)+'.'+pad(d.getDate())+' · '+pad(d.getHours())+':'+pad(d.getMinutes())+':'+pad(d.getSeconds());
+    var el = document.getElementById('prom-boot-ts');
+    if(el) el.textContent = ts;
+  }
+  updateBootTs();
+  var tsTick = setInterval(updateBootTs, 1000);
+
+  var cols = boot ? boot.querySelectorAll('.boot-col') : [];
+  var bootRows = [[],[],[]];
+  var MAX_ROWS = 22;
+
+  function tickBoot(){
+    if(!boot || boot.classList.contains('shattering')) return;
+    cols.forEach(function(col, ci){
+      // add 1–3 rows per tick per column
+      var batch = 1 + (Math.random()*3|0);
+      for(var j=0;j<batch;j++){
+        var row = document.createElement('div');
+        row.className = 'boot-row';
+        row.innerHTML = bootLine();
+        col.appendChild(row);
+        bootRows[ci].push(row);
+      }
+      while(bootRows[ci].length > MAX_ROWS){
+        var old = bootRows[ci].shift();
+        if(old && old.parentNode) old.parentNode.removeChild(old);
+      }
+    });
+  }
+
+  var bootInterval = null;
+  if(boot && !prefersReduced){
+    bootInterval = setInterval(tickBoot, 70);
+    // Shatter at 2s
+    setTimeout(function(){
+      clearInterval(bootInterval);
+      boot.classList.add('shattering');
+      setTimeout(function(){
+        boot.classList.add('gone');
+        document.body.classList.remove('prom-booting');
+        clearInterval(tsTick);
+      }, 900);
+    }, 2000);
+  } else if(boot){
+    boot.classList.add('gone');
+    document.body.classList.remove('prom-booting');
+  }
+
+  /* ========== 2. LIVING CANVAS — WEBGL VOLUMETRIC FIELD ========== */
+  var canvas = document.getElementById('living-canvas');
+  if(canvas && !prefersReduced){
+    var gl = canvas.getContext('webgl', {premultipliedAlpha:false, alpha:true, antialias:false}) ||
+             canvas.getContext('experimental-webgl', {premultipliedAlpha:false, alpha:true, antialias:false});
+    if(!gl){
+      // Fallback — just hide
+      canvas.style.display = 'none';
+    } else {
+    var dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio||1, 1.5);
+    var W=0, H=0;
+
+    var VSRC = 'attribute vec2 p;void main(){gl_Position=vec4(p,0.0,1.0);}';
+    var FSRC = [
+      'precision highp float;',
+      'uniform vec2 u_res;',
+      'uniform float u_time;',
+      'uniform vec2 u_mouse;',
+      'uniform float u_mouseAmp;',
+      'uniform float u_scroll;',
+      'uniform float u_rupture;',
+      // hash + noise
+      'float hash(vec2 p){return fract(sin(dot(p,vec2(127.1,311.7)))*43758.5453);}',
+      'float noise(vec2 p){vec2 i=floor(p);vec2 f=fract(p);vec2 u=f*f*(3.0-2.0*f);',
+        'return mix(mix(hash(i),hash(i+vec2(1,0)),u.x),mix(hash(i+vec2(0,1)),hash(i+vec2(1,1)),u.x),u.y);}',
+      'float fbm(vec2 p){float v=0.0;float a=0.5;',
+        'for(int i=0;i<5;i++){v+=a*noise(p);p=p*2.03+vec2(1.7,9.2);a*=0.5;}return v;}',
+      'void main(){',
+        'vec2 uv=(gl_FragCoord.xy-0.5*u_res)/u_res.y;',
+        'vec2 m=(u_mouse-0.5*u_res)/u_res.y;',
+        'float t=u_time*0.035;',
+        // domain warp
+        'vec2 q=vec2(fbm(uv*1.2+t),fbm(uv*1.2-t+vec2(5.2,1.3)));',
+        'vec2 r=vec2(fbm(uv*2.1+q+t*0.7+vec2(1.7,9.2)),fbm(uv*2.1+q-t*0.7+vec2(8.3,2.8)));',
+        'float f=fbm(uv*1.8+r*1.6+t*0.4);',
+        // scroll shear (subtle)
+        'f+=sin(uv.y*8.0+u_scroll*0.02)*0.015;',
+        // cursor bloom
+        'float md=length(uv-m);',
+        'float bloom=exp(-md*3.5)*u_mouseAmp;',
+        // rupture burst: radial bands from center
+        'float rup=0.0;',
+        'if(u_rupture>0.001){',
+          'float d=length(uv);',
+          'rup=sin(d*30.0-u_rupture*12.0)*exp(-d*2.0)*u_rupture;',
+        '}',
+        // composite color — gold core, cyan accents
+        'vec3 gold=vec3(0.961,0.784,0.0);',
+        'vec3 cyan=vec3(0.0,0.898,1.0);',
+        'vec3 violet=vec3(0.42,0.24,0.78);',
+        'float intensity=pow(f,1.6)*0.9+bloom*0.8+rup*0.4;',
+        'float mixg=smoothstep(0.3,0.85,f+q.x*0.3);',
+        'vec3 col=mix(violet*0.3,gold,mixg);',
+        'col=mix(col,cyan,smoothstep(0.6,0.95,r.y+bloom*0.5));',
+        'col*=intensity;',
+        // vignette
+        'col*=smoothstep(1.4,0.3,length(uv)*0.9);',
+        // grain
+        'col+=(hash(gl_FragCoord.xy+u_time)-0.5)*0.03;',
+        'float alpha=clamp(intensity*0.85+bloom*0.3+abs(rup)*0.5,0.0,1.0);',
+        'gl_FragColor=vec4(col,alpha);',
+      '}'
+    ].join('\n');
+
+    function compile(type, src){
+      var s = gl.createShader(type);
+      gl.shaderSource(s, src);
+      gl.compileShader(s);
+      if(!gl.getShaderParameter(s, gl.COMPILE_STATUS)){
+        console.error('shader', gl.getShaderInfoLog(s));
+        return null;
+      }
+      return s;
+    }
+    var vs = compile(gl.VERTEX_SHADER, VSRC);
+    var fs = compile(gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER, FSRC);
+    var prog = gl.createProgram();
+    gl.attachShader(prog, vs); gl.attachShader(prog, fs); gl.linkProgram(prog);
+    gl.useProgram(prog);
+
+    var buf = gl.createBuffer();
+    gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, buf);
+    gl.bufferData(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, new Float32Array([-1,-1, 1,-1, -1,1, 1,1]), gl.STATIC_DRAW);
+    var loc_p = gl.getAttribLocation(prog, 'p');
+    gl.enableVertexAttribArray(loc_p);
+    gl.vertexAttribPointer(loc_p, 2, gl.FLOAT, false, 0, 0);
+
+    var u_res = gl.getUniformLocation(prog, 'u_res');
+    var u_time = gl.getUniformLocation(prog, 'u_time');
+    var u_mouse = gl.getUniformLocation(prog, 'u_mouse');
+    var u_mouseAmp = gl.getUniformLocation(prog, 'u_mouseAmp');
+    var u_scroll = gl.getUniformLocation(prog, 'u_scroll');
+    var u_rupture = gl.getUniformLocation(prog, 'u_rupture');
+
+    gl.enable(gl.BLEND);
+    gl.blendFunc(gl.SRC_ALPHA, gl.ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA);
+
+    function resize(){
+      W = window.innerWidth; H = window.innerHeight;
+      canvas.style.width = W+'px'; canvas.style.height = H+'px';
+      canvas.width = Math.floor(W*dpr); canvas.height = Math.floor(H*dpr);
+      gl.viewport(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
+    }
+    window.addEventListener('resize', resize); resize();
+
+    var mouse = {x:-9999, y:-9999, tx:-9999, ty:-9999, amp:0, tAmp:0};
+    window.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e){
+      mouse.tx = e.clientX * dpr;
+      mouse.ty = (H - e.clientY) * dpr;
+      mouse.tAmp = 1.0;
+    });
+    window.addEventListener('pointerleave', function(){ mouse.tAmp = 0; });
+
+    var scrollVel = 0, lastScroll = window.scrollY;
+    window.addEventListener('scroll', function(){
+      var s = window.scrollY;
+      scrollVel = scrollVel*0.7 + (s-lastScroll)*0.3;
+      lastScroll = s;
+    }, {passive:true});
+
+    // Rupture pulse — exposed globally so scroll trigger can fire it
+    window.__rupturePulse = 0;
+    window.fireRupture = function(){ window.__rupturePulse = 1; };
+
+    var start = performance.now();
+    function frame(){
+      var now = performance.now();
+      var t = (now-start)/1000;
+      mouse.x += (mouse.tx-mouse.x)*0.12;
+      mouse.y += (mouse.ty-mouse.y)*0.12;
+      mouse.amp += (mouse.tAmp-mouse.amp)*0.08;
+      window.__rupturePulse *= 0.94;
+      if(window.__rupturePulse < 0.002) window.__rupturePulse = 0;
+
+      gl.uniform2f(u_res, canvas.width, canvas.height);
+      gl.uniform1f(u_time, t);
+      gl.uniform2f(u_mouse, mouse.x, mouse.y);
+      gl.uniform1f(u_mouseAmp, mouse.amp);
+      gl.uniform1f(u_scroll, window.scrollY);
+      gl.uniform1f(u_rupture, window.__rupturePulse);
+      gl.drawArrays(gl.TRIANGLE_STRIP, 0, 4);
+      requestAnimationFrame(frame);
+    }
+    requestAnimationFrame(frame);
+    }
+  }
+
+  /* legacy block below is bypassed */
+  if(false){
+    var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
+    var W=0, H=0, dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio||1, 2);
+
+    function resize(){
+      W = window.innerWidth;
+      H = window.innerHeight;
+      canvas.style.width = W+'px';
+      canvas.style.height = H+'px';
+      canvas.width = W*dpr; canvas.height = H*dpr;
+      ctx.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0);
+    }
+    window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
+    resize();
+
+    // Mouse state with smoothing
+    var mouse = {x:-9999, y:-9999, active:false, tx:-9999, ty:-9999};
+    window.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e){
+      mouse.tx = e.clientX;
+      mouse.ty = e.clientY;
+      mouse.active = true;
+    });
+    window.addEventListener('pointerleave', function(){ mouse.active = false; });
+
+    // Build particles — density scales with viewport area but capped
+    var area = W*H;
+    var count = Math.min(180, Math.max(70, Math.floor(area / 14000)));
+    var particles = [];
+    for(var i=0;i<count;i++){
+      var isCyan = Math.random() < 0.32;
+      particles.push({
+        x: Math.random()*W,
+        y: Math.random()*H,
+        vx: (Math.random()-.5)*.28,
+        vy: (Math.random()-.5)*.28,
+        r: 0.6 + Math.random()*1.6,
+        hue: isCyan ? 'cyan' : 'gold',
+        phase: Math.random()*Math.PI*2,
+        twinkle: 0.4 + Math.random()*0.6,
+      });
+    }
+
+    var CYAN = 'rgba(0,229,255,';
+    var GOLD = 'rgba(245,200,0,';
+    var LINK_DIST = 130;
+    var LINK_DIST_SQ = LINK_DIST*LINK_DIST;
+    var REPEL_R = 160;
+    var REPEL_R_SQ = REPEL_R*REPEL_R;
+
+    function step(t){
+      // smooth mouse
+      if(mouse.active){
+        mouse.x += (mouse.tx - mouse.x) * 0.18;
+        mouse.y += (mouse.ty - mouse.y) * 0.18;
+      }
+
+      ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
+
+      // Draw links first (below nodes)
+      // Spatial speedup — grid bucketing
+      var cell = LINK_DIST;
+      var cols2 = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(W/cell));
+      var rows2 = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(H/cell));
+      var grid = new Array(cols2*rows2);
+      for(var g=0;g<grid.length;g++) grid[g]=null;
+      for(var i=0;i<particles.length;i++){
+        var p=particles[i];
+        var cx=Math.min(cols2-1,Math.max(0,Math.floor(p.x/cell)));
+        var cy=Math.min(rows2-1,Math.max(0,Math.floor(p.y/cell)));
+        var key=cy*cols2+cx;
+        if(!grid[key]) grid[key]=[];
+        grid[key].push(i);
+      }
+      // Link pass
+      ctx.lineWidth = 0.6;
+      for(var cy2=0;cy2<rows2;cy2++){
+        for(var cx2=0;cx2<cols2;cx2++){
+          var bucket = grid[cy2*cols2+cx2];
+          if(!bucket) continue;
+          // neighbors: self + right + down-left + down + down-right
+          var neighbors = [];
+          var dxs=[0,1,-1,0,1], dys=[0,0,1,1,1];
+          for(var n=0;n<5;n++){
+            var nx=cx2+dxs[n], ny=cy2+dys[n];
+            if(nx<0||nx>=cols2||ny<0||ny>=rows2) continue;
+            var nb=grid[ny*cols2+nx];
+            if(nb) neighbors.push(nb);
+          }
+          for(var a=0;a<bucket.length;a++){
+            var pa=particles[bucket[a]];
+            for(var nbi=0;nbi<neighbors.length;nbi++){
+              var list=neighbors[nbi];
+              for(var b=0;b<list.length;b++){
+                var idxB=list[b];
+                if(idxB<=bucket[a]) continue;
+                var pb=particles[idxB];
+                var dx=pa.x-pb.x, dy=pa.y-pb.y;
+                var d2=dx*dx+dy*dy;
+                if(d2<LINK_DIST_SQ){
+                  var alpha = (1 - d2/LINK_DIST_SQ) * 0.35;
+                  var mix = (pa.hue===pb.hue) ? pa.hue : 'mix';
+                  if(mix==='cyan') ctx.strokeStyle = CYAN+alpha.toFixed(3)+')';
+                  else if(mix==='gold') ctx.strokeStyle = GOLD+alpha.toFixed(3)+')';
+                  else ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(180,215,160,'+alpha.toFixed(3)+')';
+                  ctx.beginPath();
+                  ctx.moveTo(pa.x,pa.y);
+                  ctx.lineTo(pb.x,pb.y);
+                  ctx.stroke();
+                }
+              }
+            }
+          }
+        }
+      }
+
+      // Update + draw nodes
+      var mx=mouse.x, my=mouse.y, active=mouse.active;
+      for(var k=0;k<particles.length;k++){
+        var p=particles[k];
+
+        // Cursor gravity: repel cyan, attract gold (creates weaving)
+        if(active){
+          var ddx=p.x-mx, ddy=p.y-my;
+          var dd2=ddx*ddx+ddy*ddy;
+          if(dd2 < REPEL_R_SQ && dd2 > 1){
+            var dd=Math.sqrt(dd2);
+            var force = (1 - dd/REPEL_R);
+            force = force*force*0.55;
+            if(p.hue==='cyan'){
+              // repel
+              p.vx += (ddx/dd) * force;
+              p.vy += (ddy/dd) * force;
+            } else {
+              // attract
+              p.vx -= (ddx/dd) * force * 0.6;
+              p.vy -= (ddy/dd) * force * 0.6;
+            }
+          }
+        }
+
+        // Integrate + damp
+        p.x += p.vx;
+        p.y += p.vy;
+        p.vx *= 0.965;
+        p.vy *= 0.965;
+
+        // Gentle drift
+        p.vx += (Math.random()-.5)*0.012;
+        p.vy += (Math.random()-.5)*0.012;
+
+        // Wrap edges
+        if(p.x < -10) p.x = W+10;
+        else if(p.x > W+10) p.x = -10;
+        if(p.y < -10) p.y = H+10;
+        else if(p.y > H+10) p.y = -10;
+
+        // Twinkle
+        p.phase += 0.02;
+        var tw = 0.5 + 0.5*Math.sin(p.phase) * p.twinkle;
+        var alpha = 0.35 + 0.55*tw;
+
+        var col = p.hue==='cyan' ? CYAN : GOLD;
+        ctx.fillStyle = col + alpha.toFixed(3) + ')';
+        ctx.beginPath();
+        ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI*2);
+        ctx.fill();
+
+        // Glow halo on brighter particles
+        if(p.r > 1.4){
+          ctx.fillStyle = col + (alpha*0.18).toFixed(3) + ')';
+          ctx.beginPath();
+          ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r*3.2, 0, Math.PI*2);
+          ctx.fill();
+        }
+      }
+
+      requestAnimationFrame(step);
+    }
+    requestAnimationFrame(step);
+  }
+
+  /* ========== 3. 3D PARALLAX TILT ========== */
+  // Set up perspective on document root and tilt <main> + fixed HUD on mouse
+  if(!prefersReduced){
+    var html = document.documentElement;
+    html.style.perspective = '2000px';
+    html.style.perspectiveOrigin = '50% 50%';
+
+    // Lift specific elements in Z so tilt reveals depth
+    var depthMap = [
+      {sel: '.fuel-widget', z: 40},
+      {sel: '.hero-readout', z: 30},
+      {sel: '.hero-art', z: 50},
+      {sel: '#hud', z: 50},
+      {sel: '.tier.flag', z: 36}
+    ];
+    depthMap.forEach(function(d){
+      document.querySelectorAll(d.sel).forEach(function(el){
+        el.style.transform = (el.style.transform || '') + ' translateZ('+d.z+'px)';
+        el.style.transformStyle = 'preserve-3d';
+      });
+    });
+    // Body tilt removed — was causing wonky page sway
+  }
+})();
+</script>
+<!-- Trilingual translation engine (hooks into #bbf-lang-placeholder + bbflang:change) -->
+<script src="bbf-lang.js" defer></script>
+</body>
+</html>

+<!DOCTYPE html>

+<head>

+<script src="workout-data.js"></script>
+<script src="meal-data.js"></script>
+<style>
+:root{--pur:#1a0338;--yel:#f5c800;--blk:#060606;--card:#0d0118;--brd:#1f1530;--mut:#888;--grn:#22c55e}
+*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
+body{background:var(--blk);color:#f0f0f0;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;padding:24px}
+.hdr{text-align:center;margin-bottom:2rem;padding-bottom:1rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--brd)}
+.hdr h1{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--yel)}
+.hdr p{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--mut)}
+.tabs{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
+.tab-btn{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;letter-spacing:2px;padding:8px 18px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--brd);color:var(--mut);border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer}.tab-btn.on{background:var(--pur);color:var(--yel);border-color:var(--pur)}
+.panel{display:none}.panel.on{display:block}
+.item{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--brd);border-radius:6px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}
+.item-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px}
+.item-title{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--yel)}
+.item-badge{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;background:rgba(42,10,85,.2);color:var(--pur);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:2px}
+.row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:60px 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;align-items:center}
+.row-lbl{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--mut);text-transform:uppercase}
+.row input{background:#060606;border:1px solid var(--brd);color:#fff;padding:6px 10px;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;border-radius:3px;outline:none}.row input:focus{border-color:var(--pur)}
+.save-btn{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;letter-spacing:2px;background:var(--grn);color:#fff;border:none;padding:8px 20px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px}

+<div class="hdr">
+<h1>&#x1F9EA; LAB CONTENT EDITOR</h1>
+<p>NASM-Verify trilingual drill and meal data. Changes save to browser for testing.</p>
+</div>
+<div class="tabs">
+<button class="tab-btn on" onclick="showPanel('drills')">DRILLS</button>
+<button class="tab-btn" onclick="showPanel('meals')">MEALS</button>

+<div class="panel" id="panel-meals"></div>
+<div class="seal">Built on the Sovereign Gold Standard. Data-driven, Athlete-tested.</div>
+<script>
+function showPanel(id){
+  document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('on');});
+  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('on');});
+  document.getElementById('panel-'+id).classList.add('on');
+  event.target.classList.add('on');
+}
+
+function renderDrills(){
+  var wrap=document.getElementById('panel-drills');var html='';
+  for(var sport in WORKOUT_CATALOG){
+    for(var pos in WORKOUT_CATALOG[sport]){
+      WORKOUT_CATALOG[sport][pos].forEach(function(drill,di){
+        var uid=sport+'-'+pos+'-'+di;
+        html+='<div class="item"><div class="item-hdr"><div class="item-title">'+sport.toUpperCase()+' / '+pos+' / #'+(di+1)+'</div><div class="item-badge">PENDING AUDIT</div></div>';
+        html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">EN</div><input id="d-'+uid+'-en" value="'+drill.name.en+'"><input id="d-'+uid+'-focus-en" value="'+drill.focus.en+'" style="grid-column:span 2"></div>';
+        html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">ES</div><input id="d-'+uid+'-es" value="'+drill.name.es+'"><input id="d-'+uid+'-focus-es" value="'+drill.focus.es+'" style="grid-column:span 2"></div>';
+        html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">PT</div><input id="d-'+uid+'-pt" value="'+drill.name.pt+'"><input id="d-'+uid+'-focus-pt" value="'+drill.focus.pt+'" style="grid-column:span 2"></div>';
+        html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">SETS</div><input id="d-'+uid+'-sets" value="'+drill.sets+'" style="max-width:120px"><div class="row-lbl" style="text-align:right">EQUIP</div><input id="d-'+uid+'-eq" value="'+drill.equipment+'"></div>';
+        html+='<button class="save-btn" onclick="saveDrill(\''+sport+'\',\''+pos+'\','+di+',\''+uid+'\')">VERIFY & SAVE</button><div class="status" id="s-'+uid+'"></div></div>';
+      });
+    }
+  }
+  wrap.innerHTML=html;
+}
+
+function saveDrill(sport,pos,di,uid){
+  var d=WORKOUT_CATALOG[sport][pos][di];
+  d.name.en=document.getElementById('d-'+uid+'-en').value;
+  d.name.es=document.getElementById('d-'+uid+'-es').value;
+  d.name.pt=document.getElementById('d-'+uid+'-pt').value;
+  d.focus.en=document.getElementById('d-'+uid+'-focus-en').value;
+  d.focus.es=document.getElementById('d-'+uid+'-focus-es').value;
+  d.focus.pt=document.getElementById('d-'+uid+'-focus-pt').value;
+  d.sets=document.getElementById('d-'+uid+'-sets').value;
+  d.equipment=document.getElementById('d-'+uid+'-eq').value;
+  try{localStorage.setItem('bbf_workout_catalog',JSON.stringify(WORKOUT_CATALOG));}catch(e){}
+  document.getElementById('s-'+uid).textContent='✓ NASM-Verified & Saved';
+}
+
+function renderMeals(){
+  var wrap=document.getElementById('panel-meals');var html='';
+  MEAL_VAULT.forEach(function(m,i){
+    html+='<div class="item"><div class="item-hdr"><div class="item-title">MEAL #'+m.id+' — '+(m.type==='road'?'ROAD':'HOME')+'</div><div class="item-badge">PENDING AUDIT</div></div>';
+    html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">EN</div><input id="m-'+i+'-en" value="'+m.name.en+'" style="grid-column:span 3"></div>';
+    html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">ES</div><input id="m-'+i+'-es" value="'+m.name.es+'" style="grid-column:span 3"></div>';
+    html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">PT</div><input id="m-'+i+'-pt" value="'+m.name.pt+'" style="grid-column:span 3"></div>';
+    html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">PARENT</div><input id="m-'+i+'-pp" value="'+m.parent.portion+'" style="grid-column:span 3"></div>';
+    html+='<div class="row"><div class="row-lbl">ATHLETE</div><input id="m-'+i+'-ap" value="'+m.athlete.portion+'" style="grid-column:span 3"></div>';
+    html+='<button class="save-btn" onclick="saveMeal('+i+')">VERIFY & SAVE</button><div class="status" id="ms-'+i+'"></div></div>';
+  });
+  wrap.innerHTML=html;
+}
+
+function saveMeal(i){
+  var m=MEAL_VAULT[i];
+  m.name.en=document.getElementById('m-'+i+'-en').value;
+  m.name.es=document.getElementById('m-'+i+'-es').value;
+  m.name.pt=document.getElementById('m-'+i+'-pt').value;
+  m.parent.portion=document.getElementById('m-'+i+'-pp').value;
+  m.athlete.portion=document.getElementById('m-'+i+'-ap').value;
+  try{localStorage.setItem('bbf_meal_vault',JSON.stringify(MEAL_VAULT));}catch(e){}
+  document.getElementById('ms-'+i).textContent='✓ NASM-Verified & Saved';
+}
+
+renderDrills();renderMeals();
+</script>
+</body>
+</html>

+<script>
+function showPanel(id) {
+  document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('on');});
+  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('on');});
+  document.getElementById('panel-'+id).classList.add('on');
+  event.target.classList.add('on');
+  if (id === 'triage') BBF_PORTAL.load();
+  if (id === 'roster') loadRoster();
+}
+
+function loadRoster() {
+  try {
+    var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+    var clients = Object.entries(d.u || {}).filter(function(e){return e[1].role==='client';});
+    var wrap = document.getElementById('roster-list');
+    wrap.innerHTML = clients.map(function(e) {
+      var uid = e[0], u = e[1];
+      var status = u.access_status || 'unlocked';
+      var sColor = status==='locked'?'#ef4444':status==='recovery'?'#f59e0b':'#22c55e';
+      var logs = (d.l[uid] || []).filter(function(l){return l.type!=='note';}).length;
+      return '<div style="background:#111;border:1px solid #1e1e1e;border-radius:8px;padding:1rem;margin-bottom:.6rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem">' +
+        '<div style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:'+sColor+'"></div>' +
+        '<div style="flex:1"><div style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#fff">'+(u.name||uid)+'</div><div style="font-size:.72rem;color:#888">'+(u.type||'Client')+' • '+(u.goal||'No goal')+' • '+logs+' sessions</div></div>' +
+        '<div style="font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;color:'+sColor+';text-transform:uppercase">'+status+'</div></div>';
+    }).join('');
+  } catch(e) {}
+}
+
+function renderEntitlements() {
+  try {
+    var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+    var clients = Object.entries(d.u || {}).filter(function(e){return e[1].role==='client';});
+    var wrap = document.getElementById('entitlements-list');
+    if (!wrap) return;
+    wrap.innerHTML = clients.map(function(e) {
+      var uid = e[0], u = e[1];
+      var trial = u.trial_status === 'active';
+      return '<div class="ent-row">' +
+        '<div class="ent-name">' + (u.name || uid) + '</div>' +
+        '<div class="ent-lbl">Sovereign Trial</div>' +
+        '<div class="ent-toggle' + (trial ? ' on' : '') + '" onclick="BBF_PORTAL.toggleTrial(\'' + uid + '\',this)"></div>' +
+        '<span class="ent-status" id="trial-status-' + uid + '" style="color:' + (trial ? '#D4AF37' : '#555') + '">' + (trial ? 'ACTIVE' : 'OFF') + '</span>' +
+        '</div>';
+    }).join('');
+  } catch(e) {}
+}
+
+function toggleTrial(uid, el) {
+  try {
+    var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+    if (!d.u[uid]) return;
+    var isNowActive = d.u[uid].trial_status !== 'active';
+    d.u[uid].trial_status = isNowActive ? 'active' : 'inactive';
+    if (isNowActive) d.u[uid].trial_start_date = new Date().toISOString();
+    localStorage.setItem('bbf_v7', JSON.stringify(d));
+    el.classList.toggle('on', isNowActive);
+    var status = document.getElementById('trial-status-' + uid);
+    if (status) { status.textContent = isNowActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'OFF'; status.style.color = isNowActive ? '#D4AF37' : '#555'; }
+    if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.toggleSovereignTrial) {
+      BBF_SYNC.toggleSovereignTrial(uid, isNowActive);
+    }
+  } catch(e) { console.error('Toggle trial error:', e); }
+}
+
+// Init
+BBF_PORTAL.load();
+renderEntitlements();
+try {
+  var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+  var clients = Object.entries(d.u || {}).filter(function(e){return e[1].role==='client';});
+  var totalLogs = 0;
+  for (var uid in (d.l || {})) { totalLogs += (d.l[uid] || []).length; }
+  document.getElementById('stat-clients').textContent = clients.length;
+  document.getElementById('stat-logs').textContent = totalLogs;
+  setTimeout(function() {
+    var stats = BBF_PORTAL.stats();
+    document.getElementById('stat-pending').textContent = stats.total;
+  }, 500);
+} catch(e) {}
+</script>
+</body>
+</html>

+<script>
+  // ── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  const selected = new Set();
+  const cards    = document.querySelectorAll('.pos-card');
+  const preview  = document.getElementById('selectedPreview');
+  const submitBtn= document.getElementById('submitBtn');
+  const hiddenPos= document.getElementById('hiddenPositions');
+
+  // ── Card toggle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  cards.forEach(card => {
+    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      const pos = card.dataset.pos;
+      if (selected.has(pos)) {
+        selected.delete(pos);
+        card.classList.remove('selected');
+      } else {
+        selected.add(pos);
+        card.classList.add('selected');
+      }
+      updatePreview();
+    });
+  });
+
+  document.getElementById('selectAll').addEventListener('click', () => {
+    cards.forEach(c => { selected.add(c.dataset.pos); c.classList.add('selected'); });
+    updatePreview();
+  });
+
+  document.getElementById('clearAll').addEventListener('click', () => {
+    cards.forEach(c => { selected.delete(c.dataset.pos); c.classList.remove('selected'); });
+    updatePreview();
+  });
+
+  function updatePreview() {
+    const items = [...selected];
+    hiddenPos.value = items.join(', ');
+    submitBtn.disabled = items.length === 0;
+
+    if (items.length === 0) {
+      preview.innerHTML = '<span class="sel-none">No positions selected yet — choose above ↑</span>';
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const labels = {};
+    cards.forEach(c => labels[c.dataset.pos] = c.dataset.label);
+    preview.innerHTML = items.map(p => `<span class="sel-tag">${labels[p]}</span>`).join('');
+  }
+
+  // ── Form submit ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  document.getElementById('gateForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
+    e.preventDefault();
+
+    submitBtn.textContent = 'SENDING...';
+    submitBtn.disabled = true;
+
+    const data = new FormData(this);
+
+    try {
+      const res = await fetch(this.action, {
+        method: 'POST',
+        body: data,
+        headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
+      });
+
+      if (res.ok) {
+        showSuccess();
+      } else {
+        submitBtn.textContent = 'UNLOCK MY PLAYBOOKS →';
+        submitBtn.disabled = false;
+        alert('Something went wrong. Please try again.');
+      }
+    } catch {
+      // If fetch fails, still show success (Formspree redirect fallback)
+      showSuccess();
+    }
+  });
+
+  function showSuccess() {
+    document.getElementById('formState').style.display = 'none';
+    const ss = document.getElementById('successState');
+    ss.style.display = 'block';
+
+    // Build download links for selected positions
+    const files = {};
+    cards.forEach(c => files[c.dataset.pos] = { file: c.dataset.file, label: c.dataset.label });
+
+    const dlContainer = document.getElementById('downloadLinks');
+    dlContainer.innerHTML = '';
+
+    const emojis = { QB:'🏈', RB:'💨', WR:'⚡', TE:'🛡️', LB:'🔴', S:'🎯', OL:'💪' };
+
+    [...selected].forEach(pos => {
+      if (files[pos]) {
+        const a = document.createElement('a');
+        a.className = 'dl-btn';
+        a.href = files[pos].file;
+        a.download = '';
+        a.innerHTML = `<span>${emojis[pos] || '📄'} ${files[pos].label} Playbook</span><span>↓ Download</span>`;
+        dlContainer.appendChild(a);
+      }
+    });
+
+    // Smooth scroll to success
+    document.getElementById('formCard').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
+  }
+
+  // ── Scroll reveal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
+    entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
+      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
+        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 60);
+        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
+      }
+    });
+  }, { threshold: 0.1 });
+
+  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
+</script>
+</body>
+</html>

+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+// PORTAL-ENGINE.JS — BBF Mastermind Dashboard Engine
+// Sovereign Command Center — Trainer Intelligence Layer
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+
+var BBF_PORTAL = (function() {
+  'use strict';
+
+  var pendingAudits = [];
+
+  function verifyMastermindAccess() {
+    try {
+      var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+      var users = d.u || {};
+      for (var uid in users) {
+        if (users[uid].role === 'trainer') return true;
+      }
+    } catch (e) {}
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  function redirectUnauthorized() {
+    window.location.href = 'bbf-app.html';
+  }
+
+  function loadTriageBoard() {
+    var board = document.getElementById('audit-triage-board');
+    if (!board) return;
+    board.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:2rem;color:#555;font-size:.85rem;letter-spacing:2px">LOADING INTELLIGENCE...</div>';
+
+    if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.fetchPendingAudits) {
+      BBF_SYNC.fetchPendingAudits().then(function(data) {
+        pendingAudits = data || [];
+        renderTriageBoard();
+      }).catch(function(e) {
+        console.error('Portal fetch error:', e);
+        board.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:2rem;color:#ef4444;font-size:.85rem">Cloud connection failed. Check Supabase status.</div>';
+      });
+    } else {
+      // Fallback: load from localStorage
+      loadFromLocal();
+      renderTriageBoard();
+    }
+  }
+
+  function loadFromLocal() {
+    try {
+      var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+      pendingAudits = [];
+      for (var uid in (d.l || {})) {
+        (d.l[uid] || []).forEach(function(log) {
+          if (log.type === 'audit' || (log.notes && log.notes.indexOf('Audit:') === 0)) {
+            pendingAudits.push({
+              user_id: uid,
+              user_name: (d.u[uid] && d.u[uid].name) || uid,
+              notes: log.notes || '',
+              date: log.date || '',
+              logged_at: log.loggedAt || '',
+              resolved: log.resolved || false
+            });
+          }
+        });
+      }
+      pendingAudits.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.logged_at || '').localeCompare(a.logged_at || ''); });
+    } catch (e) { pendingAudits = []; }
+  }
+
+  function renderTriageBoard() {
+    var board = document.getElementById('audit-triage-board');
+    if (!board) return;
+
+    if (!pendingAudits.length) {
+      board.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:3rem"><div style="font-size:3rem;margin-bottom:1rem">\u2705</div><div style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:1.3rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#22c55e">ALL CLEAR</div><div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#888;margin-top:.3rem">No pending audit requests from your roster.</div></div>';
+      return;
+    }
+
+    board.innerHTML = '<div style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:#D4AF37;margin-bottom:1rem">' + pendingAudits.length + ' AUDIT REQUEST' + (pendingAudits.length > 1 ? 'S' : '') + ' PENDING</div>' +
+      pendingAudits.map(function(a, i) {
+        var parts = (a.notes || '').replace('Audit: ', '').split(' \u2014 Tension: ');
+        var exercise = parts[0] || 'Unknown';
+        var tension = parts[1] || 'Not specified';
+        var time = a.logged_at ? new Date(a.logged_at).toLocaleString() : a.date || '';
+        return '<div style="background:#111;border:1px solid #1e1e1e;border-left:3px solid #D4AF37;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;padding:1.2rem;margin-bottom:.8rem">' +
+          '<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.8rem">' +
+          '<div style="flex-shrink:0;width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:#6a0dad;border:2px solid #D4AF37;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;color:#D4AF37">' + (a.user_name || '?')[0].toUpperCase() + '</div>' +
+          '<div style="flex:1">' +
+          '<div style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:1.1rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#fff">' + (a.user_name || a.user_id) + '</div>' +
+          '<div style="font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:#D4AF37;margin-top:.2rem">CLINICAL ALERT</div>' +
+          '</div>' +
+          '<div style="font-size:.6rem;color:#555;text-align:right;min-width:80px">' + time + '</div>' +
+          '</div>' +
+          '<div style="background:#0a0a0a;border:1px solid #1e1e1e;border-radius:6px;padding:.8rem;margin-bottom:.8rem">' +
+          '<div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center;margin-bottom:.4rem"><span style="font-size:1rem">\uD83C\uDFCB</span><span style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff">' + exercise + '</span></div>' +
+          '<div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center"><span style="font-size:1rem">\u26A0</span><span style="font-size:.85rem;color:#D4AF37">Tension Area: <strong>' + tension + '</strong></span></div>' +
+          '</div>' +
+          '<div style="display:flex;gap:.5rem">' +
+          '<button onclick="BBF_PORTAL.reviewProfile(\'' + (a.user_id || '') + '\')" style="flex:1;font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:2px;background:transparent;border:1px solid #6a0dad;color:#8b1abf;padding:8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s">\uD83D\uDCCB REVIEW PROFILE</button>' +
+          '<button onclick="BBF_PORTAL.resolve(' + i + ')" style="flex:1;font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:2px;background:rgba(34,197,94,.1);border:1px solid #22c55e;color:#22c55e;padding:8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s">\u2705 MARK RESOLVED</button>' +
+          '</div></div>';
+      }).join('');
+  }
+
+  function resolve(index) {
+    if (pendingAudits[index]) {
+      var audit = pendingAudits[index];
+      pendingAudits.splice(index, 1);
+      renderTriageBoard();
+      // Update stat counter
+      var statEl = document.getElementById('stat-pending');
+      if (statEl) statEl.textContent = pendingAudits.length;
+      // Sync resolution to Supabase
+      try {
+        if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.syncLog) {
+          BBF_SYNC.syncLog(audit.user_id || 'akeem', {
+            date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10),
+            type: 'audit-resolved',
+            notes: 'Resolved: ' + (audit.notes || ''),
+            loggedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
+            loggedBy: 'akeem'
+          });
+        }
+      } catch(e) { console.error('Resolve sync error:', e); }
+    }
+  }
+
+  function reviewProfile(uid) {
+    if (!uid) return;
+    try {
+      var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+      var u = d.u[uid] || {};
+      var logs = (d.l[uid] || []).filter(function(l) { return l.type !== 'note'; });
+      var recentLogs = logs.slice(-5).reverse();
+      var modal = document.createElement('div');
+      modal.id = 'profile-review-modal';
+      modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.9);z-index:300;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px';
+      modal.innerHTML = '<div style="background:#111;border:1px solid #1e1e1e;border-radius:12px;padding:2rem;max-width:500px;width:100%;max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto">' +
+        '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem"><div style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:1.5rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#fff">' + (u.name || uid) + '</div><button onclick="this.closest(\'#profile-review-modal\').remove()" style="background:none;border:none;color:#888;font-size:1.5rem;cursor:pointer">\u2715</button></div>' +
+        '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem">' +
+        '<div style="background:#0a0a0a;border-radius:6px;padding:.6rem;text-align:center"><div style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:#D4AF37">' + logs.length + '</div><div style="font-size:.6rem;color:#888;letter-spacing:1px">SESSIONS</div></div>' +
+        '<div style="background:#0a0a0a;border-radius:6px;padding:.6rem;text-align:center"><div style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:#D4AF37">' + (u.type || 'Client') + '</div><div style="font-size:.6rem;color:#888;letter-spacing:1px">TIER</div></div></div>' +
+        '<div style="font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:#D4AF37;margin-bottom:.5rem">RECENT SESSIONS</div>' +
+        (recentLogs.length ? recentLogs.map(function(l) {
+          return '<div style="background:#0a0a0a;border-left:2px solid #6a0dad;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:.5rem .8rem;margin-bottom:.4rem"><div style="font-size:.78rem;color:#fff">' + (l.notes || l.type) + '</div><div style="font-size:.6rem;color:#555">' + (l.date || '') + '</div></div>';
+        }).join('') : '<div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#555;padding:.5rem">No sessions logged yet.</div>') +
+        '<div style="font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:#888;margin-top:1rem">Goal: ' + (u.goal || 'Not set') + '</div>' +
+        '</div>';
+      modal.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target === modal) modal.remove(); };
+      document.body.appendChild(modal);
+    } catch(e) { console.error('Profile review error:', e); }
+  }
+
+  function getStats() {
+    return {
+      total: pendingAudits.length,
+      audits: pendingAudits
+    };
+  }
+
+  function toggleTrialAccess(uid, toggleEl) {
+    try {
+      var d = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7') || '{}');
+      if (!d.u[uid]) return;
+      var isNowActive = d.u[uid].trial_status !== 'active';
+      d.u[uid].trial_status = isNowActive ? 'active' : 'inactive';
+      if (isNowActive) d.u[uid].trial_start_date = new Date().toISOString();
+      localStorage.setItem('bbf_v7', JSON.stringify(d));
+      // UI feedback
+      if (toggleEl) toggleEl.classList.toggle('on', isNowActive);
+      var status = document.getElementById('trial-status-' + uid);
+      if (status) {
+        status.textContent = isNowActive ? 'TRIAL AUTHORIZED' : 'ACCESS REVOKED';
+        status.style.color = isNowActive ? '#22c55e' : '#ef4444';
+        setTimeout(function() {
+          status.textContent = isNowActive ? 'ACTIVE' : 'OFF';
+          status.style.color = isNowActive ? '#D4AF37' : '#555';
+        }, 2000);
+      }
+      // Supabase sync
+      if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.toggleSovereignTrial) {
+        BBF_SYNC.toggleSovereignTrial(uid, isNowActive)
+          .then(function() { console.log('BBF_PORTAL: Trial ' + (isNowActive ? 'activated' : 'revoked') + ' for ' + uid); })
+          .catch(function(e) { console.error('BBF_PORTAL: Trial sync error:', e); });
+      }
+    } catch(e) { console.error('Toggle trial error:', e); }
+  }
+
+  return {
+    verify: verifyMastermindAccess,
+    redirect: redirectUnauthorized,
+    load: loadTriageBoard,
+    resolve: resolve,
+    reviewProfile: reviewProfile,
+    toggleTrial: toggleTrialAccess,
+    stats: getStats
+  };
+
+})();

+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+// PREHAB-AUDITOR.JS — BBF Pre-Hab Stiffness Assessment
+// Sovereign Gold Standard — Corrective Protocol Router
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+
+var BBF_PREHAB = (function() {
+  'use strict';
+
+  var AREAS = [
+    { id:'hips', icon:'\uD83E\uDDBF', en:'Hips / Pelvis', es:'Caderas / Pelvis', pt:'Quadril / Pelve' },
+    { id:'shoulders', icon:'\uD83E\uDDB4', en:'Shoulders / Upper Back', es:'Hombros / Espalda Alta', pt:'Ombros / Costas Superiores' },
+    { id:'lower-back', icon:'\uD83E\uDDB5', en:'Lower Back', es:'Espalda Baja', pt:'Lombar' },
+    { id:'knees', icon:'\uD83E\uDDB6', en:'Knees / Ankles', es:'Rodillas / Tobillos', pt:'Joelhos / Tornozelos' }
+  ];
+
+  // ─── 3-MINUTE CORRECTIVE PROTOCOLS (3 movements each) ────
+  var PROTOCOLS = {
+    'hips': [
+      { en:'90/90 Hip Stretch — 30s each side', es:'Estiramiento 90/90 de Cadera — 30s cada lado', pt:'Alongamento 90/90 do Quadril — 30s cada lado' },
+      { en:'Glute Bridge with 2s pause — 15 reps', es:'Puente de Glúteos con pausa de 2s — 15 reps', pt:'Ponte de Glúteos com pausa de 2s — 15 reps' },
+      { en:'Lateral Band Walk — 10 steps each direction', es:'Caminata Lateral con Banda — 10 pasos cada dirección', pt:'Caminhada Lateral com Faixa — 10 passos cada direção' }
+    ],
+    'shoulders': [
+      { en:'Wall Slides — 10 slow reps', es:'Deslizamientos en Pared — 10 reps lentas', pt:'Deslizamentos na Parede — 10 reps lentas' },
+      { en:'Band External Rotation — 15 reps each arm', es:'Rotación Externa con Banda — 15 reps cada brazo', pt:'Rotação Externa com Faixa — 15 reps cada braço' },
+      { en:'Cat-Cow Thoracic Focus — 10 reps', es:'Gato-Vaca con Enfoque Torácico — 10 reps', pt:'Gato-Vaca com Foco Torácico — 10 reps' }
+    ],
+    'lower-back': [
+      { en:'Cat-Cow Mobilization — 10 controlled reps', es:'Movilización Gato-Vaca — 10 reps controladas', pt:'Mobilização Gato-Vaca — 10 reps controladas' },
+      { en:'Child\'s Pose Hold — 45 seconds', es:'Postura del Niño — 45 segundos', pt:'Postura da Criança — 45 segundos' },
+      { en:'Dead Bug — 8 reps each side', es:'Dead Bug — 8 reps cada lado', pt:'Dead Bug — 8 reps cada lado' }
+    ],
+    'knees': [
+      { en:'Single-Leg Balance — 30s each foot', es:'Equilibrio en Una Pierna — 30s cada pie', pt:'Equilíbrio em Uma Perna — 30s cada pé' },
+      { en:'Calf Raise with 2s Pause — 15 reps', es:'Elevación de Talones con Pausa de 2s — 15 reps', pt:'Elevação de Panturrilha com Pausa de 2s — 15 reps' },
+      { en:'Ankle Circles — 10 each direction per foot', es:'Círculos de Tobillo — 10 cada dirección por pie', pt:'Círculos de Tornozelo — 10 cada direção por pé' }
+    ]
+  };
+
+  var currentCallback = null;
+
+  function getLang() {
+    return (typeof BBF_LANG !== 'undefined' && BBF_LANG.get) ? BBF_LANG.get() : 'en';
+  }
+
+  function triggerPreHabAudit(onComplete) {
+    currentCallback = onComplete || function() {};
+    var L = getLang();
+    var title = { en:'Sovereign System Check', es:'Verificación del Sistema Soberano', pt:'Verificação do Sistema Soberano' };
+    var subtitle = { en:'Identify your primary area of stiffness today.', es:'Identifica tu área principal de rigidez hoy.', pt:'Identifique sua área principal de rigidez hoje.' };
+
+    var modal = document.getElementById('prehab-audit-modal');
+    if (!modal) return;
+
+    document.getElementById('prehab-audit-title').textContent = title[L] || title.en;
+    document.getElementById('prehab-audit-sub').textContent = subtitle[L] || subtitle.en;
+
+    var grid = document.getElementById('prehab-audit-options');
+    grid.innerHTML = AREAS.map(function(a) {
+      return '<button class="aud-opt" onclick="BBF_PREHAB.selectArea(\'' + a.id + '\')">' +
+        '<span class="aud-opt-icon">' + a.icon + '</span>' +
+        '<span class="aud-opt-label">' + (a[L] || a.en) + '</span>' +
+      '</button>';
+    }).join('');
+
+    modal.classList.add('on');
+  }
+
+  function selectArea(areaId) {
+    var L = getLang();
+    var area = AREAS.find(function(a) { return a.id === areaId; });
+    var protocol = PROTOCOLS[areaId] || [];
+    var areaLabel = area ? (area[L] || area.en) : areaId;
+
+    var protocolTitle = { en:'3-MINUTE CORRECTIVE PROTOCOL', es:'PROTOCOLO CORRECTIVO DE 3 MINUTOS', pt:'PROTOCOLO CORRETIVO DE 3 MINUTOS' };
+    var ackLabel = { en:'BEGIN WORKOUT \u2192', es:'INICIAR ENTRENAMIENTO \u2192', pt:'INICIAR TREINO \u2192' };
+
+    var grid = document.getElementById('prehab-audit-options');
+    var title = document.getElementById('prehab-audit-title');
+
+    title.textContent = '\uD83D\uDEE1 ' + areaLabel;
+    grid.innerHTML =
+      '<div style="grid-column:span 2;background:#0a0a0a;border-left:3px solid #D4AF37;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;padding:1rem">' +
+      '<div style="font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:#D4AF37;margin-bottom:.8rem">' + (protocolTitle[L] || protocolTitle.en) + '</div>' +
+      protocol.map(function(p, i) {
+        return '<div style="display:flex;gap:.8rem;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:.6rem">' +
+          '<span style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:#D4AF37;min-width:24px">' + (i + 1) + '</span>' +
+          '<span style="font-size:.88rem;color:#ddd;line-height:1.5">' + (p[L] || p.en) + '</span></div>';
+      }).join('') +
+      '</div>' +
+      '<button onclick="BBF_PREHAB.acknowledge(\'' + areaId + '\')" style="grid-column:span 2;margin-top:.5rem;padding:.8rem;background:#D4AF37;color:#0a0a0a;font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;letter-spacing:2px;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer">' + (ackLabel[L] || ackLabel.en) + '</button>';
+
+    // Cloud sync
+    try {
+      if (typeof BBF_SYNC !== 'undefined' && BBF_SYNC.logAuditRequest) {
+        var uid = (typeof CU !== 'undefined' && CU) ? CU : 'unknown';
+        BBF_SYNC.logAuditRequest(uid, 'Pre-Hab Audit', area ? area.en : areaId);
+      }
+    } catch (e) { console.error('BBF_PREHAB: Sync error', e); }
+  }
+
+  function acknowledge(areaId) {
+    closeModal();
+    if (currentCallback) currentCallback({ area: areaId, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() });
+  }
+
+  function closeModal() {
+    var modal = document.getElementById('prehab-audit-modal');
+    if (modal) modal.classList.remove('on');
+  }
+
+  return {
+    trigger: triggerPreHabAudit,
+    selectArea: selectArea,
+    acknowledge: acknowledge,
+    close: closeModal,
+    AREAS: AREAS,
+    PROTOCOLS: PROTOCOLS
+  };
+
+})();

diff --git a/rpe-commander.js b/rpe-commander.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d216525
--- /dev/null
+++ b/rpe-commander.js
@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+// RPE-COMMANDER.JS — BBF Adaptive RPE Commander
+// Sovereign Gold Standard — Clinical Load Prescription
+// Prime Directive: 85% of 1RM = Hypertrophic Efficiency Target
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+
+var BBF_RPE = (function() {
+  'use strict';
+
+  var SOVEREIGN_TARGET = 0.85; // 85% of 1RM
+
+  // ─── TRILINGUAL COMMAND CUES ─────────────────────────────
+  var CUES = {
+    increase: {
+      en: 'Velocity is optimal. Increase load toward your 85% Sovereign Target.',
+      es: 'La velocidad es \u00f3ptima. Aumenta la carga hacia tu Objetivo Soberano del 85%.',
+      pt: 'A velocidade \u00e9 ideal. Aumente a carga em dire\u00e7\u00e3o \u00e0 sua Meta Soberana de 85%.'
+    },
+    hold: {
+      en: 'Optimal stimulus achieved. Hold load. Master the biomechanics.',
+      es: 'Est\u00edmulo \u00f3ptimo alcanzado. Mant\u00e9n la carga. Domina la biomec\u00e1nica.',
+      pt: 'Est\u00edmulo ideal alcan\u00e7ado. Mantenha a carga. Domine a biomec\u00e2nica.'
+    },
+    decrease: {
+      en: 'CNS strain detected. Reduce load to protect form and prioritize recovery.',
+      es: 'Tensi\u00f3n del SNC detectada. Reduce la carga para proteger la postura y priorizar la recuperaci\u00f3n.',
+      pt: 'Tens\u00e3o no SNC detectada. Reduza a carga para proteger a postura e priorizar a recupera\u00e7\u00e3o.'
+    }
+  };
+
+  function getLang() {
+    return (typeof BBF_LANG !== 'undefined' && BBF_LANG.get) ? BBF_LANG.get() : 'en';
+  }
+
+  // ─── SOVEREIGN LOAD CALCULATOR ───────────────────────────
+  function calculateSovereignLoad(previousWeight, previousRPE, known1RM) {
+    var L = getLang();
+    var sovereignTarget = Math.round(known1RM * SOVEREIGN_TARGET);
+    var result = { targetWeight: sovereignTarget, condition: '', cue: '', delta: 0 };
+
+    previousWeight = parseFloat(previousWeight) || 0;
+    previousRPE = parseFloat(previousRPE) || 7;
+    known1RM = parseFloat(known1RM) || 0;
+
+    if (!known1RM || known1RM <= 0) {
+      // No 1RM data — estimate from previous weight and RPE
+      // Epley formula variant: 1RM ≈ weight × (1 + reps/30), simplified for RPE
+      known1RM = Math.round(previousWeight / (1.0278 - 0.0278 * (11 - previousRPE)));
+      sovereignTarget = Math.round(known1RM * SOVEREIGN_TARGET);
+      result.targetWeight = sovereignTarget;
+      result.estimated1RM = known1RM;
+    }
+
+    if (previousRPE >= 1 && previousRPE <= 6) {
+      // Condition A: Velocity High — increase toward 85%
+      result.condition = 'increase';
+      result.cue = CUES.increase[L] || CUES.increase.en;
+      result.delta = sovereignTarget - previousWeight;
+      // Suggest incremental increase (don't jump more than 10% at once)
+      var maxJump = Math.round(previousWeight * 0.10);
+      if (result.delta > maxJump && maxJump > 0) {
+        result.targetWeight = previousWeight + maxJump;
+        result.delta = maxJump;
+      }
+    } else if (previousRPE >= 7 && previousRPE <= 8) {
+      // Condition B: Optimal Stimulus — hold
+      result.condition = 'hold';
+      result.cue = CUES.hold[L] || CUES.hold.en;
+      result.targetWeight = previousWeight; // maintain
+      result.delta = 0;
+    } else if (previousRPE >= 9) {
+      // Condition C: CNS Grind — decrease 5-10%
+      result.condition = 'decrease';
+      result.cue = CUES.decrease[L] || CUES.decrease.en;
+      var reduction = previousRPE >= 10 ? 0.10 : 0.05;
+      result.targetWeight = Math.round(previousWeight * (1 - reduction));
+      result.delta = result.targetWeight - previousWeight;
+    }
+
+    result.sovereignTarget = sovereignTarget;
+    result.known1RM = known1RM;
+    return result;
+  }
+
+  // ─── RENDER BANNER HTML ──────────────────────────────────
+  function renderBanner(result) {
+    if (!result || !result.condition) return '';
+    var colors = {
+      increase: { bg: 'rgba(34,197,94,.08)', border: 'rgba(34,197,94,.3)', text: '#22c55e', icon: '\u2B06' },
+      hold: { bg: 'rgba(212,175,55,.08)', border: 'rgba(212,175,55,.3)', text: '#D4AF37', icon: '\u2705' },
+      decrease: { bg: 'rgba(239,68,68,.06)', border: 'rgba(239,68,68,.25)', text: '#ef4444', icon: '\u26A0' }
+    };
+    var c = colors[result.condition] || colors.hold;
+    var L = getLang();
+    var targetLabel = { en: 'SOVEREIGN TARGET', es: 'OBJETIVO SOBERANO', pt: 'META SOBERANA' };
+    var deltaText = '';
+    if (result.delta > 0) deltaText = ' (+' + result.delta + ' lbs)';
+    else if (result.delta < 0) deltaText = ' (' + result.delta + ' lbs)';
+
+    return '<div style="background:' + c.bg + ';border:1px solid ' + c.border + ';border-radius:8px;padding:.7rem 1rem;margin-bottom:.7rem;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:.6rem">' +
+      '<span style="font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px">' + c.icon + '</span>' +
+      '<div style="flex:1">' +
+      '<div style="font-family:\'Bebas Neue\',sans-serif;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:' + c.text + ';margin-bottom:.2rem">' + (targetLabel[L] || targetLabel.en) + ': ' + result.targetWeight + ' LBS' + deltaText + '</div>' +
+      '<div style="font-size:.8rem;color:#ccc;line-height:1.5">' + result.cue + '</div>' +
+      '</div></div>';
+  }
+
+  return {
+    calculate: calculateSovereignLoad,
+    render: renderBanner,
+    SOVEREIGN_TARGET: SOVEREIGN_TARGET,
+    CUES: CUES
+  };
+
+})();

+// ─── ACCESS LEVEL ──────────────────────────────────
+function getAccess(){
+  try{
+    var d=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('bbf_v7')||'{}');
+    var users=d.u||{};
+    for(var k in users){if(users[k].role==='trainer')return 'legacy';}
+    for(var k in users){
+      if(users[k].type==='Platinum')return 'legacy';
+      if(users[k].type==='Elite')return 'elite';
+    }
+  }catch(e){}
+  return 'community';
+}
+var ACCESS=getAccess();
+
+// ─── RENDER GRID ───────────────────────────────────
+function renderGrid(){
+  var g=document.getElementById('sgrid');
+  g.innerHTML=SPORTS.map(function(s){
+    return '<div class="sc" onclick="openSport(\''+s.id+'\')" id="sc-'+s.id+'"><div class="sc-icon">'+s.icon+'</div><div class="sc-name">'+s.name+'</div><div class="sc-sub">'+s.sub+'</div></div>';
+  }).join('');
+}
+
+// ─── OPEN SPORT OVERLAY ────────────────────────────
+var activeSport=null;
+function openSport(id){
+  activeSport=SPORTS.find(function(s){return s.id===id;});
+  if(!activeSport)return;
+  document.querySelectorAll('.sc').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('on');});
+  document.getElementById('sc-'+id).classList.add('on');
+  var h='<div class="otag">COMBINE INPUT</div><div class="otitle">'+activeSport.icon+' '+activeSport.name+' <span>Combine</span></div><div class="osub">Enter athlete metrics for analysis</div>';
+  h+='<div class="fg">';
+  activeSport.fields.forEach(function(f){
+    if(f.type==='select'){
+      h+='<div class="ff"><label>'+f.label+'</label><select id="ci-'+f.id+'">'+f.opts.map(function(o){return '<option value="'+o+'">'+o+'</option>';}).join('')+'</select></div>';
+    }else{
+      h+='<div class="ff"><label>'+f.label+'</label><input type="'+f.type+'" id="ci-'+f.id+'" placeholder="'+f.ph+'"></div>';
+    }
+  });
+  h+='</div>';
+  h+='<button class="sbtn" onclick="runAnalysis()">ANALYZE COMBINE DATA \u2192</button>';
+  h+='<div class="report" id="report"></div>';
+  document.getElementById('oinner').innerHTML=h;
+  document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('on');
+}
+function closeOverlay(){document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('on');document.querySelectorAll('.sc').forEach(function(c){c.classList.remove('on');});}
+
+// ─── ANALYSIS ENGINE ───────────────────────────────
+function runAnalysis(){
+  var data={};var sport=activeSport;
+  sport.fields.forEach(function(f){
+    var el=document.getElementById('ci-'+f.id);
+    data[f.id]=f.type==='number'?parseFloat(el.value)||0:(el.value||'');
+  });
+  var pos=data.pos||'';
+  var bm=(sport.benchmarks&&sport.benchmarks[pos])||null;
+  var report=document.getElementById('report');
+  var h='<div class="rh">'+sport.icon+' SCOUTING REPORT \u2014 '+pos+'</div>';
+
+  // Raw Metrics (Community+)
+  h+='<div class="metrics">';
+  sport.fields.forEach(function(f){
+    if(f.id==='pos')return;
+    var v=data[f.id];if(!v)return;
+    var cls='yel';
+    if(bm&&bm[f.id]){
+      var target=bm[f.id];
+      var lower=['forty','shuttle','lane','ttest','sprint','sixty'];
+      if(lower.indexOf(f.id)>-1){cls=v<=target?'grn':v<=target*1.05?'yel':'red';}
+      else{cls=v>=target?'grn':v>=target*0.95?'yel':'red';}
+    }
+    h+='<div class="mc '+cls+'"><div class="mc-v">'+v+'</div><div class="mc-l">'+f.label.split('(')[0].trim()+'</div></div>';
+  });
+  h+='</div>';
+
+  // Basketball Ape Index
+  if(sport.id==='basketball'&&data.height&&data.wingspan){
+    var ape=(data.wingspan/data.height).toFixed(2);
+    var apeClass=ape>=1.05?'grn':ape>=1.0?'yel':'red';
+    h+='<div class="mc '+apeClass+'" style="max-width:200px;margin-bottom:16px"><div class="mc-v">'+ape+'</div><div class="mc-l">Ape Index (Wingspan/Height)</div></div>';
+  }
+
+  // Soccer VO2 Max estimation
+  if(sport.id==='soccer'&&data.beep){
+    var parts=data.beep.toString().split('.');var lvl=parseInt(parts[0])||0;
+    var vo2=(18.043461+(0.3689295*lvl*8)-(0.000349*Math.pow(lvl*8,2))).toFixed(1);
+    h+='<div class="mc blu" style="max-width:200px;margin-bottom:16px"><div class="mc-v">'+vo2+'</div><div class="mc-l">Est. VO2 Max (ml/kg/min)</div></div>';
+  }
+
+  // Elite: Collegiate Benchmarking
+  if((ACCESS==='elite'||ACCESS==='legacy')&&bm){
+    h+='<div class="bench"><div class="bench-t">\uD83C\uDFDB COLLEGIATE PERFORMANCE BENCHMARKING</div>';
+    for(var key in bm){
+      var val=data[key];if(!val)continue;
+      var target=bm[key];
+      var lower=['forty','shuttle','lane','ttest','sprint','sixty'];
+      var diff,cls2;
+      if(lower.indexOf(key)>-1){diff=((target-val)/target*100).toFixed(1);cls2=val<=target?'above':val<=target*1.05?'meets':'below';}
+      else{diff=((val-target)/target*100).toFixed(1);cls2=val>=target?'above':val>=target*0.95?'meets':'below';}
+      var label=key.replace(/([A-Z])/g,' $1').replace(/^./,function(m){return m.toUpperCase();});
+      h+='<div class="bench-row"><span class="lbl">'+label+'</span><span>Target: '+target+'</span><span>Yours: '+val+'</span><span class="val '+cls2+'">'+(parseFloat(diff)>0?'+':'')+diff+'%</span></div>';
+    }
+    h+='</div>';
+  }else if(ACCESS==='community'&&bm){
+    h+='<div class="tier-lock"><div class="tier-lock-t">\uD83D\uDD12 COLLEGIATE BENCHMARKS \u2014 ELITE TIER</div><div class="tier-lock-s">Upgrade to Elite to compare against collegiate standards</div></div>';
+  }
+
+  // Legacy: Biomechanical Potential
+  if(ACCESS==='legacy'){
+    h+='<div class="bio"><div class="bio-t">\uD83E\uDDBF BIOMECHANICAL POTENTIAL ANALYSIS</div><div class="bio-txt">Based on the submitted metrics, this athlete shows ';
+    var score=0;var total=0;
+    for(var key in bm){if(data[key]){total++;var t2=bm[key];var lower2=['forty','shuttle','lane','ttest','sprint','sixty'];if(lower2.indexOf(key)>-1){if(data[key]<=t2)score++;}else{if(data[key]>=t2)score++;}}}
+    var pct=total>0?Math.round(score/total*100):0;
+    h+=(pct>=80?'<strong style="color:var(--grn)">elite-level potential ('+pct+'% benchmarks met)</strong>. Recommend immediate collegiate exposure and targeted position development.':
+        pct>=50?'<strong style="color:var(--yel)">strong developmental trajectory ('+pct+'% benchmarks met)</strong>. Targeted 12-week protocol recommended before next evaluation window.':
+        '<strong style="color:var(--red)">foundational development phase ('+pct+'% benchmarks met)</strong>. Structured 16-week strength and speed protocol required. Focus on progressive overload and movement quality.');
+    h+='</div></div>';
+    h+='<div class="tier-lock" style="background:rgba(106,13,173,.1);border-color:var(--pur)"><div class="tier-lock-t">\uD83D\uDCC5 SCHEDULE 1-ON-1 FOUNDER AUDIT</div><div class="tier-lock-s">Text Akeem at 623-340-9254 for a personalized biomechanical review</div></div>';
+  }else if(ACCESS==='elite'){
+    h+='<div class="tier-lock"><div class="tier-lock-t">\uD83D\uDD12 BIOMECHANICAL ANALYSIS \u2014 LEGACY TIER</div><div class="tier-lock-s">Upgrade to Legacy for full biomechanical potential report + Founder Audit</div></div>';
+  }
+
+  // Founder's Seal
+  h+='<div class="seal"><div class="seal-icon">\uD83C\uDFC6</div><div class="seal-t">BUILT BY AKEEM \u2022 FOUNDER OF BBF</div><div class="seal-s">Sovereign Gold Standard \u2022 Data-Driven \u2022 Results-Proven \u2022 Founder-Verified</div></div>';
+
+  report.innerHTML=h;
+  report.classList.add('on');
+  report.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
+}
+
+// ─── INIT ──────────────────────────────────────────
+renderGrid();
+</script>
+</body>
+</html>
diff --git a/sw.js b/sw.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f6e73f5
--- /dev/null
+++ b/sw.js
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+// Build Believe Fit — Service Worker v9 — Masterpiece
+// Background Sync + Offline Cache + Auto-flush on reconnect
+
+var CACHE = 'bbf-v9';
+var CORE = ['/bbf-app.html', '/manifest.json', '/bbf-icon.jpeg', '/bbf-photo.jpg'];
+
+// ─── INSTALL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
+self.addEventListener('install', function(e) {
+  e.waitUntil(
+    caches.open(CACHE).then(function(c) {
+      return c.addAll(CORE);
+    }).catch(function() {})
+  );
+  self.skipWaiting();
+});
+
+// ─── ACTIVATE ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+self.addEventListener('activate', function(e) {
+  e.waitUntil(
+    caches.keys().then(function(keys) {
+      return Promise.all(
+        keys.filter(function(k) { return k !== CACHE; }).map(function(k) {
+          return caches.delete(k);
+        })
+      );
+    })
+  );
+  self.clients.claim();
+});
+
+// ─── FETCH — Stale-While-Revalidate ──────────────────────────
+self.addEventListener('fetch', function(e) {
+  if (e.request.method !== 'GET') return;
+  e.respondWith(
+    caches.match(e.request).then(function(cached) {
+      var networkFetch = fetch(e.request).then(function(response) {
+        if (response && response.status === 200) {
+          var copy = response.clone();
+          caches.open(CACHE).then(function(c) { c.put(e.request, copy); });
+        }
+        return response;
+      }).catch(function() {
+        return caches.match('/bbf-app.html');
+      });
+      return cached || networkFetch;
+    })
+  );
+});
+
+// ─── BACKGROUND SYNC ─────────────────────────────────────────
+self.addEventListener('sync', function(e) {
+  if (e.tag === 'bbf-workout-sync') {
+    e.waitUntil(flushSyncQueue());
+  }
+});
+
+function flushSyncQueue() {
+  return self.clients.matchAll().then(function(clients) {
+    if (!clients.length) return;
+    clients.forEach(function(client) {
+      client.postMessage({ type: 'BBF_SYNC_FLUSH' });
+    });
+  });
+}
+
+// ─── MESSAGE HANDLER ─────────────────────────────────────────
+self.addEventListener('message', function(e) {
+  if (e.data && e.data.type === 'SKIP_WAITING') {
+    self.skipWaiting();
+  }
+});
